Spencer", "text": "2/\nIn the 7th year of an #OngoingPandemic of an injurious #AirborneVirus, that we know causes long term organ harm, immune dysregulation, & #LongCOVID after enough #Reinfections, this article puzzles over the increase in chronic conditions in \"younger Canadians -", "created_at": "2026-05-13 17:10:07", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsakh7hc2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsakh7hc2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsamchws2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n...just as they are advancing in their professional lives\". \n\nYounger Canadians, that is, who are invariably working frontline jobs, with no #NPI mitigations in place. \n\n\"As a result, chronic disease is escalating corporate healthcare costs & reshaping workforce benefits across all age groups -", "created_at": "2026-05-13 17:10:07", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsamcdzs2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsakh7hc2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsamcjvc2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n...Between 2019 and 2023, the fastest growth in corporate healthcare claims for conditions such as asthma, diabetes, high blood pressure & high cholesterol occurred among people aged 30 & under\".\n\n☝️READ THAT AGAIN.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 17:10:07", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsamchws2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsakh7hc2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:iwdvw6ybrfsft5prxl3scber/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsxllxcc2j", "author_handle": "simpson-ian.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🇨🇦Ian - #RLessThanOne", "text": "British Heart Foundation ❤️", "created_at": "2026-05-13 17:23:03", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsamcjvc2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsakh7hc2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqsamclts2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. An essential lesson from #COVID is that officials should be candid about communicating that we are often learning in real time, & we should shy away from making bold pronouncements...", "created_at": "2026-05-13 15:37:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqn2ekypk2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n...that may prove dangerously misleading weeks or months later. When it comes to preventing an outbreak from becoming a pandemic, insisting on the wrong answer to that most central question—How does it spread?—may well be worse than not having an answer at all\".", "created_at": "2026-05-13 15:37:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqn2ekvrs2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqn2ekvrs2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:letiaq2sxesu34pzxurs5yji/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqmsrmscc2j", "author_handle": "limelightonyou.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mary Hess", "text": "None of them are “Infectious Disease 🦠 Doctors” or researchers.\n\nRepublicans Rand Paul, Ashley Moody, and Ron Johnson 🤡🤡🤡 are having an “Anti-Science Sham Hearing” promoting their insane #COVID Conspiracy Theories.\n\n@c-span.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-13 15:32:54", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:letiaq2sxesu34pzxurs5yji/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqmolarpk2j", "author_handle": "limelightonyou.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mary Hess", "text": "In the USA, at least 1,235,000 Americans DIED after having a #COVID infection. "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "1) C'est juste une note adressée aux pro de santé qui doivent participer à la campagne qui cible un public en particulier. Ça ne dit rien du remboursement par la sécurité sociale, et ça n'a aucune valeur juridique.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 16:21:04", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlq4rlpick2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlq4rlpick2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqpiwa22t2x", "author_handle": "themis2023.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "La pharmacie se place dans une démarche de demander l'état de santé (voire d'exiger un document) ce qu'elle n'a pas le droit de faire.\n\n2) Si la sécurité sociale ne prenait pas en charge ce serait indiqué mentionné partout.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 16:21:04", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqpivvi6d2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlq4rlpick2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqpiwa4yl2x", "author_handle": "themis2023.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "On ne dit pas aux gens \"vous pouvez vous vacciner\" sans leur dire que ce n'est pas pris en charge.\n\n3) Ça ne pose aucun problème dans les autres pharmacies.\n\nCette manoeuvre est inacceptable. S'ils insistent : signalement à l'ordre des pharmaciens.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 16:21:04", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": La vaccination est ouverte à tous et elle est prise en charge. Aucun document n'est requis et ne peut être exigé par la pharmacie. \n\nDonc pharmacie > \"bonjour je viens pour le vaccin Covid\" > OK. We need to recover what we paid for #covid.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 07:45:08", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vjykxf2zk63tbvtao3ilfwne/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlnb64d4n22t", "author_handle": "eulerob.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "EuleroB", "text": "In tempi di nuovi virus (speriamo non di pandemia), rinfreschiamo la memoria....\n#Confindustria \n#hantavirus #covid\n#renzi #seimorti \nvideo.corriere.it/politica/ren...", "created_at": "2026-05-12 07:26:31", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:i2rzrh5eyx62wvwjx547ytci/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlo6dnpuyc2q", "author_handle": "paperoga.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Paperoga", "text": "E infatti quello dietro ha una mascherina che non copre il naso. "author_display_name": "Moggile Suit Vayeate", "text": "Throwback to COVID times when the toy elephant at the children's section at the public library wore a mask over its entire trunk to set a good example for the lil' uns.\nThis was a rare (cursed) example of running into a dank shitpost completely in the wild.\n#COVID #corona", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:55:31", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6pkwguc27", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Ich weiß nicht, ich habe das Gefühl, dass ich durch diese ständige Sorge über den fehlenden Infektionsschutz und eine mögliche #Covid Infektion inzwischen mental schon so \"abgestumpft\" bin, dass mich diese neue Gefahr gar nicht mehr weiter anhebt, unbeabsichtigt. Kann's schlecht beschreiben🤷🏻‍♀️", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:42:35", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6rbg3qc27", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Ist keine beabsichtigte Reaktion sondern nur eine Wahrnehmung meinerseits. Wahrscheinlich einfach keine mentale Kraft mehr für noch eine neue Sorge.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:43:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6pkwguc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6pkwguc27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uo3ipihcdj7jc5nrgp7ua3yf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6wqulsc2f", "author_handle": "molestando.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Molestando", "text": "Verstehe ich! 😔 Ich bin aktuell recht entspannt, was COVID angeht, weil die Inzidenz niedrig ist und Masken wirksam sind. Und vielleicht, weil ich gut informiert bin. Bei Hanta gibt es wenig Informationen, wenig zuverlässige. Das macht mich nervös, selbst wenn die Inzidenz aktuell fast 0 ist.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:46:34", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6rbg3qc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6pkwguc27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln5ttssj42e", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "No link between maternal COVID infection and birth defects, data suggest\n->CIDRAP | More on \"COVID pregnancy birth defects study\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Infection #Data #Covid", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:27:04", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uhpfrineynjlxho75is6tv5j/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln3q52guas2", "author_handle": "meltedcheese.c.im.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "David J. Atkinson", "text": "@quarantegan.bsky.social @Scienceisnotopinions ** The video is a must watch. **\nTK;DR — #HantaVirus spreads fast. It is easy to catch in just a few moments exposure. Be alert to what happens next.\n\nOne of the reporters got it exactly right. “What you just told us, doctor, is frankly terrifying.” […]", "created_at": "2026-05-12 05:49:15", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln26c2jiv24", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks https://cstu.io/8a0634 #internet #india #covid", "created_at": "2026-05-12 05:21:20", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:f6xvh4kuy6vrbwvfkxon365a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmz7lvwpc2x", "author_handle": "kadungle.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Kadungle", "text": "My cynical self wonders if the infected ship's doctor was relying on their baggy blue surgical mask and (debunked) droplet theory as their infection control. Poor bastard, whatever they were doing. #hantavirus #covid", "created_at": "2026-05-12 05:04:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmv3smg5o2p", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Going viral: With COVID memories still raw, a new illness reignites conspiracy theorists\n->NBC 5 Chicago | More on \"Hantavirus misinformation fuels online conspiracy\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid", "created_at": "2026-05-12 03:50:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmtu4pzza27", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Hantavirus is very different to COVID. Here's why the 'Andes virus' won't cause the next pandemic\n->The Conversation | More on \"Andes virus hantavirus pandemic risk\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Hantavirus #Pandemic #Covid", "created_at": "2026-05-12 03:28:17", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:z6xac4a77a4ncgndjzfiykp4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmpwmqgns2d", "author_handle": "rcshealthcare.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "RCS Healthcare", "text": "FebriDx Rapid Test Procedure Explained for Beginners\n\nrcshcg.com/collections/...\n\n#febdrix #test #rapidtest #covid #beginners #disease #infectious", "created_at": "2026-05-12 02:18:12", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmptjbdbf2u", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO https://cstu.io/20a54b #automation #internet #covid", "created_at": "2026-05-12 02:16:21", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ma5n7cq5oubn424zpxipovbg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmncnkzjk2w", "author_handle": "marushka-t.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marushka-T", "text": "The Canadian #COVID forecast remains high through the next week and a half.\n\nInfections are 8x higher than at their lowest point; \nLong COVID is 6x higher; \nDeaths are nearly 4x higher.\n\nSomeone explain to me how we're doing so much better now.\n\n#canadasky #healthcare #publichealth #maskup", "created_at": "2026-05-12 01:31:31", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmna3bnx22p", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "This happened to many of us with acute #COVID in March 2020. It was reflexive, barely spoken about, never redressed. And left many with undiagnosed #PTSD -", "created_at": "2026-05-12 01:29:41", "like_count": 11, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:sszfana7jxywe63wigunyprh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln26hjga22y", "author_handle": "toknitter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Eva Hamilton (she/her)", "text": "I have so much medical trauma. The first episode was when I was a young, healthy athlete. I had a \"massive central disc herniation\". The doctor would only speak to me from across the room. She left me on the exam table, and I had to call through the closed door to beg help getting down. 1/2", "created_at": "2026-05-12 05:21:25", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmna3bnx22p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmna3bnx22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:sszfana7jxywe63wigunyprh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln26hpiks2y", "author_handle": "toknitter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Eva Hamilton (she/her)", "text": "My physiotherapist eventually called and practically yelled at her. At that point, she requested an MRI within 24 hours. I had one 10 days later. By then, I had lost bladder function. At least she wasn't outright mean and nasty to me. That came later, courtesy of 2 male surgeons with gigantic egos.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 05:21:25", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:sszfana7jxywe63wigunyprh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln26hjga22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmna3bnx22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln4eg4u7k2a", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "That is just awful, Eva, I'm so sorry that happened to you. It's hard to imagine why some people choose medicine, when they are so lacking in humanity.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:00:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:sszfana7jxywe63wigunyprh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln26hjga22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmna3bnx22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:sszfana7jxywe63wigunyprh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln4wx37vk2h", "author_handle": "toknitter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Eva Hamilton (she/her)", "text": "Thank you, Tania. I suspect that most women who have had medical issues have collected layers of trauma from multiple incidents. You are experiencing ongoing trauma yourself. If someone as brilliant and skilled in communication as you are can't make herself heard, I give up. We both deserve better.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:10:55", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln4eg4u7k2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmna3bnx22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln5oynzjc2e", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\n☝️In 2020, this person had a lot to say about \"🇨🇦 freedom\" & was rabidly anti-vax. Then he got #COVID, was medevacked to Vancouver. Months later he joined our local #LongCOVID support group in #Whitehorse; & for a while, stopped shouting (presumably out of breath). \n\nNow he's back, ready for more.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 23:29:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmgii45yk2r", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nAnd other aspects of the pandemic playbook repeat too:\n\nHere comes the Yukon's libertarian, anti-vax brigade (it must have been a slow \"chemtrail\" day in the #Yukon) -", "created_at": "2026-05-11 23:29:12", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmgii45yk2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmgii45yk2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmgimyiwc2r", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Look at cuts to FEMA, CDC, Veterans Dept, SNAP, USAID, ACA, how they put gun, oil, gas, chemical profits over lives, what they did w/ #COVID & now #hantavirus", "created_at": "2026-05-11 22:09:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qih233gyc6kya4ovlqw7f27m/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmbr76rvj23", "author_handle": "indicaindependent.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Pete McVries", "text": "💊 THE COVID DAMAGE:\n\n• Spring 2020: Oz pushed hydroxychloroquine to Trump personally\n• Drug later proven NO BENEFIT + cardiac death risk in elderly\n• The exact population he now controls Medicare for\n\nHe doesn't learn. He just gets bigger platforms.\n\n#COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-11 22:04:30", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qih233gyc6kya4ovlqw7f27m/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmdmhyikh2c", "author_handle": "indicaindependent.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Pete McVries", "text": "🧵 THE SETUP:\n\n• 21-year Trump friendship (met 2004)\n• Held UnitedHealth + Eli Lilly stock at confirmation\n• Now sets reimbursement rates for those same companies\n• Confirmed 53-45, party line\n\n🔎 Follow @indicaindependent.bsky.social for daily OSINT intel.\n\n#OSINT", "created_at": "2026-05-11 22:37:39", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qih233gyc6kya4ovlqw7f27m/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmbr76rvj23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qih233gyc6kya4ovlqw7f27m/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmbr76rvj23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmbd77w5f2l", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Hantavirus and COVID: Similar fears, major differences\n->WRAL | More on \"Hantavirus versus COVID health comparison\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Hantavirus #Covid", "created_at": "2026-05-11 21:56:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q3zls7wdbwlr2ba3b4tbnkez/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm6xyrqjf2z", "author_handle": "quick13.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "quick13", "text": "#Norovirus is my guess for postponement of tonight's @MinnesotaFrost vs @victoire-lphf.bsky.social #PWHL game. And then we were all basically fine by midweek.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 22:57:16", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:q3zls7wdbwlr2ba3b4tbnkez/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm6xyrqjf2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:q3zls7wdbwlr2ba3b4tbnkez/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm6xyrqjf2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q3zls7wdbwlr2ba3b4tbnkez/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmlhbmfcv2s", "author_handle": "quick13.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "quick13", "text": "My neice & nephew gave it to me one Christmas. I knew. \n\n#nycphotography \n#newyorkcityphotography\n#nycstreetphotagraphy \n#urbanphotography #cityscape #urbangaze #streetsnap \n#nyc\n#blackandwhitephotography #monochrome #blackandwhitephoto #bnwphoto\n\n#PhotosByDMRichards", "created_at": "2026-05-11 21:09:09", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:onf24lcbfqyxr3gggwkd4ejq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm6bwkz5c23", "author_handle": "newsfromtheleft.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "News From The Left", "text": "So, just so were clear:\n\n#TB cases on the rise.\nA new #COVID variant.\n#Measles is back.\n#Hantavirus is spreading.\n\nFuck you, 2026.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 21:02:17", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:n45iy5asfprr547iipk2kgzz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm5yk2rg22n", "author_handle": "jaxtait.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr Jackie Turvey Tait", "text": "Dr Jay Bhattacharya, acting head of the US Centers for Willful Failure to Control Diseases, said he did not want to cause public panic, insisting that human-to-human transmission was rare & it should be treated exactly like the #Covid virus, which also doesn't require rational public health policy.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 20:57:04", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm5u3akds2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "Déjà vu - in March 2020, some of us presenting with extreme respiratory distress were bounced out of ERs & refused #COVID tests. \n\nIn #Whitehorse, I was even told, \"Don't come back, it's going to get dangerous here\". \n\nI couldn't argue, & felt like I was going home to die.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 20:54:32", "like_count": 11, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlo5zzej4s2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Würde mich da nicht zu 100% drauf verlassen wollen.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 19:41:38", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:zkgceyo7mhxb3rfgykks47rd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlndt2odhc2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uo3ipihcdj7jc5nrgp7ua3yf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmry4c4ec25", "author_handle": "molestando.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Molestando", "text": "Meintest du das ernst? Oder war das zynisch?\n\nAlso ich bin jedenfalls leider #TeamAngst. Ein Virus, das von Mensch zu Mensch übertragen wird und recht tödlich ist. Eine Bevölkerung, die keine Maßnahmen akzeptiert. (Noch) keine Impfung oder Medikamente. Immerhin Tests!", "created_at": "2026-05-12 02:54:42", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6pkwguc27", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Ich weiß nicht, ich habe das Gefühl, dass ich durch diese ständige Sorge über den fehlenden Infektionsschutz und eine mögliche #Covid Infektion inzwischen mental schon so \"abgestumpft\" bin, dass mich diese neue Gefahr gar nicht mehr weiter anhebt, unbeabsichtigt. Kann's schlecht beschreiben🤷🏻‍♀️", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:42:35", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:uo3ipihcdj7jc5nrgp7ua3yf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmry4c4ec25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6rbg3qc27", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Ist keine beabsichtigte Reaktion sondern nur eine Wahrnehmung meinerseits. Wahrscheinlich einfach keine mentale Kraft mehr für noch eine neue Sorge.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:43:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6pkwguc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uo3ipihcdj7jc5nrgp7ua3yf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6wqulsc2f", "author_handle": "molestando.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Molestando", "text": "Verstehe ich! 😔 Ich bin aktuell recht entspannt, was COVID angeht, weil die Inzidenz niedrig ist und Masken wirksam sind. Und vielleicht, weil ich gut informiert bin. Bei Hanta gibt es wenig Informationen, wenig zuverlässige. Das macht mich nervös, selbst wenn die Inzidenz aktuell fast 0 ist.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:46:34", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6rbg3qc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:solv3oa7u325s6wzpdogvbfo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmvdxjhwk2h", "author_handle": "meikel.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "爪乇丨Ҝ乇ㄥ 🇺🇦😷🇮🇱 | 🇪🇺🌫️✅", "text": "+1\nWenn das selbst von medizinischen Profis so gehandhabt wird.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 03:55:02", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:uo3ipihcdj7jc5nrgp7ua3yf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlmry4c4ec25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:t7tjytrpedi7yi2r7se3ews5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6ackutc2j", "author_handle": "jolu.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ju 📎", "text": "Ich bin da deutlich weniger gelassen. Auf der einen Seite sehe ich das Potenzial, das dieses Virus hat und auf der anderen den laschen Umgang der Behörden damit. Eine explosive Mischung.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:34:05", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6zbhtwk27", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Gelassen ist nicht das richtige Wort, ich bin eh schon desillusioniert und kann daher nicht noch mehr enttäuscht werden.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 06:48:01", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:t7tjytrpedi7yi2r7se3ews5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6ackutc2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:t7tjytrpedi7yi2r7se3ews5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln7oyq67s2j", "author_handle": "jolu.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ju 📎", "text": "Ich bin nicht desillusioniert, ich bin (immer noch) wütend. Über mangelne Information, gezielte Desinformation, über das Kleinreden eines hochpathogenen Virus, über die in Kauf genommene Übersterblichkeit, die fehlende Prävention in Schulen, Kitas, im Gesundheitswesen, und und und...", "created_at": "2026-05-12 07:00:10", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln6zbhtwk27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlngnfn37c2v", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Und damit hast du in jedem einzelnen Punkt Recht…", "created_at": "2026-05-12 09:04:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:t7tjytrpedi7yi2r7se3ews5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mln7oyq67s2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpig3q4bk2u", "author_handle": "trullateee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "friedliche Teeevolution, Prädikat niedlich", "text": "Nein, ich bin absolut nicht gelassen. Ich habe ein schwerbehindertes, schulpflichtiges Kind.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 04:41:34", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqek4sj2k2y", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Ich glaube, ich habe mich missverständlich ausgedrückt. Mit gelassen meinte ich absolut nicht, mir keine Sorgen zu machen. Im Gegenteil, da ich seit über 5 Jahren versuche, meine Familie und mich so gut wie möglich vor einer Infektion und den Spätfolgen von #Covid zu schützen,⤵️", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:04:54", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpig3q4bk2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqek53vtk2y", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "was so viele Nerven und Kraft kostet, hat mein Gehirn anscheinend keine Energie mehr, sich noch mehr zusätzliche Sorgen zu machen. Wir leben ja schon seit Jahren mit der größtmöglichen Gefahr und teilweiser Hilflosigkeit dagegen. Und du in deiner Situation natürlich noch mal besonders💙", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:04:54", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqek4sj2k2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpilj374c2u", "author_handle": "trullateee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "friedliche Teeevolution, Prädikat niedlich", "text": "Falls es schon wieder einige vergessen haben: je nach Wohnort war die Präsenzpflicht an Förderschulen als erstes wieder eingesetzt und wer sein vorerkranktes/behindertes Kind schützen wollte, hatte schnell das Jugendamt am Hals. Viele dieser Kämpfe gehen bis heute.\n\nNull Zuversicht, null Vertrauen.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 04:44:35", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpig3q4bk2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpiyoy6ec2u", "author_handle": "trullateee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "friedliche Teeevolution, Prädikat niedlich", "text": "Ich bin zu 100-% davon überzeugt, dass bei der nächsten Pandemie nichtmal annähernd die Maßnahmen durchgehen, die in der Anfangszeit der jetzigen Pandemie umgesetzt wurden. \n\nUnd mit den zunehmenden Faschismus ist es die ideale Gelegenheit, bestimmte Gruppen noch mehr unter den Bus zu werfen 🙃", "created_at": "2026-05-13 04:51:58", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpilj374c2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqelrawzc2y", "author_handle": "schildi333.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "schildi333 😷", "text": "Und auch da muss ich dir leider zustimmen 😔", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:05:49", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qfj4qhspzyiwh5drsjpkpj2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlpiyoy6ec2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:p5wd2g3xxkks4hibfur4hhtz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3r3fpdc24", "author_handle": "maddin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Es ist schon ein bißchen gruselig, dass das Virus nun von Mensch zu Mensch übertragen wird. Was man aktuell in den Nachrichten mitbekommt sind ja doch einige der Reisenden erkrankt oder können noch erkranken.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 20:17:05", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:kzfbh2ryzz37mmqifdfj42zs/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlooy5jbz22k", "author_handle": "wunder2welt.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tina", "text": "Ich bin gelassen bzgl meines eigenen Ansteckungsrisikos. Meine Corona-Schutzmaßnahmen sollten dafür auch ausreichen. Evtl. braucht es noch etwas mehr bzgl Schmierinfektion/Stäube, falls das wirklich eine Rolle spielt.\nDie sehr uneinheitliche Reaktion der verschiedenen Ländern verstört aber trotzdem.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 21:06:22", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:x32zfjr6nkn6bouh6xe2pila/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlm3j6riyk2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:kzfbh2ryzz37mmqifdfj42zs/app.bsky.feed.post/3mloozx77ds2k", "author_handle": "wunder2welt.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tina", "text": "Und das macht mir dann doch wieder Angst. Any time masked lowers risk […]", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:34:27", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25", "author_handle": "johnathanperk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "JP, The Liberty Underground (PHL)", "text": "I simply do not trust the U.S. government to handle Hantavirus or any other outbreak responsibly.\n\nThe public has every reason to treat any and all health-related information from the Trump administration with skepticism. #covid #pandemic", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:29:58", "like_count": 21, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nukp54wa6msevashdzyoyglk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllfyknayk2z", "author_handle": "cindyjurie.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Cindy Jurie", "text": "After seeing how horrifically inept the trump v1.0 was in dealing with Covid (bleach & ivermectin, anyone?) & how they have truly gutted the scientific agencies of qualified scientists & installed political ideologues in key positions, no one should trust this administration!", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:47:33", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nukp54wa6msevashdzyoyglk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllg232l4k2z", "author_handle": "cindyjurie.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Cindy Jurie", "text": "Just look at what they’re doing with vaccines! One nightmare after another & we have outbreaks of measles, a thoroughly preventable disease in multiple states.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:48:24", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nukp54wa6msevashdzyoyglk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllfyknayk2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:67miaqzcxptpf4nwctqevwf4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllfipabyc2p", "author_handle": "zorrolittotheelder.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "ZorrolittoTheElder / Melissa", "text": "Nobody should trust the United States right now. Everybody who knows stuff was fired.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:38:41", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nukp54wa6msevashdzyoyglk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllfq7aoh22z", "author_handle": "cindyjurie.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Cindy Jurie", "text": "Or are leaving after having to work with thoroughly incompetent “leadership” that don’t understand the mission of their agencies or are inserting grossly political agendas everywhere they can.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:42:53", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:67miaqzcxptpf4nwctqevwf4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllfipabyc2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zftsnmv3oeatoag66zia5sfu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllez4mrss25"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlleshsl2k2j", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #epstein \n\nStarmers Youth Job Guarantee - GIVING BILLIONS to BIG CORPs", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:26:38", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qq7uiyjzzcqdx4pqh4uwze4b/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllds4troya2", "author_handle": "jik.federate.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Jonathan Kamens 86 47", "text": "Upgraded from disposable KN95s to a Flo Mask in preparation for an international business trip next month. Seems like a 24 hour plane trip warrants special precautions. Also planning on shaving off my beard (such as it is) before the trip to maximize the mask seal.\n#COVID #MaskUp", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:08:23", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qq7uiyjzzcqdx4pqh4uwze4b/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllf7lmnzia2", "author_handle": "jik.federate.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Jonathan Kamens 86 47", "text": "I'll need to eat during the trip and it will be impossible to do that not around other people, so I won't be masked the entire trip. But one of the things #COVID really drove home for me, and I suspect many others as well, is to break out of all-or-nothing thinking. Any time masked lowers risk […]", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:34:27", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qq7uiyjzzcqdx4pqh4uwze4b/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllds4troya2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qq7uiyjzzcqdx4pqh4uwze4b/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllds4troya2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:trtrc2bhcrguk4yqkpnnrl6s/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlld7lyq2k24", "author_handle": "dustcircle.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Steve Hudson", "text": "#Scientists Destroy #COVID And #Flu #Viruses in The Lab With #SoundWaves\n\nwww.sciencealert.com/scientists-d...", "created_at": "2026-05-11 12:57:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:li2xpr6uz35arfn55sdg6bbe/app.bsky.feed.post/3mllcfmnnup2n", "author_handle": "lagaylife.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "La Gay Life", "text": "La vidéo du jour : 22 Français cas contact à l’hantavirus : ce que contient le décret sur les mesures d’isolement Humour, people, actus, gay life… On a choisi le meilleur du jour ! A force de ne pas s'alarmer on a confiné deux semaines trop tard et le covid a fait 20 millions de morts (et continue de tuer et de faire des covid long).", "created_at": "2026-05-11 10:13:09", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlksg7eqx42b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlksg7eqx42b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:csjqdoqdmjrddxnyyq42butr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlkuoqz6pc2n", "author_handle": "papeekaboo.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Dites, sauriez vous quel suivi est prévu pour l'équipage du bateau ?\nOn ne parle que des passagers", "created_at": "2026-05-11 08:37:51", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlksg7eqx42b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlksg7eqx42b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:aprqfk3pyxvkalfxcfhmfe4n/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlkrzpdgpc2i", "author_handle": "mayfairlady.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tiye “перестройка гласность” Banks", "text": "🇬🇧 Clip sent to me of Prof Robin May\nChief Scientific Officer, UK 🇬🇧 Health Security Agency letting slip that #COVID & #flu transmit through the air \n\nBegs the question why the emphasis on handwashing and aversion to masks 😷 in healthcare \n\n(Apologies for the sound quality)", "created_at": "2026-05-11 07:50:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlkpgy43z22p", "author_handle": "valkphotos.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "ValK.", "text": "Absolument. profil bénéfices/risques. \n#MAHA = #Censure \n\nwww.nytimes.com/2026/05/05/u...", "created_at": "2026-05-10 21:16:40", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "author_handle": "daniellebeckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Danielle Beckman", "text": "It’s alarming that someone completely unqualified is in charge of the U.S.'s leading health & research agencies (CDC and NIH). His strategy for handling outbreaks is to dismiss experienced staff, take no action and allow infections to spread. We will never forget his approach to the #COVID pandemic.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 20:52:57", "like_count": 64, "reply_count": 6, "repost_count": 21, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xtysu4he57kbga4ckzyu5odw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljnnhcnr22z", "author_handle": "senorsabelotodo.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Señor Sabelotodo", "text": "The Republican party is a death cult, so they have hired the most death cult person to get the job done. \n\nAnd that job is to euthanize everyone they don't like.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 20:59:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wdmuuj3qniqupzgopd4f6heq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlkg3enjd22j", "author_handle": "madmacz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "MadMacz", "text": "The Hantavirus is a litmus test for the US’s ability to go it alone without the WHO and all of the CDC staffers who were let go.\nWhile we should be grateful that the virus isn’t an outbreak risk, we shouldn’t over estimate our country’s ability to assess and control a viral epidemic.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 04:16:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljsfxsbus2f", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "Crypto, corruption, and incompetence in the US government is endangering the world. Polymarket should be shutdown.\n\nANDV is different from American hantavirus and is transmitted by some asymptomatic patients: \nwww.nejm.org/doi/full/10....", "created_at": "2026-05-10 22:24:31", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:batsov5c6h6e54mpj6wrqzt4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljonsyaz22q", "author_handle": "670rv.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "670rv", "text": "💯 on target!", "created_at": "2026-05-10 21:17:17", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljtoy4uzk2n", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "He's a hot mess. I cannot believe that, once again, the CDC and NIH director knows less about a viral outbreak than I, a lowly behavioral scientist, do. This clown does not inspire confidence. Hantavirus won't kill us all, but bird flu might.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 22:47:25", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:33jio4po2g6jowei4lxedlwb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlkdz4tfw22y", "author_handle": "observingangel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Steph", "text": "It's what he wanted to have happen with COVID when it first arose. Of course the man who wanted to infect an entire nation would want another chance to do it again.", "created_at": "2026-05-11 03:39:24", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wsvuncumgqbgywier5z67lvp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljncctjgs27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljkfwtbc22a", "author_handle": "iamkaymichelle.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "K. Cook & Cats, Co.", "text": "It’s astonishing how #Trump lies 😳\n\nAddressing #Hantavirus concerns, his response (eerily similar to statements he made about #COVID) is, “It’s very much, we hope, under control.”\n\nYeah, well if it’s under control, you don’t have to hope. \n\nIt’s an axiomatic equivocation and lie 😵‍💫", "created_at": "2026-05-10 20:01:19", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wn5zywrieg75kjgahzytefr3/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljy4gobos2o", "author_handle": "kajo503.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "KaJo503", "text": "This was \"we hope, under control\" in 2020 (Trump's final year of his 1st term).", "created_at": "2026-05-11 00:06:42", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljkfwtbc22a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljkfwtbc22a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljygwdy2s2l", "author_handle": "iamkaymichelle.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "K. Cook & Cats, Co.", "text": "Which eventually devolved into (and I wish I were making this up), “Let’s stop testing for COVID. If we don’t test at all, the numbers will go down. Uh, to zero.”\n\nI think I’m quoting him precisely, but idek; who can remember his kaleidoscope of fuckups in perfect detail? \n\nToo many, too similar 😵‍💫", "created_at": "2026-05-11 00:12:24", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wn5zywrieg75kjgahzytefr3/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljy4gobos2o", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljkfwtbc22a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wn5zywrieg75kjgahzytefr3/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljzos35uc2e", "author_handle": "kajo503.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "KaJo503", "text": "You should be careful about posting GIFs like that, you might trigger a seizure for a vulnerable viewer (not me, TG).", "created_at": "2026-05-11 00:34:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljygwdy2s2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:svg6uktunzvrvsh6xmnalxp2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljkfwtbc22a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qq7uiyjzzcqdx4pqh4uwze4b/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljh3qqug4u2", "author_handle": "jik.federate.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Jonathan Kamens 86 47", "text": "Getting a #COVID booster today at #CVS. When I made the appointment their website claimed they had the Novavax vaccine at this location, but of course when I got here and checked in they said \"We don't have that anymore.\" 😡 mRNA it is then, I suppose. *sigh*", "created_at": "2026-05-10 19:02:03", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:whm7oe6jmfxzbux3qdczjzkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljgs57ubk2b", "author_handle": "christinahell.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Chris Tina", "text": "Dix semaines après le début du conflit, la crainte de manquer de masques, gants, cathéters ou encore seringues gagne du terrain. Comme lors de l’apparition du #Covid en 2020, les professionnels de santé redoutent à nouveau des mesures trop tardives.\nwww.leparisien.fr/economie/ave...", "created_at": "2026-05-10 18:56:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljcd3veok2j", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #epstein \n\nMatrix - the Starmer challenge - Catherine West goes for the Reich's", "created_at": "2026-05-10 17:36:52", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5b7vb7ffjzqllu5ibam5hdnv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mljbz4wmhs2b", "author_handle": "markaldrich.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mark Aldrich", "text": "My essay about my dad today on the 6th anniversary of his death from #Covid, published in @whowelost.bsky.social: \n\nwhowelost.org/read-their-s...", "created_at": "2026-05-10 17:30:57", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:oefjvue7twzpwbksh76bgbuc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlj5wpucv22o", "author_handle": "griffsy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Canada's strategy to reassure Canadians about #Hantavirus\n\n\"It's been radio silence from the #PublicHealthAgencyCanada\" - Linda Ward, CBC.\n\nBear in mind, #covid is circulating. Weil die Veranstalter*innen offenbar nicht darauf hinweisen, dass das Tragen von Masken toll wäre, habe ich die Liegenddemo in diesem Jahr boykottiert und werde es auch im nächsten Jahr so halten.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:55:41", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:q7ojezhclt3i5atvrxrinbjz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlivrighcs26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q7ojezhclt3i5atvrxrinbjz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliw6ws4oc26", "author_handle": "romamukherjee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Roma", "text": "Also 2024 gab es mE schon Bitten. Leider war der Post-Vac Block (auch optisch mit Westen) etc. in HH recht „auffallend“ und hatte natürlich null Masken. Finde ich sehr schade. Ich glaube das mit Bitten um Masken ist sehr heterogen. Ich finde es allerdings auch strange, dass es insgesamt nicht", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:59:28", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlivy6ujas22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q7ojezhclt3i5atvrxrinbjz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliw6xbyic26", "author_handle": "romamukherjee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Roma", "text": "mehr um Prävention geht. Auch außerhalb von Viren.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:59:28", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:q7ojezhclt3i5atvrxrinbjz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliw6ws4oc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliwkjbnms22", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Man soll ja auch nicht auf die fehlenden Masken hinweisen, denn es gehe ja um die Forderung nach mehr und besserer Forschung (berechtigt!) und nicht um Virenschutz. Ich kann das nicht nachvollziehen. ME/CFS oder ähnliche Symptomatiken sind sehr häufig die Folge von Vireninfektionen. Deshalb: 😷", "created_at": "2026-05-10 14:05:56", "like_count": 12, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:q7ojezhclt3i5atvrxrinbjz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliw6xbyic26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:kzfbh2ryzz37mmqifdfj42zs/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlix774n622g", "author_handle": "wunder2welt.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tina", "text": "Ja. bsky.app/profile/wund...", "created_at": "2026-05-10 14:17:31", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlj7hgq63k22", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Wow. Eine Steigerung.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 16:45:17", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:kzfbh2ryzz37mmqifdfj42zs/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlix774n622g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7mcfuqxkj24ludbhwql4rwcc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlklootxc22z", "author_handle": "bavastroeva.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "@bavastroeva.bsky.social", "text": "🤦🏻‍♀️", "created_at": "2026-05-11 05:56:45", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliveqi2422z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliugfjvxr2i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "Wer der öffentlichen Beratung «beiwohnen» möchte, wird von der UBI um vorgehende Anmeldung per E-Mail auf info(at)ubi.admin.ch gebeten.\n\n#Aufarbeitung\n#Infektionsverharmlosung #Impfdesinformation\n\n#SARSCoV2 #Covid #LongCovid\n#KinderdurchseuchungStoppen #Prävention\n#ImpfenSchützt #Kinderimpfung\n\n18/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "🧵 Update zur Beschwerde b.1038 gegen vier Publikationen von #SRF mit dem ehemaligen Impfchef im Zeitraum Nov.–Dez. 2024.\n\n#Aufarbeitung\n#Infektionsverharmlosung #Impfdesinformation\n\n#SARSCoV2 #Covid #LongCovid\n#KinderdurchseuchungStoppen #Prävention\n#ImpfenSchützt #Kinderimpfung\n\n1/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug5b7b22i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "Die öffentliche Beratung der Unabhängigen Beschwerdeinstanz für Radio und Fernsehen (#UBI) zu b.1038 findet am Donnerstag, 21. Mai 2026, um 10:15 Uhr im Kongresszentrum «Kreuz», Zeughausgasse 41, 3011 Bern, Saal «Bovet» (1. OG) statt.\n\nWie kam es zu einer Verzögerung um ein ganzes Jahr?\n\n2/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug5baac2i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "In b.1038 wird erläutert, dass die Veröffentlichung von vier problematischen SRF-Beiträgen (P1–P4) mit dem zurücktretenden Impfchef im Zeitraum Nov.–Dez. 2024 eine separate erste Beschwerde (b.1024) gegen P1 und P2 erforderlich machte. Nur so konnten die gesetzlichen Fristen eingehalten werden.\n\n3/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug5b7b22i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug6r7fc2i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "Die Beschwerde b.1038, die sich auf alle vier SRF-Beiträge bezieht, macht eine Verletzung des Sachgerechtigkeitsgebots, des Vielfaltsgebots und des Transparenzgebots nach Art. 4 Abs. 2 und 4 des Bundesgesetzes über Radio und Fernsehen #RTVG geltend.\n\n#Infektionsverharmlosung #Impfdesinformation\n\n4/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug5baac2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug6raek2i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "Das Verfahren b.1038 verzögerte sich, da die öffentliche Beratung der UBI zu b.1024 am 3.4.2025 mehr Fragen aufwarf, als sie beantwortete:\n\nMit Befremden nahmen die beiwohnenden Mitglieder von #ProtectTheKids zur Kenntnis, dass die UBI auf die konkreten Kritikpunkte nicht im Einzelnen einging.\n\n5/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug6r7fc2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug6rael2i", "author_handle": "protect-the-kids.ch", "author_display_name": "#ProtectTheKids (Schweiz)", "text": "So gab die UBI bei der öffentlichen Beratung zu b.1024 keinerlei Hinweise darauf, ob sie die Kritikpunkte und Richtigstellungen anhand der angegebenen Quellen überhaupt geprüft hatte und ob sie diese für zutreffend hielt.\n\nNach einer ersten Stellungnahme zu den Verfahrensmängeln bei b.1024 …\n\n6/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:27:52", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug6raek2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eh2shpnpbwws4tgxnsw5hz25/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliug3lx5s2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "*** Ontario Variant Update | May 10 ***\n\nIn Ontario, the NB.1.8.1.* \"Nimbus\" variant family shot to 74.7% of sequenced genomes from COVID tests while the XFG.* \"Stratus\" family dropped to 15.8% and the BA.3.2 \"Cicada\" family decreased below 10% again. 🧵1/\n\n#Ontario #COVID #Variant #Nimbus #Cicada", "created_at": "2026-05-10 12:14:08", "like_count": 20, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 7, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqchhqis2g", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "Ontario released another month of sequencing data by age and we continue to see high ratios of Cicada in children with another 51 BA.3.2.2.* sequences out of 617 new sequences ( www.publichealthontario.ca/-/media/docu... ). 2/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 12:14:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqchhri22g", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "With 126 Cicada sequences from 1,828 total, we see children still have the highest proportion which decreases after age 5-11 as age increases with significant drops from age 60+. 3/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 12:14:08", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqchhqis2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqchwi6k2g", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "Looking at specific variants, RC.6 Nimbus currently holds first place at 23.4%, RC.5 Nimbus in second at 17.1%, RY.1 Nimbus shooting up to 12.3%, PQ.2.1 Nimbus at 6.3%, XFG.1.1.2 Stratus is at 5%, SH.1 Nimbus at 4.5% and RT.2 Cicada at 3.8%. 4/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 12:14:08", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqchhri22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcihbc22g", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "As time goes, keeping track of the virus evolution is getting more complex. You can learn more about how variant naming works and mutations from this document ( docs.google.com/document/d/1... ). 5/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 12:14:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqchwi6k2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcjjou22g", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "The SanKey diagram shows you variant lineages and you can follow back where that variant came from. 6/", "created_at": "2026-05-10 12:14:08", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcihbc22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mliqcgttrs2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gntery6kjhwbqt3ubkep6huy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlineavvbk2u", "author_handle": "norwayskandinavien.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nori 🇳🇴", "text": "2/ #SaubereLuft #SARS #C19 #Flu #Grippe #H5N1 #Covid #CovidIsNotOver #covidisairborne \n#AirPurifier #Andenvirus #Hantavirus\n\nThe TaoTronics TT-AP001 air purifier can be easily operated on the go using a PD 12V trigger cable and a PD 12V power bank.", "created_at": "2026-05-10 11:21:26", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:raplquznydagbhkuubghhtfq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlivvdo5kk2z", "author_handle": "gedankenknaeul.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Gedankenknäul", "text": "Der läuft perfekt unterwegs. Nochmal danke für den Tipp!", "created_at": "2026-05-10 13:54:06", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gntery6kjhwbqt3ubkep6huy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlineavvbk2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gntery6kjhwbqt3ubkep6huy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlineavvbk2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gntery6kjhwbqt3ubkep6huy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlj562oays24", "author_handle": "norwayskandinavien.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nori 🇳🇴", "text": "Bitteschön👍🫶🍀💚", "created_at": "2026-05-10 16:04:16", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:raplquznydagbhkuubghhtfq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlivvdo5kk2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gntery6kjhwbqt3ubkep6huy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlineavvbk2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ux4u22cev46qruc2bcx6cstf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlikybt5n22j", "author_handle": "merusheel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Prof Meru Sheel", "text": "What is one of the most common symptom to #HantaVirus, #covid and #climate sensitive diseases like #dengue & #leptospirosis? It is fever.\n\n🕵🏽‍♀️ This week in Fiji, we launched sentinel surveillance for acute febrile illness (sudden onset fever) in the Nataisiri Division (Vunidawa & Nakorosule).", "created_at": "2026-05-10
