Looks amazing.", "created_at": "2026-05-09 11:03:23", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:4mm6iu5keyr5m5uiqzzy3chk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlerewl6yk2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:4mm6iu5keyr5m5uiqzzy3chk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlerewl6yk2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4mm6iu5keyr5m5uiqzzy3chk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlg4jxlars23", "author_handle": "royandtanyaorganic.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Roy&Tanya", "text": "why thankyou!", "created_at": "2026-05-09 11:15:01", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:tmyrhd4ioqztkqqot7e44bgr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlg3v776jc2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:4mm6iu5keyr5m5uiqzzy3chk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlerewl6yk2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ma5n7cq5oubn424zpxipovbg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mler7hajy22u", "author_handle": "marushka-t.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marushka-T", "text": "Viruses don't just go away because the calendar has flipped over into another month. They stick around as long as their human hosts allow and enable it.\n\n\"Understanding how often we're exposed is the first step to reducing it.\"\n\n#covid #flu #chronicillness #maskup", "created_at": "2026-05-08 22:20:03", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q3amcny6qbmzdvspo7oqrtod/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqwgqi722t", "author_handle": "gingerbillie.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ginger Billie", "text": "The bipap has been out of the house for a week and the tubing all thrown away and I’m STILL getting the plastic tubing phantom smells in my nose every now and then.\n\nWhat is #covid doing to our noses?\n\n#longcovid #mecfs #mcas #copd #pots", "created_at": "2026-05-08 22:14:34", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ongz6a4m5wpmvli7unrbzjn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqjbcdcmv2", "author_handle": "uselaine.mastodon.online.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "U.S. Elaine", "text": "Gradually going through more boxes and bags, and came across these relics. Reminds me that in 2020, medical workers were DYING, and we were advised to let the scarce high-filtration PPE like N95 masks go to health facilities. Until expert tests in Virginia […] \n\n[Original post on mastodon.online]", "created_at": "2026-05-08 22:07:18", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3zuxkujylj7bf5dzuaaacnzt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqyulzld62", "author_handle": "sarae.ecoevo.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Sara", "text": "@USelaine I really don't like the framing that people who wore cloth masks did nothing\n\nthey reduced transmission coming from infected people who wore them\n\nand that's important, too", "created_at": "2026-05-08 22:16:03", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ongz6a4m5wpmvli7unrbzjn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqjbcdcmv2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ongz6a4m5wpmvli7unrbzjn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqjbcdcmv2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ongz6a4m5wpmvli7unrbzjn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleu546hwzo2", "author_handle": "uselaine.mastodon.online.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "U.S. Elaine", "text": "@sarae\nWell, we all wore them that first year. And I agree that as a barrier to the reach of exhaled air, between two people wearing them, would have helped some.\n\nMy point here is we experienced a long period of ignorance about this new virus, while scientists got to work, and we all did what […]", "created_at": "2026-05-08 23:12:01", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:3zuxkujylj7bf5dzuaaacnzt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqyulzld62", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ongz6a4m5wpmvli7unrbzjn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleqjbcdcmv2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:saskmpevgpx3xdrviwi2ncvn/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleojgqlf22i", "author_handle": "maskblocwr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mask Bloc Waterloo Region", "text": "Indicates generally low respiratory infection levels, with #flu B the most prevalent, #Covid next.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 21:31:31", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleohcpos327", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "'This Is Not Going to Be the Next COVID'\n->The Atlantic | More on \"Hantavirus cruise ship outbreak response\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid", "created_at": "2026-05-08 21:30:20", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleoe235vs2l", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "“Do not prioritize preventing even mild fear. Prioritize preventing disease.” #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-08 21:28:30", "like_count": 24, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:moo6wdbapndqopkijevcn5wu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlen5vwj722n", "author_handle": "generayburn.com", "author_display_name": "gene rayburn", "text": "#StarWars and #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-08 21:07:09", "like_count": 12, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhj5vds2f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nAnd, not known for her epistemic humility, once again Dr. Angela Rasmussen leads the charge - \n\n\"Since I am an actual virologist who specializes in emerging zoonotic RNA viruses like hantaviruses & I DGAF about being #COVID famous again, I decided to add some clarity to a public discussion -", "created_at": "2026-05-08 20:36:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhjedfk2f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n...that is becoming hyperbolic, unnecessarily contentious, & frankly, extremely stupid in some cases\":\n\nopen.substack.com/pub/rasmusse...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 20:36:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhj5vds2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhj5vds2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhk74t22f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nMay Dr. Rasmussen be proved right, this time🤞", "created_at": "2026-05-08 20:36:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhjedfk2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhj5vds2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlehxeseus2x", "author_handle": "themis2023.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "Jamais je n'oublierai que tant d'experts et d'autorités auront menti sur la pandémie de #Covid en cours, SAUF pour rassurer sur l' #hantavirus, où là tout à coup ils rappellent au public la transmission aérosole, les cas asymptomatiques, la contagiosité de SarsCov2. \nMais au passé bien sûr.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 19:34:06", "like_count": 44, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 13, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dlpveslviuiykanhhw5jpw2s/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlefx6fqok2h", "author_handle": "latamreporter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Sandra Weiss", "text": "Lo vimos con #Covid, lo volvemos a ver ahora con #Hantavirus. Los populistas son un peligro para la salud mundial: #Argentina critica duramente a la OMS ante el brote de hantavirus: \"Vuelve a anteponer la política a la evidencia\" www.elmundo.es/ciencia-y-sa...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:58:09", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dlpveslviuiykanhhw5jpw2s/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlefwsrx7s2h", "author_handle": "latamreporter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Sandra Weiss", "text": "Lo vimos con #Covid, lo volvemos a ver ahora con #Hantavirus. Los populistas son un peligro para la salud mundial: #Argentina critica duramente a la OMS ante el brote de hantavirus: \"Vuelve a anteponer la política a la evidencia\" www.elmundo.es/ciencia-y-sa...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:57:58", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2f63x4gmu27fqskda3ourxze/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlefrqmjp225", "author_handle": "mikemichaelmikee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Fecal Matters", "text": "Trump thought ingesting bleach would help people with Covid. #Trump #Covid #Moron", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:55:06", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgqqus2f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nAs usual, #PublicHealth, aided by #MSM, is spending more energy controlling the narrative than controlling actual infections. \n\nAs usual, (non-existent) \"public panic\" is receiving more attention than the prospect of another pandemic (on top of the #COVID pandemic, that PH has yet to control) -", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:39:50", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgrefs2f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\n* So when will the public panic?\n\nOnly IF asked to wear masks, get vaccinated, serve the greater good, help others, shield the even more vulnerable, & share their hoard of toilet paper. \n\nUntil then, anxiety levels for most will remain low, unneedful of government intervention.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:39:50", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgqqus2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgqqus2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlev4tmuls2p", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "💯", "created_at": "2026-05-08 23:29:47", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgrefs2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgqqus2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5kxzdrelq4l2bsmz7ra6beif/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlef4wcvpc26", "author_handle": "bee-d.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Oh so true... its still at the THEM and US phase, only those on the boat will get it.... oh dear others disembarked a fortnight ago, WHICH countries involved. = no idea!! so carry on as usual until its 'ours'", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:43:28", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgrefs2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleewgqqus2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:k6fbzahxqtzsyiu2hwgwj5tt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleddhls2x2e", "author_handle": "bilaltariq01.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bilal Tariq", "text": "AI Trends 2026: A Mid-Year Reading From the Engine Room https://cstu.io/cf6ac0 #covid #marketing #techno", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:11:19", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nSouth Africa is particularly innoculated against #COVID awareness: Apartheid sanctions instilled a rugged individualism on a par with the North American version. The country also has a robust wellness industry, fed by the \"health\" books & anti-vax beliefs of #TimNoakes.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrkw22m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\ne.g. show me someone on Noakes' Banting Diet & I'll show you an anti-vaxxer, who subscribes to \"alternative\" medicine. And all the other misinformation that accompanies this. \n\nOne day, someone will write a book about this nonsense. \n\n@kerrycullinan.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecycoes22m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nIt doesn't help that another charlatan, Mary-Ann Shearer, helped raise a generation of young South Africans -\n\nbenbellabooks.com/authors/shea...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrkw22m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecydx4is2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nThis book was particular damaging - \n\nwww.amazon.ca/Healthy-Kids...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecycoes22m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mledrovyac2i", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nIf you grew up in this dubious \"alternate health\" ecosystem, it could take a while for the scales to fall off:\n\nMy first baby, born in 🇿🇦 Durban in 1999, was an \"all natural\" (no meds) home-birth. \n\nSuffice it to say, my 2nd son, also 4kgs, was born in hospital in 🇨🇦 #Yellowknife, NWT.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:19:17", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecydx4is2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mledrp5y3s2i", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\n* Despite a wobbly start with a home-birth, both my sons were from the get-go, vaccinated to the max (&continue to be so in early adulthood). \n\nBecause, even then, I understood that #VaccinesCauseAdulthoods.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:19:17", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mledrovyac2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nThanks to pulmonologist, ICU physician, & #LongCOVID expert, #Dr.WesEly - my parents in 🇿🇦 South Africa (both of whom are in their 80s) finally grasp the enormity of #COVID. \n\nIt only took 6+ years, owing to egregious public health messaging - \n\nwww.facebook.com/share/v/1Dfz...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vpxuz45gsfw4to3lmje4o75r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlo6j6rbxc2d", "author_handle": "skepticblacksheep.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "The Blacksheep", "text": "It’s so frustrating that we’re unable to get COVID vaccines here so that we’re able to get them with our flu shots.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 16:11:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlo7rddu4c2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "Yes, it's worrying how egregiously under-vaccinated most South Africans are, for COVID. It's not perfect but at least the vaccine will keep most people from dying, getting severe acute-COVID, as well as slightly reduce the risk of developing Long COVID.", "created_at": "2026-05-12 16:34:07", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:vpxuz45gsfw4to3lmje4o75r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlo6j6rbxc2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nSouth Africa is particularly innoculated against #COVID awareness: Apartheid sanctions instilled a rugged individualism on a par with the North American version. The country also has a robust wellness industry, fed by the \"health\" books & anti-vax beliefs of #TimNoakes.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrkw22m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\ne.g. show me someone on Noakes' Banting Diet & I'll show you an anti-vaxxer, who subscribes to \"alternative\" medicine. And all the other misinformation that accompanies this. \n\nOne day, someone will write a book about this nonsense. \n\n@kerrycullinan.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrhyc2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecycoes22m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nIt doesn't help that another charlatan, Mary-Ann Shearer, helped raise a generation of young South Africans -\n\nbenbellabooks.com/authors/shea...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybrkw22m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecydx4is2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nThis book was particular damaging - \n\nwww.amazon.ca/Healthy-Kids...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:05:08", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecycoes22m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mledrovyac2i", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nIf you grew up in this dubious \"alternate health\" ecosystem, it could take a while for the scales to fall off:\n\nMy first baby, born in 🇿🇦 Durban in 1999, was an \"all natural\" (no meds) home-birth. \n\nSuffice it to say, my 2nd son, also 4kgs, was born in hospital in 🇨🇦 #Yellowknife, NWT.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 18:19:17", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecydx4is2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlecybqrjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ycui62u5ewot6llahssydcjp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mleben73ns23", "author_handle": "gaspingenemyofgod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#Moronavirus #COVID #TrumpCOVID #MillionDead #Bleach #NeverForget", "created_at": "2026-05-08 17:36:11", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d3evu3t5hnasgcw6abvpyrpz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4ziilcc2t", "author_handle": "eetuhbutt.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Eet Uh But Yo", "text": "The #Hantavirus is NOT like #COVID\n\nSybau 🙄\n\n1st, it's not airborne. \n2nd, it's not new. \n\nYes they've identified the strain... Andesvirus (ANDV)\nIt's the only strain of hantavirus that can spread person to person.\n\nIt comes from not cleaning up mouse shit properly.\nIt's less contagious than Mono 🤷", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:18:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "2) La période durant laquelle on est contagieux\n\nC’est LA question qui alimente les discussions scientifiques. Car si le virus du #Covid a été si dur à contenir, c’est notamment car les personnes infectées pouvaient le transmettre avant même d’avoir des symptômes.\n\n5/10", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:14:11", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4s6iiul2b", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "S’agissant de l’hantavirus des Andes, le consensus scientifique est le suivant : une personne contaminée est contagieuse à partir du moment où elle commence à se sentir mal.\n\nPlus précisément, \"la période de transmission virale la plus à risque est la phase prodromique\".\n\n6/10", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:14:24", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4sjxhl42h", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "Cette phase correspond à celle durant laquelle les signes avant-coureurs, bénins et dont on se méfie peu, apparaissent.\n\nMais nos connaissances sur cet hantavirus, basées notamment sur un cluster de 34 malades (dont 11 décès) en Argentine en 2018/2019, sont encore limitées.\n\n7/10", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:14:29", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4s6iiul2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4sosyye2u", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "\"Il y a encore énormément de choses à découvrir\" et cet épisode pourrait nous éclairer, de même pour les modes de transmission interhumaine.\n\nScientifiques s’accordent aujourd'hui à parler de \"contacts rapprochés\", et non par simple aérosol dans l’air comme pour le Covid.\n\n8/10", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:14:34", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4sjxhl42h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4stmwtu2p", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "3) Le sort des passagers de la croisière\n\nLe bateau doit arriver aux Canaries dimanche ou lundi, puis les passagers seront rapatriés.\n\nLes 5 Français vont rentrer en avion spécial puis seront examinés, testés et autorisés à rentrer sous surveillance (sauf si symptômes).\n\n9/10", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:14:39", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4sosyye2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4szgjsh2z", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "Mais ils \"ne pourront malheureusement pas avoir une vie normale pendant six semaines\" : \"Il y aura un isolement\", peut-être avec arrêt de travail si nécessaire.\n\nUne chose est sûre : \"Les laisser tranquilles ne serait pas raisonnable.\"\n\nArticle 👇🏻\n\n10/10", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:14:45", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4stmwtu2p", "root_uri": "author_display_name": "", "text": "Parmi les cas en Argentine il y aurait des adolescents (réf C dans l’air). Pas très rassurant.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 16:20:57", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4sjxhl42h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mle4rykb2a2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qvw6iezecm6rhcscmj7ehqlf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mldz63dpns2a", "author_handle": "powerfromspace1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "PKs Powerfromspace1 🚀 Twitter ‘X’ refugee thank you 'Elon' 🙄", "text": "I’m getting a strong sense of #COVID déjà vu.\n\nI’m sure they learned from the last one and are fully prepared this time.\n\nAs for the U.S.? I’m not worried — RFK Jr. has made sure those of us trapped here are absolutely not prepared.\n\nSo, f’ it.", "created_at": "2026-05-08 15:09:21", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tmv6faycgg6alkt5hboctxod/app.bsky.feed.post/3mldwhk56mk2q", "author_handle": "hunphreysdad.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "HumphsDad", "text": "You know how we had pithy slogans aimed at promoting public health advice for #Covid?\n\nI've thought of one for #Hantavirus.\n\nHere goes...\n\n\"This thing here is called a bucket,\nAnd if you don't want to kick it,\nEvery time you see a rat,\nDon't pick it up & lick it.\"\n\nWhaddya reckon?", "created_at": "2026-05-08 14:20:59", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, Hank Schiffers", "text": "Results: \n#CSF prevalence was significantly higher in the #COVID (+) UA-NCA group than in the COVID (–) UA-NCA group (18.9% vs. 5.3%, p = 0.003).", "created_at": "2026-05-08 12:38:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mldqpo6zfc2m", "author_handle": "leanhealth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. med. Hank Schiffers", "text": "Individual #CTFC values for the #LAD, #LCX, and #RCA were also significantly higher in the COVID (+) UA-NCA group compared to the COVID (–) UA-NCA group (26.1 ± 4.3 vs. 22.4 ± 2.6 [p = 0.01], 24.3 ± 4.5 vs. 21.7 ± 2.4 [p < 0.001], and 24.3 ± 4.5 vs. 21.4 ± 2.5 [p < 0.001], respectively).", "created_at": "2026-05-08 12:38:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mldqpo6vic2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mldqpo6vic2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mldqpo75cc2m", "author_handle": "leanhealth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. med. #seattle and environs) #COVID #COVID19 #wastewater toots.\n\nA quick reminder that this King County respiratory disease data comes from Washington State, not the […] \n\n[Original post on infosec.exchange]", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:09:39", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvuyjyggv2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "The Brightwater sewage treatment plant (BWT) in Woodinville 7DRA numbers had this out-of-nowhere spike on 4/27, and then improved somewhat on 4/29. The last 7DRA calculation was made on 4/29.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:09:40", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvs2xrfvt2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvs2xrfvt2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvx4owpe22", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "The last of the three King County sites is King County South (KCS) treatment plant, and its Sars-CoV-2 7DRA numbers are low. The last 7DRA calculation was made on 4/29.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:09:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvuyjyggv2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvs2xrfvt2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2pqzoc27", "author_handle": "seattlebryn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bryn Nelson", "text": "Before becoming HHS Secretary, RFK Jr. blasted the mRNA-based #COVID vaccine in 2021 as “the deadliest vaccine ever made,” citing rare cases of myocarditis in young men. In fact, the risk of myocarditis is 7x *higher* in people infected with COVID. 🧪 4/n pennstatehealthnews.org/2022/09/covi...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2r7qs227", "author_handle": "seattlebryn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bryn Nelson", "text": "More recent effectiveness & safety data also contradict RFK Jr.'s claims. In fact, the CDC & the FDA recently blocked publication of 2 studies contradicting his stance. The first suggests the vaccines effectively protect against ED visits & hospitalizations. 🧪 5/n\nwww.cidrap.umn.edu/covid-19/cdc...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2pqzoc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2pqzoc27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2sxxmk27", "author_handle": "seattlebryn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bryn Nelson", "text": "Here’s the second recent study. The FDA blocked a publication showing that COVID and shingles vaccines are safe, with rare side effects (fascinating emerging data, btw, shows that shingles vaccines may also reduce the risk of dementia). 🧪 6/n\nwww.reuters.com/legal/litiga...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2r7qs227", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2pqzoc27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2uoetc27", "author_handle": "seattlebryn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bryn Nelson", "text": "HHS has likewise required new mRNA-based flu vaccines to jump over significant hurdles, reflecting the department's unprecedented position. Amid promising vaccine data from Moderna, the FDA initially refused to consider the vaccine before reversing course. 🧪 7/n \nwww.cidrap.umn.edu/influenza-va...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2sxxmk27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2pqzoc27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2vo7f227", "author_handle": "seattlebryn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bryn Nelson", "text": "This shifting position is especially relevant given new data from a Phase 3 trial in adults ages 50 & older, in which Moderna reported that its mRNA flu vaccine was 27% more effective than existing alternatives- again, this is the opposite of RFK Jr.'s claims. 🧪 8/n\nwww.nbcnews.com/health/healt...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2uoetc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2pqzoc27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2x6jbs27", "author_handle": "seattlebryn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bryn Nelson", "text": "In a forum sponsored by @healthjournalism.org last fall, two former CDC officials said the current admin’s anti-mRNA stance was delivering a “significant blow” to disease preparedness & that the US is turning its back on successes like Operation Warp Speed (championed by President Trump). 🧪 9/n", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e6lawq4xuwggyypxomnqguhr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbv2vo7f227", "root_uri": fail to protect effectively against upper respiratory infections like #COVID and #flu.” Peer-reviewed data suggest otherwise. 🧪 3/n", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:49:00", "like_count": 0, 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "You Do You—Because That Worked So Well the First Time #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:09:17", "like_count": 40, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvf55t2223", "author_handle": "embers1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Xabier Ostale", "text": "Dr Simon, the same one that dropped all measures of prevention for covid in Spain, is now saying that those without symptoms shouldn't quarantine. He's back in full force now. No precautionary principle is his moto.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 18:56:24", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2cqz5c22w", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "This is shocking to us Covid-safe people but also not. What do we preach against almost everyday? People. Did. Not. Learn. So from the governmental angle at least, I think we have to assume it’s intentional at this point.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:24:33", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvf55t2223", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2nem7f22h", "author_handle": "embers1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Xabier Ostale", "text": "I think they hammer home so much that we have to keep calm because they don't want to disturb tourism and markets, regardless of the magnitude of the hazard.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:30:29", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2cqz5c22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2qcefak2h", "author_handle": "embers1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Xabier Ostale", "text": "So, it's intentional in the way that they are doing it deliberately - not to infect people and let a pandemic rip in order to kill many - but to not disturb the markets, which is a huge mistake.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:32:07", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2nem7f22h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc3brhjts2w", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "Since I can barely get people to believe basic terrible truths, I try to not spread conspiracy theories. BUT with climate change-driven potential mass food shortages coming, they may want a few less billion hungry mouths… But yes, the individual bureaucrat would likely be unaware of such a plot", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:41:53", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2qcefak2h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wcroq5hg3bvolnlpmblalap7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvobeips2g", "author_handle": "cozamarsh.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marcia Cohen Zakai", "text": "He's in sync with WHO. They are leaving it up to individual countries to decide how to interpret their general recommendation to actively monitor contacts, i.e. quarantine is optional.\nbsky.app/profile/coza...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 19:01:31", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvf55t2223", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2dl5ylk2w", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "JC", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:25:00", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wcroq5hg3bvolnlpmblalap7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvobeips2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbzbhvw7c2m", "author_handle": "embers1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Xabier Ostale", "text": "Also tracing only symptomatic cases is a huge mistake, they start being infectious days before the onset of symptoms. This is a horror movie in the making.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:05:56", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wcroq5hg3bvolnlpmblalap7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbvobeips2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2h2fczk2w", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "We know the fact that somewhere around 40-50% of COVID cases are transmitted asymptomatically is completely ignored by governments & public health. So this approach is now business as usual.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 20:26:56", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ehoh7ngumicigxp2lg2bysey/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbzbhvw7c2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wcroq5hg3bvolnlpmblalap7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlciug3ua22b", "author_handle": "cozamarsh.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marcia Cohen Zakai", "text": "and how easy is it to pinpoint the precise onset of any non-specific symptoms?", "created_at": "2026-05-08 00:44:57", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc2h2fczk2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbsqvesl22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ypztr5ljklmttfsoba4fgx2f/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbqtv2huc2u", "author_handle": "rachelmaria55.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rachel Maria😎🐸🥥🌴🇺🇸", "text": "Is #Hantavirus gonna turn into another #Covid ? \n🦠😷💉", "created_at": "2026-05-07 17:35:17", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:itcjt5iogtepkxhlm7mw2gk6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbplhnohc2x", "author_handle": "flipturns.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Flipturns 🏊‍♀️ 📷 🦋", "text": "#Hantavirus now in 5 countries... ugh. We might’ve learned something from that but didn’t—because everyone was in such a mad rush to “move past the pandemic,” before we had clean indoor air & improved vaccines (which we still don’t have). #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-07 16:52:06", "like_count": 21, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbohsekoc2n", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "As well as treatments for Long Covid of course", "created_at": "2026-05-07 16:52:38", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbogsxgmc2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbogsxgmc2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4j2ebmxhh447ik6wujqr5h3c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbmqjd7nk24", "author_handle": "europeans.today", "author_display_name": "𝐄𝐮𝐫𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐬 𝐓𝐎𝐃𝐀𝐘 🌐", "text": "A #Hantavirus outbreak has revived an old #COVID -era misinformation pattern: #Ivermectin being promoted as a supposed cure without evidence.\n\nThe issue is bigger than one false claim. It shows how outbreak uncertainty creates space for recycled medical myths.\n\nwww.europeans.today/2026/05/07/i...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 16:21:46", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbk2hf5hs2i", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "A science journalist who refers to the #COVID pandemic in the past tense, & who disparages the COVID-conscious community as \"Covid Truthers\" - all while banging on about misinformation - tells you not to worry. \n\nReply: We're not worried, we wear masks ( #N95s) & #CleanTheAir. \n\nNot rocket science 🚀", "created_at": "2026-05-07 15:33:36", "like_count": 22, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlekrhismk2f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nSame journalist 👇\n\n\"Headlines stoking fear of a wider outbreak and images of several passengers being taken off the boat under extreme precautions may have created a false sense of danger\":\n\nwww.science.org/content/arti...", "created_at": "2026-05-08 20:24:27", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbk2hf5hs2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbk2hf5hs2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhj5vds2f", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nMay Dr. Rasmussen be proved right, this time🤞", "created_at": "2026-05-08 20:36:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlelhjedfk2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbk2hf5hs2i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eeqhdll6l2q7s575c6h2xxlg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbjzukr422e", "author_handle": "libertyjustice.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Liberty and Justice for All", "text": "Censorship, yes, but it goes well beyond that. \n\nNot keeping healthcare professionals and individual citizens aware of valid information is down right dangerous and irresponsible. be handled properly. But if you are having #Covid flashbacks, put those worries to rest. The risk here is to people on the ship & their close contacts. www.statnews.com/2026/05/07/h...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 12:38:06", "like_count": 184, "reply_count": 8, "repost_count": 71, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:v6pd76jbr3qjj6clrp577yvb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbaqmqbs2x", "author_handle": "rose-8668.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rose", "text": "", "created_at": "2026-05-07 12:56:05", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:htys3cado3vfdvtceyhoe2no/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbdd3esk2d", "author_handle": "mamalaz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "MamaLaz", "text": "Yup\n\nnltimes.nl/2026/05/07/k...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 12:57:31", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:v6pd76jbr3qjj6clrp577yvb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbaqmqbs2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u5tx7b4hcowgv3urnzj4xq7z/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbifkoqc2d", "author_handle": "adriana1o5.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "and those who disembarked before it was diagnosed. So 🤷‍♀️ there are concerns this could go sideways", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:00:18", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tb3boul2btujimx3sckafem4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbdwglqnk2m", "author_handle": "schountz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tony Schountz", "text": "This sentence, \"Hantavirus infections, though rare, cause serious disease and have a high fatality rate\" to \"New World hantavirus infections, though rare, cause serious disease and have a high fatality rate.\" There are thousands of hantavirus cases each year in the Old World, with IFR of ~2%-15%.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:43:57", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pbuli4mje6yatylfysscksoq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbfayxwrk2o", "author_handle": "kalo.bsky.social", "author_display_name": " Kalo_127.0.0.1 🇺🇦", "text": "Having Covid flash backs bc people left the ship, didn’t isolate, flew in different parts of the world", "created_at": "2026-05-07 14:07:45", "like_count": 16, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:p7tvusgvzdmwrsrqbqr7ugyw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbblyfmfc2j", "author_handle": "dlmetcalf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "David Metcalf", "text": "'Close contacts' like potentially anyone who shared a flight with a positive case. Good luck to whoever is trying to track them down globally and trying to enforce symptom surveillance.\n\nbsky.app/profile/ther...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:02:19", "like_count": 15, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbp3bng22y", "author_handle": "helenbranswell.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Helen Branswell 🇨🇦", "text": "Please read this short article on a woman from Delaware who was infected with Andes virus in 2018. 51 of her contacts were followed — including people who sat near her on planes. None developed #hantavirus.\npmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC...", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:04:05", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 4, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:p7tvusgvzdmwrsrqbqr7ugyw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbblyfmfc2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tb3boul2btujimx3sckafem4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbealsszc2m", "author_handle": "schountz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tony Schountz", "text": "There are many variants of ANDV that differ in their biology. Perhaps the cruise ship variant is efficient at respiratory shedding and transmission, whereas the one from the Delaware person was not. We simply do not know enough about hantaviruses.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:49:38", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbp3bng22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:p7tvusgvzdmwrsrqbqr7ugyw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbccpkdys2p", "author_handle": "dlmetcalf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "David Metcalf", "text": "It wouldn't tell us much. Most COVID cases infect either very few or no other people too, while a minority infect large numbers. Plus a lot more people were willing to listen to public health advice or comply with orders in 2018 than in 2026.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:15:01", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbp3bng22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:o3v73zubpbjugmedkjntcnan/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbdvkplt22z", "author_handle": "lonewraith28.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Fiona R", "text": "Widespread immune dysfunction from repeat covid infections could come into play making it much more spreadable.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 13:43:28", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbp3bng22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:c5hcz5fossx7f5cjda4cxt7s/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbj3zop5s2f", "author_handle": "carrieg.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Carrie Gillon", "text": "Ok but we already have a flight attendant in hospital with it - maybe it’ll be the only case but we can’t know that", "created_at": "2026-05-07 15:16:33", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbbp3bng22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:e255d33k7c3fyw2enrlofubl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbaanacf22y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:joagwcqx3gtfioygzufbcglo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlc3wykgjc2a", "author_handle": "otrosdias.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Otrosdías", "text": "Well, exactly, the previous experience is of little comfort to the flight attendant in hospital. Spencer", "text": "@mvankerkhove.bsky.social, when you confidently say of #Hantavirus, \"This is not the next #Covid\" - may we remind you that if you treat it the same way you treated COVID (with denial, misinformation, & trademark @who.int overconfidence), then you increase the chance that it could be the next COVID.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 06:18:30", "like_count": 24, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xa7tyosksfmapkay5rfyqrrt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlalfxfdvc22", "author_handle": "mistym.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Misty M ⛰🌻🌳🌺🦋🐝😷", "text": "I genuinely don’t trust the minimising WHO, Gov officials or any media on this Tania. \n\nSo my family will treat the H2H Variant like C19 until proven otherwise.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 06:25:15", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlakzuzn7s2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlakzuzn7s2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlbft4tzp22t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. (And this was before RFK Jr.!) #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-06 21:27:58", "like_count": 13, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml7myjni2c2w", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Auf Mastodon melden mehrere Teilnehmer*innen des Wikimedia Hackathon 2026 (1.-3.5. in Mailand) eine SARS-CoV-2-Infektion.\n\nWas lernen wir? Auch wenn die COVID-Inzidenz gerade überall so \"niedrig\" ist, sollte man sich bei diesem hochinfektiösen Virus niemals sicher fühlen. 😷\n\n#COVID #CovidIsNotOver", "created_at": "2026-05-06 21:20:51", "like_count": 78, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 25, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2vahc3imtnq4kqah4bck7z4u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlakx4eeas2l", "author_handle": "blomechristine.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. Blome aka Dr. Strange", "text": "Das ist dann schon ziemliches Pech, dass bei 70(?) Einerseits Endemie- überall- andererseits nirgendwo?", "created_at": "2026-05-07 07:05:20", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlanbsoxhs2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml7myjni2c2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qmkwtrrkcbx5spoxtrpna62e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlanyd6htk2s", "author_handle": "francismalevil.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "francis", "text": "kennst du @rv-enigma.bsky.social ? er (und andere) versorgen uns ja mit den daten, die verfügbar sind bzw. werten sie aus und ja, die zahlen sind im moment wirklich gut. auch in sm gibt es kaum \"ich hab corona - schon wieder 🥲 - posts\".\nob wirklich 1 v 7000 oder 1 von 5329 ist dabei fast egal", "created_at": "2026-05-07 07:11:18", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bmlmmnuknrjau7dxb2akhdb4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlannmhv6c2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml7myjni2c2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlanebddv22w", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Eine infizierte Person reicht bei diesem Virus aus.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 07:00:05", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2vahc3imtnq4kqah4bck7z4u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlakx4eeas2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml7myjni2c2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2vahc3imtnq4kqah4bck7z4u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlardfyhis2m", "author_handle": "blomechristine.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. Blome aka Dr. Strange", "text": "Das ist klar und das ist bei jedem Virus so.\nJede*r muss (und m.E. darf in den meisten Situationen) selbst entscheiden, wie gering das Risiko sein muss, um mal etwas locker zu lassen.", "created_at": "2026-05-07 08:11:11", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlanebddv22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml7myjni2c2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q7ojezhclt3i5atvrxrinbjz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlasrwj2o22g", "author_handle": "romamukherjee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Roma", "text": "Das ist exakt die Argumentation von denen, die sich früher schon gegen Masken und Luftfilter ausgesprochen haben. Eigenverantwortung. Spencer", "text": "14/\n...& erasing awareness of a virus for which EVERYONE is at risk (with some at even greater risk then others); & which has a post-acute phase, #LongCOVID, which still has NO CURE, & scant treatment or support. \n\nMake this make sense.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inbukyk2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb56x22m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nAlso, here we go again, likening #COVID to #Flu -\n\n▶️ despite the fact that we know that COVID is not seasonal like flu (which is why, for flu, we only need one vaccination per year, in winter);\n▶️ & despite the fact that we know that while flu is really bad, #COVID can be so much worse;", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb522s2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\n▶️ & despite the fact that it's debatable whether or not COVID is yet \"endemic\": but just ask anyone who has lived in an endemic malaria area just how easy that is (it isn't).", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb53zc2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nThis is especially absurd, given that we know #COVID infections -\n\n▶️ increase our risk of developing immune dysregulation, long term organ harm, & #LongCOVID;\n▶️ & that vaccination slightly reduces our chance of developing #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nAlso, here we go again, likening #COVID to #Flu -\n\n▶️ despite the fact that we know that COVID is not seasonal like flu (which is why, for flu, we only need one vaccination per year, in winter);\n▶️ & despite the fact that we know that while flu is really bad, #COVID can be so much worse;", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb522s2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\n▶️ & despite the fact that it's debatable whether or not COVID is yet \"endemic\": but just ask anyone who has lived in an endemic malaria area just how easy that is (it isn't).", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb53zc2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\nIt's odd how much, in the Before Times, governments fretted about & invested in pandemic preparedness, & then ignored & denied an entire pandemic of an injurious #AirborneVirus, in plain sight for 6 years, all because votes...", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb522s2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb55xs2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "10/\nIt's odd how governments focused more on controlling the narrative of a pandemic, rather than actual infections.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb53zc2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb56x22m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "11/\nTo do this, governments incrementally removed - \n\n▶️ access to COVID PCR tests;\n▶️ mask mandates;\n▶️ remote work options;\n▶️ & now access to #COVID vaccines.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb55xs2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nSo the bad news, #Yukoners, is that if you are under 65 & healthy you are NOT eligible for a #COVID vaccine this spring ❎\n\nThe good news?\n\nIf you keep getting infected with #COVID - after enough #Reinfections, you will almost certainly be eligible for next year's spring #COVID booster/vaccine ✅", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v7nk2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nWhy? \n\nBecause by next year, you have a high chance of being immunocompromised ✅\n\nAnd as for aging, while you might still be 20 not 65+, your vascular system could be a bit older ✅\n\nwww.sciencedaily.com/releases/202...", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4ods2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\n❗️Only getting vaccinated after an infection has made you immunocompromised, makes about as much sense as people only wearing masks after they get sick. \n\nWhich, because of egregious #PublicHealth messaging, happens all the time.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v7nk2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nThis is especially absurd, given that we know #COVID infections -\n\n▶️ increase our risk of developing immune dysregulation, long term organ harm, & #LongCOVID;\n▶️ & that vaccination slightly reduces our chance of developing #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4ods2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nAlso, here we go again, likening #COVID to #Flu -\n\n▶️ despite the fact that we know that COVID is not seasonal like flu (which is why, for flu, we only need one vaccination per year, in winter);\n▶️ & despite the fact that we know that while flu is really bad, #COVID can be so much worse;", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4qcc2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb522s2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\n▶️ & despite the fact that it's debatable whether or not COVID is yet \"endemic\": but just ask anyone who has lived in an endemic malaria area just how easy that is (it isn't).", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4u7c2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ae6puiodts5uyr3brurmczon/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml6tf5xstc26", "author_handle": "beegee444.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "I see it all the time. People wearing inferior baggy blue surgical masks AFTER getting infected and showing symptoms.🤦", "created_at": "2026-05-06 13:42:38", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5inb4ods2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v4ps2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7uhac2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nA nurse at the Vaccine clinic in #Whitehorse just informed a young person that she is not eligible for a spring #COVID booster/vaccination. \n\nRead that again. \n\nShe was denied a vaccine in an #OngoingPandemic with no #NPIs in place. Anywhere.", "created_at": "2026-05-06 00:57:40", "like_count": 13, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5in7v3qk2m", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nAccording to the clinic nurse -\n\n\"Only 65 + and immunocompromised folks will be able to get Covid shot 2 per calendar. Thanks for doing the math @jama.com", "created_at": "2026-05-05 21:34:37", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vlusg2skpcg3tsvnyb3tfzbq/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml543fbf3k2d", "author_handle": "ivory1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "A cruise with the Damned and X? Amazing! \n\nGoing on a cruise ship? Not so amazing. 😬 \n\n#hantavirus #norovirus #Covid", "created_at": "2026-05-05 21:12:54", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml542byru224", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "#SARSCoV2 wasn't a Chinese lab leak and #COVID didn't come from the Wuhan market.\n\nThe virus was already spreading in Italy and France in October 2019!\n\nIt was likely a cat who ate a fruit bat 🦇\n\nCats catch prey and get sick. Even if you feed them. Then they infect you with zoonotic viruses!\n#medsky", "created_at": "2026-05-05 21:12:21", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml546o6yh224", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "Research Article\n\nOutdoor roaming of owned cats elevates risk of zoonotic pathogen exposure: A global synthesis\n\nAmy G. Wilson, Scott Wilson, Peter P. Marra, David R. Lapen\n\njournals.plos.org/plospathogen...\n\n#medsky\n#cats\n#virus\n#bacteria\n#plague", "created_at": "2026-05-05 21:14:46", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml542byru224", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml542byru224"} {"uri": offer clues to how deadly viruses spread\n\nResearchers filmed 10 species eating or scavenging bats at known Marburg-virus hotspot — and caught hundreds of humans visiting.\n\nWhen researchers in -- a Bill's Bible Basics article \n\n#COVID #ConspiracyTheory #Military #Conspiracy #PharmaceuticalIndustry\n\nThis Bill’s Bible Basics 1-part article can be read at:\n\nhttps://www.billkochman.com/Articles/COVID-19-Military-Complicity.html ", "created_at": "2026-05-05 16:45:03", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jj3szqwfglmbzrzuj7m6rhhz/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml4lafd2nk27", "author_handle": "thewhn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "World Health Network", "text": "WHN’s Kids’ Zone Magazine is a free, downloadable issue packed with kid-friendly stories, art, science, and COVID-conscious lifestyle ideas made for families who are still choosing care.\n\nDownload the latest issue for free + explore past editions anytime: whn.global/kidszone/\n\n#PublicHealth #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-05 16:11:34", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 10, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml4gdiqpbc2o", "author_handle": "m00psy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "chadzia dax 🔞😷", "text": "remember when people called #covid a plague, and acted accordingly?\n\nuntil they were told they could vaxx and relax (even though a) the current vaccines dont prevent all infection/transmission and b) only 18% of USians even got boosted last year).", "created_at": "2026-05-05 14:43:44", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlgblwgtr225", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "the vaccine doesn't prevent most transmission since omicron. Its down at 20% now...before waning\n\nIt's a poor vaccine in most respects.", "created_at": "2026-05-09 12:45:36", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml4gdiqpbc2o", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml4gdiqpbc2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlggvng4322b", "author_handle": "m00psy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "chadzia dax 🔞😷", "text": "it does prevent *some* transmission, & it’s very good for helping keep people out of the hospital and morgue during the initial infection, which is far from nothing. people should get it.\n\nof course, tho, 82% of USian adults didn’t get boosted last year, so it can’t do those folks any good at all. 🫠", "created_at": "2026-05-09 14:20:30", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": consider my first line of defense against covid to be the N95 i wear in shared air: keep the virus out, and if anything gets through, being boosted [and getting paxlovid if i can, etc] is the backup team.)", "created_at": "2026-05-09 14:22:20", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlggvng4322b", "root_uri": "author_display_name": "", "text": "If you are in a high risk group you are being sensible, \n\nMasks are good for anyone who wants to protect themselves, but if you aren't in a high risk group, vaccination is almost pointless.\n\nScientifically and evolutionary-ily speaking it could be more harmful than good if you are healthy", "created_at": "2026-05-09 15:57:33", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlggywly3c2b", "root_uri":
