Hank Schiffers", "text": "harmlos für #Kinder? \n\n#Endothelial #biomarkers are elevated in Long #COVID vs acute COVID-19, supporting a distinct vascular process.\n\nVascular biomarkers correlate with key #cognitive and #neuropsychiatric measures (#fluency, #memory, #depression, and #anxiety).", "created_at": "2026-05-05 06:10:42", "like_count": 12, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3jo2ghds2k", "author_handle": "leanhealth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. med. Hank Schiffers", "text": "www.sciencedirect.com/science/arti...", "created_at": "2026-05-05 06:10:42", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3jnzqn422k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3jnzqn422k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s", "author_handle": "flyaway.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Flyaway (The M.E.C.⛴️)", "text": "I recently found out people over 65 and those with risk factors (link below) can get more than one shot of #covid vax a year. The condition is supposed to be self-certified, meaning you don't need proof you have it. \n\nI got my second shot of the 2025-26 #vaccine today!💉\n\nwww.cdc.gov/covid/risk-f...", "created_at": "2026-05-05 05:31:57", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml54rz6yvc24", "author_handle": "splendentsweven.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rhiannon Archer", "text": "Oh, yeah, my husband and I have been doing that ever since the vax was first invented. I'm so sorry you didn't know! We got our six-month springtime boosters last month. \n\nI *was* worried, what with the enshitification of everything, that we might not be able to do it *this* year, but they said yes.", "created_at": "2026-05-05 21:25:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5ai62y4s2s", "author_handle": "flyaway.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Flyaway (The M.E.C.⛴️)", "text": "Well I'm glad Walgreens' marketing department encouraged me to come in for a shot! I thought we were only allowed to get it once a year (since ins will only cover what's \"recommended\"). I had an appt for a checkup yesterday anyway, so I got it while I was there.\n\nIt's not publicized enough!", "created_at": "2026-05-05 22:31:38", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml54rz6yvc24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5cfowlec24", "author_handle": "splendentsweven.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rhiannon Archer", "text": "Yeah I don't remember how I first found out about it, but I'm going to guess Walgreens' website? Because that's who we use, too. \n\nI remember when the vax first came out, it was too shots, like a month apart or whatever? But I remember reading *somewhere* about an additional booster if you need it.", "created_at": "2026-05-05 23:06:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5ai62y4s2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5cmcvk2c24", "author_handle": "splendentsweven.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rhiannon Archer", "text": "And the paperwork was just like, 'Do you have any of the following?' and you just check 'Yes' and maybe write in which one, and you qualify. Definitely didn't need to prove it or whatever. \n\nSo yeah we've been getting our Covid jab every six months.", "created_at": "2026-05-05 23:09:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5cfowlec24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5cpsflrs24", "author_handle": "splendentsweven.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rhiannon Archer", "text": "Walgreens wasn't honestly sure if we could this last time, because of all the BS, because it *does* depend on whether or not insurance will cover it and with CDC recommendations changing every two hours who the fuck knows? \n\nBut! The gal was like well I'll submit it and we'll see. Insurance said yes", "created_at": "2026-05-05 23:11:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rzgxq3fpaprupkzx23gm3bh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml5cmcvk2c24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ptbgkhbickbp455hjbng45ws/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3hisgqk22s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml3eq37wy22f", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’ https://cstu.io/17cd81 #engineer #startup #covid", "created_at": "2026-05-05 04:42:19", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bn3rd3b5777oi7pzu3z56wsm/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2yc55bu22o", "author_handle": "jennicle1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "BeanieCLE1", "text": "Remember the lady with the spoon? Funny how that works. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-04 19:42:29", "like_count": 31, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2fnvv2a42n", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades https://cstu.io/a67313 #engineer #artificialintelligence #covid", "created_at": "2026-05-04 19:26:20", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ikvgfimidc5if6aq3rywo5d7/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2dxukfr22e", "author_handle": "theapexarchive.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Die `Nachwehen´ einer Durchseuchung...\n\nSpeziell Herz- und Gefäßerkrankungen können (nach #Covid) noch Jahre nach Infektion selbst bei milder Syptomatik plötzlich auftreten und schlagend werden...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 18:56:40", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2jyzmumc2l", "author_handle": "leanhealth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. med. So in the short term, it’s easier to just not mention it. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-04 18:09:33", "like_count": 55, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 24, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2ezytfu22t", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "bsky.app/profile/chan...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 19:15:12", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2bemm2x22p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2bemm2x22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2blvx2ck2p", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "bsky.app/profile/drjo...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 18:13:38", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2bemm2x22p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2bemm2x22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vtpx3n4zhvehckdtkvnaoo7v/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml25red44k2u", "author_handle": "3eggnogfatality.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "3Eggnogfatality", "text": "Oh look, they think they're making us afraid again.\nFuck these CHUD motherfuckers.\nYou all failed us in 2020.\n#skepchick #fascism #COVID #FBI #stasi #secretpolice #rebeccawatson\nwww.youtube.com/watch?v=bwtV...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 17:05:09", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml23zzjxws2e", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "ME/CFS\n\nLeben in Isolation: Kunst eines schwerkranken Jungen in Weimar ausgestellt\n\nLeander Hallmann ist nach einer Infektion mit SARS-CoV-2 schwer am ME erkrankt. It breaks my brain that his long life has contributed to the loss of decades of life in others. 😢", "created_at": "2026-05-11 13:13:57", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2xydo6h3mltvtwndzr2hgy6m/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml23ovituc2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzy2b4gzc2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u5r4ahw7cfh4dfmj2kkpaby2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkztts7pzk2a", "author_handle": "detroitjcs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "@DetroitJCS", "text": "Unacceptable.\n\n\"Alternative facts\" LOSES again, and rightfully so.\n\n#vaccinationworks 💉 \n#covid", "created_at": "2026-05-04 14:07:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:fbq6trwgzt6gj5isku65vnxh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzsajo74s2j", "author_handle": "captainconstance.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Connie", "text": "I am frustrated. Discouraging.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 15:03:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:fbq6trwgzt6gj5isku65vnxh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzsajo74s2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:fbq6trwgzt6gj5isku65vnxh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzsajo74s2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:fbq6trwgzt6gj5isku65vnxh/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml2af7kuqk2h", "author_handle": "captainconstance.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Connie", "text": "A room full of sick people and no one masks. \nSigh.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 17:45:47", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:n62bpz5mhonan3ulchflargw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzwxfpk622s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:fbq6trwgzt6gj5isku65vnxh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzsajo74s2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2yrsxkna6yee2qhkaasxslgk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzpzol3cs2s", "author_handle": "john-crowther7bsky.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "John Crowther", "text": "Boris Johnson: Into the Kill Zone - reappearing soon on Channel 5, like the turd that won't flush. The brass neck of a failed PM who presided over a toxic and chaotic culture, that led to 23,000 unnecessary deaths, in the first wave of the #Covid pandemic.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 12:59:13", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzcw5efas2n", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "#HumanRightsViolations\n#Covid #ClinicallyVulnerable #LongCovid\nNo clean air\nVery poor or no vaccine access\nThailand has 4 a year for CV\nFrance Free to all. \nUK gov doesn’t care about medically vulnerable people!", "created_at": "2026-05-04 09:04:37", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzekidtuk2n", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "@zackpolanski.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-04 09:33:52", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzcw5efas2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzcw5efas2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzel4oozc2n", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "@greensagainstcovid.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-04 09:34:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzekidtuk2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzcw5efas2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qsf67och2kw4cbffclnswtsm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkzbececzk2c", "author_handle": "hamiltonalan942.bsky.social", "author_display_name": " Kevin Hilton", "text": "Even when a CDC-reviewed study shows COVID vaccines cut hospital visits by ~50%. This is exactly why trust in public health is in the toilet. Science should never be censored just because the results are inconvenient.\n\n#CDC #COVID #VaccineTruth #ScienceOverNarrative", "created_at": "2026-05-04 08:37:13", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ij4exulujmnsyyveltg2im66/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkz7lgcawk24", "author_handle": "beansproutsmom.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bean & Sprout's Mom", "text": "Incredible 🧵\n\n\"This is the result of weeks and months of intensive reading and research over the past five years...synthesis of what the retrieved literature shows about #neuroautoantibodies after #COVID infection & their relationship to LC or #neurocovid\"", "created_at": "2026-05-04 08:04:54", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:cvtuqe3hr3wpegl233pnitn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkz2dxo4m22p", "author_handle": "theorkneynews.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "The Orkney News", "text": "Long #COVID and Being Prepared for a Future Pandemic theorkneynews.scot/2026/05/04/l...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 06:31:17", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2n5poo4mfmott343inm5uoi6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkz6ylnlkk2z", "author_handle": "lillyh.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Count Melancholia", "text": "Found this interesting. Wish I had started getting the flu vacc earlier - like in the 1990s already! www.gavi.org/vaccineswork...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 07:54:25", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:cvtuqe3hr3wpegl233pnitn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkz2dxo4m22p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:cvtuqe3hr3wpegl233pnitn4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkz2dxo4m22p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "-most routine CSF studies are normal in PCS patients\nThis pattern is consistent with peripheral autoantibody effects with secondary CNS impact.\n🔑 Takeaways\n#COVID is strongly associated with new-onset autoantibodies, including many that can target the nervous system.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfpvs2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Neural autoantibodies are common in both acute neuro‑COVID and Long Covid, especially among patients with cognitive impairment, dysautonomia, or neuropsychiatric symptoms.\n-Causality is supported by mouse passive-transfer experiments and by clinical response to immunotherapy in some syndromes.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfqv22b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "-Not all Long Covid patients have autoantibodies, and not all proposed antibody targets are found—suggesting biological subtypes.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfpvs2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfruc2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "-Long Covid likely involves multiple interacting mechanisms (neuroinflammation, autoimmunity, microvascular injury, viral persistence), with autoantibodies playing a major role in a substantial subset.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfqv22b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfstk2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "A large number of independent studies consistently document autoantibody generation after COVID , their persistence, their association with neurological Long Covid symptoms, and in some cases functional pathogenicity.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:09", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfruc2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyypnk4vc2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Neuroantibodies & neurological symptoms in #LongCOVID & How neuroantibodies contribute to neurological symptoms in LC ?\nAcross the retrieved evidence, a coherent mechanistic picture emerges:\nMechanisms by Which Neuroantibodies Drive Neurological Symptoms", "created_at": "2026-05-04 06:02:06", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfstk2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxbdfnxc2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46oe22b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Short summary in layman terms \n🧨 #COVID Induces Broad Autoantibody Responses\nMultiple studies document widespread induction of autoantibodies during and #postcovid infection. These include antibodies against:\ncytokines, chemokines, complement & cell‑surface immune proteins", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46rbs2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "- GPCRs, chemokines, neurotransmitters \n- antinuclear antibodies and systemic autoimmune markers \n-brain and endothelial antigens\nThese responses can persist for months and may increase over time in LC patients\n\n@nature.com \nwww.nature.com/articles/s41...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46oe22b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46oe22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb7f6ms2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "@cellpress.bsky.social \nwww.cell.com/cell-reports... \n\nwww.annallergy.org/article/S108... \n\nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/chap... \n\nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/arti... \n@sagepub.com \njournals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/... \n\n@brainbehavimm.bsky.social \nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/arti...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": Symptoms often respond to immunotherapy (steroids, IVIG, plasmapheresis), supporting immune-mediated mechanisms", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, months of intensive reading and research over the past five years. It’s not perfect but is a short summaries , evidence‑based synthesis of what the retrieved literature shows about #neuroautoantibodies after #COVID infection & their relationship to LC or #neurocovid", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46oe22b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Short summary in layman terms \n🧨 #COVID Induces Broad Autoantibody Responses\nMultiple studies document widespread induction of autoantibodies during and #postcovid infection. These include antibodies against:\ncytokines, chemokines, complement & cell‑surface immune proteins", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46mfk2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxb46mfk2b"} {"uri": neurotransmitters \n- antinuclear antibodies and systemic autoimmune markers \n-brain and endothelial antigens\nThese responses can persist for months and may increase over time in LC → Broad Neural Autoantibody Panels\nNeural autoantibodies are often detected in #COVID ‑associated psychiatric presentations:\n-Persistent psychiatric symptoms (anxiety, depression, psychosis) tied to neural autoantibodies,", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoiyik2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "often attributable to #autoimmuneencephalitis or #encephalopathy\n\nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/arti...\nNeural autoantibodies are detected more frequently in patients with acute & persisting forms of LC", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoisn22b", "root_uri": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "with neuropsychiatric symptoms vs to healthy controls.\n- Catatonia cases also linked to immune dysregulation and autoantibody activity .\nSystemic inflammation and the resulting \"cytokine storm\" play a critical role in the development of neuropsychiatric", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoiyik2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoisn22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxar4t4c2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "symptoms by initiating a cascade that leads to disrupted neurotransmission and hypoxic brain injury.\nThis process is highly relevant to cases of acute COVID and other severe infections, where pro-inflammatory cytokines", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxar4r5s2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoisn22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxar4v2s2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "(such as IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β) cross the blood-brain barrier (BBB), activating microglial cells and inducing neuroinflammation.\n\nwww.frontiersin.org/journals/psy...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxar4t4c2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoisn22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxatyoks2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "www.nature.com/articles/s41...\nThese \"turncoat\" antibodies mistakenly target 🧠 tissue, potentially causing or exacerbating various mental health disorders\nSymptoms linked:\nanxiety, depression\npsychosis\ncatatonia\nmood instability\n\nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/arti...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxar4v2s2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxaoisn22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC.... \n\n🔥 #COVID can induce neural autoantibodies, especially in people with significant neurological symptoms or LC . Mechanisms :\n-molecular mimicry\nimmune dysregulation\n-cytokine-driven blood–brain barrier disruption\n-bystander T/B cell activation", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxahxs5s2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Local brain inflammation causes the release of self-antigens, which then prompts further T-cell activation & sustained autoimmunity\n@nature.com \nwww.nature.com/articles/s41...\n\nwww.autoimmuneinstitute.org/covid_timeli... \n\nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/arti....", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxalhxys2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Not all individuals develop these antibodies, and not all studies find a clear autoimmune signature. Their clinical significance varies widely.\nNumerous studies consistently show autoantibody formation #postCOVID in symptomatic patients,\n\nwww.neurology.org/doi/10.1212/...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxahxs5s2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxanhp2s2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "However, findings are heterogeneous and some cohorts show minimal evidence of CNS autoimmunity. Conversely, more evidence has established several symptom clusters in post-COVID syndrome (acute & post-acute) map to specific neural and systemic autoantibody types.", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxalhxys2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxanhq222b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "The clearest and strongest associations are for cognitive impairment neuropsychiatric symptoms encephalitis & autonomic dysfunction with moderate evidence for neuromuscular and sensory symptoms\n🔥 Cognitive Symptoms → 🧠 ‑Binding #Autoantibodies\nThe clearest mapping comes from a prospective CSF study:", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxanhp2s2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxanhryk2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Anti‑neuronal antibodies found in 52% of PCS patients with cognitive complaints, including myelin, Yo, Ma2/Ta, GAD65, NMDAR & hippocampal/basal ganglia–binding epitopes\n→ cognitive impairment directly associated with CSF antibodies, not serum", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:08", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxanhq222b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyxafdczs2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "@cp-cellreports.bsky.social \nwww.cell.com/cell-reports... \n- #Longcovid individuals (2 years later) show high rates of ANA and other autoantibodies, suggesting persistent immune dysregulation.\nThe evidence indicates that patients evaluated 2 years after #Covid infection", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7lah7k2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "had ⏫️ levels of antinuclear antibodies & other markers. It is plausible that these immune alterations relate to ongoing inflammatory responses, which aligns with persistent immune dysregulation.\n\nwww.scielo.br/j/bjmbr/a/qT...", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7motlk2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "- Systems-bioinformatics demonstrates auto-reactive epitope similarity between #SARSCoV2 and neuronal proteins (APP, tau, GFAP, NfL, myelin proteins), supporting molecular mimicry. Evidence that 🦠 epitopes have shared linear motifs", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7lah7k2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7mouks2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "with neuronal proteins such as APP, MAPT (tau), GFAP, NfL & myelin proteins, supporting the possibility of molecular mimicry \nwww.mdpi.com/1999-4915/14...\n🧨 #Autoimmunity is a plausible mechanism behind neurological complications.\nMultiple reviews confirm", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7motlk2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7moxik2b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "& details that COVID is marked by a range of complications including autoantibody production driven by loss of B cell tolerance & immune overactivation➡️COVID triggers immune system overactivation, cytokine storms & loss of self-tolerance that can lead to neural autoantibody production", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7mouks2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7mozh22b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "www.sciencedirect.com/science/arti... \n\npubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/... \n- #Postinfectioussyndromes such as ADEM, Guillain‑Barré, NMOSD, MOG‑associated disease often follow COVID through immune-mediated mechanisms rather than direct neuroinvasion", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7moxik2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx7hv5mk2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkyx76g4e22b", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "#Medsky🧪 #IDsky #neurosky #immunosky #publichealth #NeuroAntibodies After #COVID Infection & #LongCovid long 🧵 \nAcross many studies, #COVID infection can trigger neural autoantibodies, particularly in patients with neurological symptoms ( #encephalitis, #encephalopathy, #seizures, #neuropathies).", "created_at": "2026-05-04 05:36:07", "like_count": 23, "reply_count": 3, "repost_count": 6, "parent_uri": null, {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbt7u5s2l", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nIn sum, the discussion around insulin resistance in #LongCOVID mirrors another that took place earlier in the pandemic: when many with #COVID respiratory distress were bounced out of ERs because they had apparently healthy pulse oximetry & clear chest X-rays.", "created_at": "2026-05-03 17:40:34", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbtbvlk2l", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nWith a #NovelCoronavirus, believe the patient even if the mechanism of the symptom is not yet understood: many of us living with #LongCOVID know that our insulin resistance has been impaired, & cannot simply be remedied with a referral to a supervised exercise programme for chronic conditions.", "created_at": "2026-05-03 17:40:34", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbt7u5s2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbt7u5s2l"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbtbwks2l", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\nTreating insulin resistance in #LongCOVID patients could also prevent the downstream health risks associated with new onset obesity & diabetes, as well as reduce cardiovascular risk -\n\nacademic.oup.com/ehjcvp/artic...", "created_at": "2026-05-03 17:40:34", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbtbvlk2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxpbt7u5s2l"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:za4dxg3t26at53s45tttixqo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxk65ktsk22", "author_handle": "scottie2.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scottie2", "text": "A good point \nWe are told the pollen count every day by are left in ignorance about #Covid #WesSteeting", "created_at": "2026-05-03 16:09:01", "like_count": 19, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hdf64xsgsjxmiha526cyh3ac/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxja6oalc2d", "author_handle": "rebelwheelsnyc.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rebelwheels NYC (Michele Sommerstein)", "text": "This was really cathartic to make \n\n(another love letter to the resistance)\n\n#disability #antifascist #covid #selfcare #resistance #burnout #cripplepunk #feedyoursoul #wearyourmask #shortfilm #neurodivergent #NYC #healing #holdingspace\n\nyoutube.com/shorts/rNygv...", "created_at": "2026-05-03 15:52:17", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ckyrot3vstptaqnfg5kgoqyg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxdg437x22q", "author_handle": "randallgross.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Randall Gross", "text": "“None of us has the luxury of choosing our challenges,” he said in a virtual speech. “Fate and history provide them for us. Our job is to meet the tests we are presented.”\nJerome Powell is staying on at the Fed to demonstrate that it is independent. \nwww.wsj.com/economy/cent...", "created_at": "2026-05-03 14:08:11", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ckyrot3vstptaqnfg5kgoqyg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkxdq653sa24", "author_handle": "randallgross.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Randall Gross", "text": "The Federal Reserve System is pretty conservative but the system is deeply imbued with a strong culture of public service buttressed with fierce non-partisan independence. Lets see how long it stays there.\n\nThanks", "created_at": "2026-05-03 16:30:56", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx37jzkjk2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx37jzkjk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5gjgtw37onx3nmuqqjd5pmg2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwzfanwos2a", "author_handle": "lizettebuzz.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "Lizette Buzz 🐸", "text": "#covid", "created_at": "2026-05-03 11:08:45", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwzbwvnss2q", "author_handle": "scrummaster2000.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SeDäniel", "text": "Das waren 2024 übrigens ca. 0,25% aller Kinder in Deutschland.\nLong COVID haben im selben Jahr etwa 2,5% aller Kinder in Deutschland bekommen (konservativ geschätzt).\nUnd was tun wir dagegen? Wir setzen sie weiter ungeschützt in volle, schlecht belüftete Klassenzimmer.\n\n#Covid\n#LongCovid", "created_at": "2026-05-03 11:06:54", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:j7d3m5kttl7nhqotn23s4lid/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx3gp7h3s27", "author_handle": "katjadiehl.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Katja Diehl", "text": "Braucht es solche Vergleiche?\nWem hilft das?", "created_at": "2026-05-03 11:45:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwzbwvnss2q", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwzbwvnss2q"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx3rjh6u22f", "author_handle": "scrummaster2000.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SeDäniel", "text": "Ja, braucht es. Denn das eine finden viele schlimm, das andere nicht. Die Wahrnehmung und die Reaktionen sind absolut unverhältnismäßig.", "created_at": "2026-05-03 11:51:25", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:j7d3m5kttl7nhqotn23s4lid/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx3gp7h3s27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwzbwvnss2q"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:j7d3m5kttl7nhqotn23s4lid/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx43or6xs27", "author_handle": "katjadiehl.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Katja Diehl", "text": "Ich wüsste nicht, dass beide Themen nicht gleich mies behandelt werden.\nIch bin selbst Post Covid Betroffene und mich ärgert so ein Whataboutism sehr.", "created_at": "2026-05-03 11:57:07", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx3rjh6u22f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwzbwvnss2q"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zmfvvk3k7omnnkuauyzwvh6l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx5cphrrk2j", "author_handle": "scrummaster2000.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SeDäniel", "text": "Tut mir leid, daß Du betroffen bist. Tut mir leid, daß Kinder im Straßenverkehr verletzt werden. Was mir nicht leid tut, ist, klarzustellen, daß das Thema Long COVID bei Kindern zehnmal mehr Aufmerksamkeit bekommen sollte als Verkehrsunfälle, stattdessen aber totgeschwiegen wird.", "created_at": "author_handle": "snoopde.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "SnoopDE", "text": "Deine Logik macht \n\nSicherheitsgurte, \nFeuerwehr, \nKondome\nBundeswehr\nHebammen\nHelme\nKrankenhäuser\nSicherheitsschuhe\nuvm\n\nüberflüssig\n\nWie oft brennt schon dein Haus🤷‍♀️\n\nDieses ganze nur eine Gefahr von x ist halt immer doof wenn man ein Teil davon wird\n\n#COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-02 21:32:20", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:y2x74ypktchxctijitpmulhz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkveehmhv22u", "author_handle": "neptune78.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Neptune InIowa", "text": "Kennedy Buries Report Proving Covid Vaccines WORKED youtu.be/xuI1qI1yOSo?... via @YouTube \n#USNews #NowWatching #CurrentEvents #Discussion #Commentary #Politics #RFKjr #HHS #CDC #Covid #VaccinesWork #TrumpAdmin #Crackpots", "created_at": "2026-05-02 19:19:52", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": " #MECFSis living with these and more tools, and overburdened carers - if we are lucky enough to have them.\n\nI used to live a full, independent life before catching #covid in 2020 and being diagnosed/accessing some symptomatic treatment in 2022.\n\nThread #MayMomentum @openmedf.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:43:44", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xjklzzqvks47utn6rpfgh7ex/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvx7rzhnk2p", "author_handle": "lowenergylounge.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Low Energy Lounge", "text": "Great question. Thank you for using your precious energy to share & draw attention to this 💙🫂💙", "created_at": "2026-05-03 00:57:15", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkwk66eqc22l", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": "Thank you for the initiative!", "created_at": "2026-05-03 06:36:22", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xjklzzqvks47utn6rpfgh7ex/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvx7rzhnk2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt3ypc2x", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": "Over 50 therapies later, I am still mostly bedbound - because there is no cure yet! \n\nOn top of being neglected by medicine and society for more than 50 years, despite being as prevalent as MS, finding one is hard because even in promising treatments, only a smaller percentage reacts positively.", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:43:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt42ns2x", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": "Thus, in traditional trials the treatment would get rejected. But: research clearly points to different subgroups and significant overlap with common comorbidities. \n\nSo work needs to be done to properly define subgroups and carry out trials with those subgroups in mind. This needs a lot of funding!", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:43:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt3ypc2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt43n22x", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": "But: the economic cost of not doing so and leaving us languishing in our beds is much, much higher!\n\nHopefully, #MayMomentum changes things in the right direction. Please donate.\n\nMy question: Will we have enough funds to find and roll out effective treatments by subgroup?", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:43:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt42ns2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt45lk2x", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": "Pictured: \n\n1. Bedrest. Have not had the energy to find a nursing bed, but it’s time.\n\n2. Call button for when i need to be helped up and transferred to the wheelchair for the loo.\n\n3. Satin bedding for the severe allodynia the subsequent neurological diagnoses gave me.", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:43:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt43n22x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt47k22x", "author_handle": "trans4m8tion.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "under_transformation", "text": "4. Compression stockings for POTS (tolerable only on a good day!).\n\n5. Drinking flasks, I can use lying down.\n\n6. Nose sprays for new allergies (additional 30 pills a day for everything not pictured).\n\n7. Sanitiser to not get infected again (air filter not pictured).\n\n@lowenergylounge.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:43:44", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdt45lk2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2h3fta3toywjxwhgsnmw6rds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvcdet3mc2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkvamzcsrk24", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #epstein #tank #WW2 #germany\n\nMatrix - a Big little German story", "created_at": "2026-05-02 18:13:12", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3oxo7fwlc6tr3t6vaerc623e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkv7tlqadc2x", "author_handle": "dmcwriter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dawn Colclasure Wilson", "text": "BLOG POST: \"Writing is What Gave Me Hope When I Was About to Lose All Hope\" dawncolclasureblog.blogspot.com/2026/05/writ... #COVID #creativity #healing #health #hope #journaling #mentalhealth #pandemic #write #writing", "created_at": "2026-05-02 17:56:19", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkv6wamjzs2b", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #epstein #tank #WW2 #germany\n\nMatrix Older political era. Pfizer is available but costs $150.", "created_at": "2026-05-01 20:31:55", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:73wzzmg77733c4uvlabtizzz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkt56oo3pc2b", "author_handle": "lirettet.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "According to the government website, only certain groups of people are eligible", "created_at": "2026-05-01 22:06:03", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:p3sdlnci46mqkuc4ixbf5grm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksxwg4fi22i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:p3sdlnci46mqkuc4ixbf5grm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksxwg4fi22i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkswygzd7s2r", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Berufsunfähigkeit nach Post-COVID: Altenpflegerin setzt BU-Rente vor Gericht durch\n\nDer Fall einer Altenpflegerin zeige, unter welchen Voraussetzungen Ansprüche trotz der großen Hürden erfolgreich durchgesetzt werden könnten.\n\nwww.anwalt.de/rechtstipps/...\n\n#COVID #LongCOVID", "created_at": "2026-05-01 20:15:09", "like_count": 87, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 33, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksqxvsbes2f", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "People stopped staying home. But the virus didn’t stop circulating or become benign. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-05-01 18:27:33", "like_count": 46, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 7, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jj3szqwfglmbzrzuj7m6rhhz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkslvm4szc2f", "author_handle": "thewhn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "World Health Network", "text": "COVID hasn’t gone away. It’s still causing infections, long-term health damage, and death in 2026 — but protection works, and it’s not too late to start. "author_display_name": "chadzia dax 🔞😷", "text": "and like… now would be an amazing time for people to get back on board. #covid wastewater levels are historically low right now. it would be easier to actually #StopTheSpread **for good** now than just about any other time so far.", "created_at": "2026-05-01 13:30:58", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksak5fevk27", "author_handle": "m00psy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "chadzia dax 🔞😷", "text": "by the way, until i have a new covid vaccine in my body that actually makes me fully immune to covid—something that’s in trials!—i will continue to mask in shared air regardless what the wastewater levels are. \n\ni already have ME/CFS, chronic pain, PsA, etc, i don’t want to get even more disabled.", "created_at": "2026-05-01 13:33:27", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksafozmps27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksafozmps27"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksb6rfkm227", "author_handle": "m00psy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "chadzia dax 🔞😷", "text": "going back to panic about food, though, i just noticed this on a label in my kitchen: “as the foundation of our all-natural mission, our sunflower oil is naturally chemical-free...”\n\nhow?\n\nsunflower oil, like many things in this world, is MADE of chemicals (like linoleic acid and oleic acid).", "created_at": "2026-05-01 13:44:59", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksak5fevk27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mksafozmps27"} {"uri": called food chemistry!\n\nwe have to stop demonizing buzzwords like this, because then we get manufacturers putting straight-up lies on their labels, like claiming their oleic acid and linoleic acid product is somehow chemical-free.", "created_at": "2026-05-01 13:46:26", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": Spencer", "text": "Tim, when you start addressing the copious #Misinformation pumped out by 🇨🇦 #PublicHealth (that \"the pandemic is over\", #COVID is now \"endemic\" & just like \"any other respiratory illness\", & we can all #VaxAndRelax), then we'll take you seriously -", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:33:57", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lx7vjbdq2ga7wgf47o24gn4u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkz2o6hoc23", "author_handle": "jakphd.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jack Kosmicki", "text": "Sleep and step count are inversely correlated (e.g., sleep peaks while step count bottoms during winter) from AllofUs wearable devices in Nature Medicine.\n\nBUT, the Spring 2020 #COVID outbreak unsurprisingly caused real outliers compared to same month / dif year\nwww.nature.com/articles/s41...", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:30:54", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv3gac22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n...And with the certainty of future pandemics coming along, honest & clear news media that serves the public can be a lifeline. It’s long past time to change the #COVID narrative. It has changed before!\"", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:12:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nThis episode tracks how the #Media has contributed to the alarming decline of #PublicHealth & played a role in blocking meaningful understanding and action on #COVID\":", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:12:33", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vt5her2m6434mexgxhvcifqf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkl2zfppfk2f", "author_handle": "spiritsofland.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Join the Mass Infection Resistance", "text": "Thanks for sharing!", "created_at": "2026-04-28 17:05:58", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv3cdc22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\n\"What is reported & how it's framed can have a huge impact on what people think & how they behave. And if public health leaders are the ones sending foggy messages through unquestioning journalists, it becomes difficult to address collective health threats—now & in the future -", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:12:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv3ebs22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n...The interplay between public health institutions, politicians, & the media is so powerful it affects who suffers, who survives, & who doesn’t.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:12:33", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv3cdc22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv3gac22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. It’s long past time to change the #COVID narrative. It has changed before!\"", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:12:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv3ebs22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkxzv2spc22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ksxvd4cklzqnqhqfpdosozoq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkwpjkko22b", "author_handle": "haslacher.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Christian Haslacher", "text": "When we migrated our processes years ago we forgot one poor little cronjob. It was left behind on an old server and for the past three years dutifully tried to fetch daily #Covid -data from long inexistent sources. We finally found and retired him today.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 15:48:54", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:omzaxvzppx43r2lz3ult6vrm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkwkeopjcbs", "author_handle": "shaul.selfhosted.social", "author_display_name": "Sha'ul", "text": "What is so difficult about saying covid was a lie and #covid19 vaccine was always a scam before it started?", "created_at": "2026-04-28 15:45:58", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tbs47zmxzb72jvjdgiesknzi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkvbuxo522b", "author_handle": "ritab-r.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rita🌺", "text": "Be ever vigilant! #COVID \n\nWhat to Know About the Cicada SARS-CoV-2 Variant jamanetwork.com/journals/jam...", "created_at": "2026-04-28 15:23:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkksrm6bsc26", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "#Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-28 14:38:29", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkpggptyc2s", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #epstein #trump\n\nMatrix Karen Pearce – Mandelson's predecessor as US Ambassador", "created_at": "2026-04-28 13:38:58", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:la37iif4dob3cv5ifeudcxtj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkmvkx62k25", "author_handle": "thosenerdygirls.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Those Nerdy Girls", "text": "Cicada is a variant to watch & public health surveillance systems are doing their job by tracking it. But “worth monitoring” is not the same as “cause for alarm.” Right now, overall #COVID activity in the U.S. is low & there’s no signal of increased severity from this variant that we’ve seen yet.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 12:53:19", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uejvqweqw3teg4jfbosj4zw2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkklmats4k2v", "author_handle": "germainehypher.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Germaine Hypher - Crafting A Path Through Illness", "text": "YOU are still here beneath the layers of pain and illness. \n\nHow do you find ways to connect with your core self?\n\n🧶 🧵 🪡 🎨 ✍🏻 📷 🌱 🧁 💃 🎭 ✂️ 🎵 📖 \n\n#chronicillness #chronicpain #chronicfatigue #mecfs #ME/CFS #fibromyalgia #covid #autoimmune #art #creativity #craftsky #crafts #poetry", "created_at": "2026-04-28 12:30:19", "like_count": 13, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dja72tknrs33cztfwxdozfd7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx67rzy4k2m", "author_handle": "chronicinsights.com", "author_display_name": "James Allen", "text": "Poetry! I never realised how powerful it can be in expressing things which somehow can't be expressed in everyday prose (like life with chronic illness) until I started reading and writing poetry. It's like a pressure release valve for my soul.", "created_at": "2026-05-03 12:35:09", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:uejvqweqw3teg4jfbosj4zw2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkklmats4k2v", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:uejvqweqw3teg4jfbosj4zw2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkklmats4k2v"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uejvqweqw3teg4jfbosj4zw2/app.bsky.feed.post/3ml42uw7ntk2p", "author_handle": "germainehypher.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Germaine Hypher - Crafting A Path Through Illness", "text": "This is it, exactly! I’m so pleased poetry came to your rescue!", "created_at": "2026-05-05 11:18:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dja72tknrs33cztfwxdozfd7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkx67rzy4k2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:uejvqweqw3teg4jfbosj4zw2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkklmats4k2v"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkl7kgvuk2s", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #epstein #trump\n\n Matrix - Epstein / Mandelson – the Full Ollie Robbins", "created_at": "2026-04-28 12:23:28", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:t7kji3333eqvkzyy73lzcknz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkkrazarh2x", "author_handle": "kantonbl.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Kanton BL", "text": "#Regierungsbulletin mit #Gemeindebeschluss #100Geburtstag #SwisslosFonds #Ersatzwahlen #GemeindeZusammenschlüsse #BankKredite #Covid-19\n\nLink Medienmitteilung: https://bit.ly/4sWQ7DT", "created_at": "2026-04-28 12:15:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pjlfw5ebq3hqxpbrqm4xfhrp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkdjxqs2s2q", "author_handle": "smollestbunny2.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "♿ hiding from plagues - Always masked - N95 or bust", "text": "Im about to pass out but can #covidaware people please send me some links studies proving immunity debt is BS and not how that works\n\n#covid", "created_at": "2026-04-28 10:05:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:p5qyunvk67vzdc54yamf3woe/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkky7rimsk24", "author_handle": "solarpunkfox.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Count of Monte Carlo 𓉡", "text": "Data Report has a forum and I think he keeps a lot of studies and articles archived there.\n\ndatareport.info", "created_at": "2026-04-28 16:15:51", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pjlfw5ebq3hqxpbrqm4xfhrp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkdjxqs2s2q", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pjlfw5ebq3hqxpbrqm4xfhrp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkdjxqs2s2q"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pjlfw5ebq3hqxpbrqm4xfhrp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mklkf2zhp22b", "author_handle": "smollestbunny2.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "♿ hiding from plagues - Always masked - N95 or bust", "text": "Thank you I'll have a look", "created_at": "2026-04-28 21:40:58", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:p5qyunvk67vzdc54yamf3woe/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkky7rimsk24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pjlfw5ebq3hqxpbrqm4xfhrp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkdjxqs2s2q"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxht7kec2a", "author_handle": "scribblerpen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scribbler Pen", "text": "🧵 I can understand the urge to minimise #Covid, from a #journalism perspective. (Hear me out.) Covid is global, but you want to talk about the problems endemic to your country (UK in our case): health inequality, food poverty that leads to poor diet, mouldy homes, NHS in crisis, child poverty...", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:29:49", "like_count": 40, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 15, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxobudqc2a", "author_handle": "scribblerpen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scribbler Pen", "text": "Maybe you want to talk about failing maternity care, social care, palliative care, the sewage in our water overrun GPs, overworked nurses, 3-year waits to see a consultant, patients stuck in corridors, warehouse workers unable to take a toilet break, the DWP declaring a dying man fit for work...\n2/2", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:33:25", "like_count": 21, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxht7kec2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxht7kec2a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxu776kc2a", "author_handle": "scribblerpen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scribbler Pen", "text": "On top of this comes Covid, and you think \"What a convenient cover for politicians to blame this all-round disaster they've presided over on a world pandemic no one could prevent\". And you hated lockdowns. So you don't speak about Covid, out of principle, in a \"We don't speak about the war\" way.\n3/3", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:36:43", "like_count": 19, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxobudqc2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxht7kec2a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxzcxzlc2a", "author_handle": "scribblerpen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scribbler Pen", "text": "But these aren't separate things. Covid mortality reflects inequality, of income, race, gender.\nRemember black people being asked by NHS screeners if their lips turned blue? Post-Covid health damage hits the marginalised. Women get medical misogyny, the poorger bigotry: \"It's all in your head\".\n4/4", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:39:35", "like_count": 26, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxu776kc2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxht7kec2a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjy44llcc2a", "author_handle": "scribblerpen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scribbler Pen", "text": "Those with the best income can go private. Those with the best education can articulate to doctors their post-Covid symptoms.\nEven married women can sometimes get a husband to advocate for them with a doctor who thinks post-Covid illness isn't real and all women are hysterical. The rest can't.\n5/5", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:41:09", "like_count": 23, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxzcxzlc2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjxht7kec2a"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:brjcbnu2sk4yostkyob2sqo4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjyfnwuws2a", "author_handle": "scribblerpen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scribbler Pen", "text": "The rest get shoved in the \"too hard, can't treat, won't treat\" pile. The older man with chest pains who has a heart attack at work and loses his job. The woman who can no longer walk, told to learn mindfulness. The child, constantly sick, whose family can't afford the fines for school absence.\n6/6", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:46:30", "like_count": 17, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": It’s made me even more annoyed that they are so incompetent.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 12:39:41", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ljlkvylmoyamzbvwy44t6ahe/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkk526ivws2v", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjcqwukvs2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qq7uiyjzzcqdx4pqh4uwze4b/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjbhitwzm22", "author_handle": "jik.federate.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Jonathan Kamens 86 47", "text": "We did an admitted students day trip to Suffolk University with Offspring yesterday.\nI hung a CO2 monitor from my belt. Spencer", "text": "9/\nTo his great credit, Haruki Murakami understood #COVID from the get-go & engaged to his community with deep empathy -\n\nlithub.com/haruki-murak...", "created_at": "2026-04-27 17:34:58", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6bpfuk2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "10/\nCirca 2024\n\"Murakami writes most transparently about our contemporary moment toward the end of his latest novel [begun in March 2020, & the novel before his 2026 novel] in a reflection on the 'pandemic of the soul'\":\n\nwww.latimes.com/opinion/stor...", "created_at": "2026-04-27 17:34:58", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6ajwnk2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6ajwnk2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6ckpvc2s", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "11/\n* It should go without saying that there is no \"surreal post-pandemic reality\". \n\nWhat is surreal, is that anyone believes that the reality of the pandemic is in any way \"post\". When it very much is not.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 17:34:58", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6bpfuk2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6ajwnk2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkinfd4ob223", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "12/", "created_at": "2026-04-27 17:56:48", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6ckpvc2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkim6ajwnk2s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gvalk2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "10/\nMany of us have warned about #COVID & its #Preventable consequences for 6 years. We continue to be unheeded, often ridiculed. \n\nBecause #UrgencyOfBrunch. \n\nAnd #PublicHealth still rubber stamping policies of self-serving governments, still lying about \"following the science\". \n\nThey aren't.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:58:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gv3pc2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\n▶️ declaring #COVID \"endemic\" (it's debatable if it is yet), was never a free pass for governments to do nothing (ask anyone who has lived in an endemic malaria region);\n▶️ surgical masks are NOT as effective as #N95 respirators;", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:58:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gv5ns2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\n▶️ & upgraded #IAQ, portable #HEPAs, & #CO2 tracking should be (but unfortunately still aren't) de rigueur in public spaces, in the 7th year of this #OngoingPandemic of an injurious #AirborneVirus.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:58:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gv3pc2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gv3pc2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gvalk2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n▶️ EVERYONE with a vascular system is at risk of an injurious virus more correctly understood as a neurotropic vasculitis;\n▶️ #COVID is not just \"like any other respiratory illness\", or just like a cold (the real damage can unpack in the weeks/months/years after the acute phase);", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:58:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gciy22y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\n ▶️ COVID is #Airborne (but good luck explaining that to @ipaccanada.bsky.social, @cmadocs.bsky.social, & more latterly, Canada's new Chief Public Health Officer ( #CPHO), @jossreimer.bsky.social, a past president of the #CMA - an organization steeped in #DropletDogma.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:58:41", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gce3s2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gce3s2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkik5gv3pc2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J.
