"like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiuftdzms2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkijksk5fs2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiv5ns4v22y", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "1. Was für ein Ende?\n2. 200.000 Tote und Millionen Kranke erwähnt er nicht \n3. Wie kacke kann man sein?\n\n#Arena", "created_at": "2026-04-27 20:15:39", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiv3g75ec2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkijksk5fs2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6mztqmw4iniug72fmpv32ftw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkijiwyosc2u", "author_handle": "chrishendel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Chris Hendel", "text": "\"While some experts believe that #Covid has developed into more of a nuisance illness than a perilous threat, not everyone agrees.\"\n\nThe threat of the virus has clearly subsided, but opinions vary on why and how much of a risk remains\n\nby @helenbranswell.bsky.social \nwww.statnews.com/2026/04/27/i...", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:47:25", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkih52j5vyt2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "Jeremy Faust has a very good piece about some recent results about Paxlovid in our current #COVID #COVID19 environment: https://insidemedicine.substack.com/p/the-end-of-the-paxlovid-era-why-two. The TL;DR is that two good studies show that this drug’s utility has decreased a great deal as […]", "created_at": "2026-04-27 16:04:55", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "Y’all - this news is HUGE. In a Good Way.\n\nLarge studies of folks most at risk for being hospitalized &/or dying from Covid don’t get much benefit from taking Paxlovid, if any.\nWhy is it a good thing? It means that vaccines are doing their job. \n🧵 #LongCovid #Covid\n\nopen.substack.com/pub/insideme...", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:39:40", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 4, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkigcfavw223", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "“That said, until we get better data, people with severely compromised immune systems should be vaccinated frequently, and consider using monoclonal antibodies between doses, to minimize their Covid risks.”", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:49:52", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkigega7ys23", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "“Now that Paxlovid is no longer the miracle drug it once was, what happens? Will the CDC change its recommendations based on now obsolete data? If it does, many well-meaning, pro-science people won’t believe it. … Kennedy’s HHS has debased the CDC’s reputation … so dramatically” .", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:51:01", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkigcfavw223", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiggvnics23", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "“that even if the agency [CDC] were to revert to its higher pre-Kennedy standards, it’s likely that many medical professionals would incorrectly dismiss the change.”", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:52:24", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkigega7ys23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkig45xirc23", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "“Paxlovid doesn’t make patients with Long Covid feel better.”\n“It’s not known whether Paxlovid taken during the acute phase of a Covid-19 illness decreases downstream Long Covid diagnoses”, either.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:46:24", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifvxq7g223", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "“zero deaths from any cause in the study, regardless of which group the patients were in. …\nAs I typed that, the hair on my arms literally stood up. …\nCovid-19 is no longer the massive mortality threat it once was. It’s nowhere near the hospitalization threat either.”\nWhy? They were vaccinated.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:42:56", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifycjfh223", "author_handle": "lisedyckman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lise M. Dyckman", "text": "In the UK study, 98% of the at-risk folks studied had been vaccinated (presumably more than once).", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:44:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifvxq7g223", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:avzveb33enaacyo7rmdmn3xz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkl4fd4s3226", "author_handle": "seca550.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Felonious Musk", "text": "WTF? That's really stupid.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 18:26:10", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u23pfawvkjan6776ynrqvkta/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifq44p4c23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:h3y73ont735jwtidvc7jbd7g/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkif7somz22s", "author_handle": "floridanews.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Florida News", "text": "(1/2) A state #audit revealed \"waste & abuse\" in Dublin City Schools, citing misused #COVID funds to cover costs. District faced $13.4M deficit, leading to 46 job cuts & shorter #school year. Top leaders resigned as financial crisis uncovered.\n\n#Georgia #MisuseOfFunds\n\nwww.13wmaz.com/article/news...", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:30:35", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:akcfxeadpt4m2onenrh52ugy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkid5u53tk2v", "author_handle": "tim-cliffe.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tim of the Brigantes", "text": "Don't believe them, don't believe me, discover for yourself.\nSearch #CDC #VAERS re #Covid injections between end of 2020 & end of 2021.\nI did & recorded the results.\nDeaths and life-changing injuries associated with #C-19 injections were staggering.\nvaers.hhs.gov/data.html", "created_at": "2026-04-27 14:53:38", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5rld2zaf5zmkxytuiz7bijei/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiakimbws2f", "author_handle": "lakeerie606.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bob T.", "text": "#Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-27 14:07:02", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vonx5vc4iyxtfsifknicvq4f/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiaaqlhc22q", "author_handle": "plainfeather.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "James Mitchell", "text": "My favorite face mask from the Covid era, Hamburg Ratsmusik, Germany, an early music performing group. A repost from April 26, 2020. #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-27 14:01:38", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkia4afvfi2u", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Ex-Taiwan official recounts COVID response, warns of new pandemic\n->Daily Sabah | More on \"Taiwan COVID pandemic response warning\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid #Pandemic", "created_at": "2026-04-27 13:59:03", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rlbtjnal6iigrzlj4ikli32u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mki73wv5es2o", "author_handle": "anitabonita.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anita Bonita", "text": "Hmmm. #COVID #Paxlovid\n\ninsidemedicine.substack.com/p/the-end-of...", "created_at": "2026-04-27 13:41:01", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mki4kkglhm27", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Ex-Taiwan official recounts COVID response, warns of new pandemic\n->Daily Sabah | More on \"Taiwan official COVID pandemic warning\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid #Pandemic", "created_at": "2026-04-27 12:55:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2hcdxdkpsu2nucvday2aa2bc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkhxpk4qxs2x", "author_handle": "revvalkyrie.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "Runic🌦", "text": "#Covid is not mentioned anywhere anymore but guess what - #Covid isnt going anywhere,either. Huge resistance.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 12:29:05", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:sdpfj26vo23mrow5kwu2p4z4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkgpgg7vs2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3zyo4iakhqs47bttjalqgbk7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkkpblwk4s2p", "author_handle": "statsepi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Darren Dahly", "text": "Which is especially vexing given that most of that work is experimental and should in most places be fully specified in animal ethics applications any way. cc @nc3rs.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-04-28 13:36:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkklk7rr4k2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:r6nfoophrrjypmvry4waay4g/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfzak5jws22", "author_handle": "neurocritic.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "The Neurocritic", "text": "Thanks for doing this. More here:\n\nbsky.app/profile/neur...", "created_at": "2026-04-29 21:19:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jv5rbnjree7r734izzcxgjzc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiqunfpm22e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jv5rbnjree7r734izzcxgjzc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiqwjmzgk2e", "author_handle": "dezdezdez.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "And I think this older one is enlightening.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 19:00:08", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jv5rbnjree7r734izzcxgjzc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiqunfpm22e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkircnxrok2t", "author_handle": "deevybee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dorothy Bishop", "text": "thanks!", "created_at": "2026-04-27 19:06:53", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jv5rbnjree7r734izzcxgjzc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiqunfpm22e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jv5rbnjree7r734izzcxgjzc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkiszlroqs2e", "author_handle": "dezdezdez.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Any time!", "created_at": "2026-04-27 19:37:36", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkircnxrok2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:o7actnwbhkvglzhd3evg74eg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkif4ssslh2h", "author_handle": "epistemicnet.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Epistemic Net", "text": "Interesting to see in the transcript that: \"replication\" and \"leadership review\" are treated as separable topics. They're answers to the same question; who gets to validate knowledge claims, and through what infrastructure. The asymmetric appetite for that conversation is fascinating.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:28:51", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifwhi2hk2t", "author_handle": "deevybee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dorothy Bishop", "text": "YOU MUSTN’T CALL IT LEADERSHIP REVIEW! That’s FAKE NEWS!", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:43:12", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:o7actnwbhkvglzhd3evg74eg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkif4ssslh2h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:o7actnwbhkvglzhd3evg74eg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkighzrw6c26", "author_handle": "epistemicnet.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Epistemic Net", "text": "😂 \"Don't call it that\" is doing more epistemic work than most of the replication discussion.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 15:53:02", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkifwhi2hk2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jvp2aodynp7xcqiod7qek54u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkhe7y7bk22s", "author_handle": "ghdwalker1982.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "George H. D. Walker", "text": "", "created_at": "2026-04-27 05:40:31", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:fls4c6qc2o2jpdkkdfh5ow3n/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkj7i4yvic2f", "author_handle": "paulpharoah.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Paul Pharoah", "text": "I disagree with your view that \"engaging with the opposition in any difference of views, so you can build better arguments\" makes sense. JB is a zealot who does not engage with rational arguments. There is no necessity for better arguments.", "created_at": "2026-04-27 23:20:28", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjyfckcwc2j", "author_handle": "deevybee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dorothy Bishop", "text": "I agree you’re not likely to change his mind, but by challenging, and indeed preempting, his arguments you can influence others to be sceptical. And it’s not about winning an argument on the day, but rather getting him to put his views down publicly so they can be evaluated", "created_at": "2026-04-28 06:46:18", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:fls4c6qc2o2jpdkkdfh5ow3n/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkj7i4yvic2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:fls4c6qc2o2jpdkkdfh5ow3n/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkl57cxeyk2m", "author_handle": "paulpharoah.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Paul Pharoah", "text": "Fair enough. However, his views have been stated publicly many times and I think providing him with a platform just gives him more oxygen!", "created_at": "2026-04-28 17:45:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, the development of language, Katharine Nelson's work on \"Narratives from the Crib\" was based on Oster's parents recording her as a 2 year old www.hup.harvard.edu/books/978067...", "created_at": "2026-04-26 16:37:14", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:fhppxov7dlc6bqocnb5z6fna/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfzuf6s7k2q", "author_handle": "ajamesgreen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "James Green", "text": "Oster had come to my attention as she's often clashed with epidemiology's precautionary principle, taking contrarian positions on eg alcohol in pregnancy", "created_at": "2026-04-26 17:01:58", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "at://did:plc:c4xaehhi32ffwm6rhbf5yb7d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjemgilfs2m", "author_handle": "andrewtanyongyi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrew Tan", "text": "Thank you for this interesting view!\n\nI don't think Jay Bhattacharya acts in good faith, not because of his Santa Clara study & GBD, but because he's allied with anti-vaxxers & Christian nationalists who seek to destroy US public health & science. The latter may be obscured by focus on the former.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 00:52:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:c4xaehhi32ffwm6rhbf5yb7d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjfvqbif224", "author_handle": "andrewtanyongyi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrew Tan", "text": "Jay Bhattacharya's alliance with Christian nationalism is indicated by him having been a speaker at this conference at which Douglas Wilson (Pete Hegseth's pastor) spoke and Fr Calvin Robinson was a session chair.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 01:15:30", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:c4xaehhi32ffwm6rhbf5yb7d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjemgilfs2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:c4xaehhi32ffwm6rhbf5yb7d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjgcucokc24", "author_handle": "andrewtanyongyi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrew Tan", "text": "Bhattacharya's alliance with anti-vaxxers is indicated by his saying he'd sign anti-vaxxer Joseph Fraiman's recommendation that all mRNA vaccines be withdrawn. Bhattacharya said that mRNA vaccines were valuable in the past, but their continued usefulness to anyone is unclear without further RCTs.", "created_at": "2026-04-28 01:22:51", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:c4xaehhi32ffwm6rhbf5yb7d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjfvqbif224", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkfwu6jsbc2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bom4p44masckbj7vnfm6aunp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjvf5krw22j", "author_handle": "deevybee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dorothy Bishop", "text": "thanks Andrew. Others experience sudden deaths, heart attacks, strokes, debilitating systemic infections, heart failure, new autoimmune disorders, ... 🚨\n\nOver 50% of people, for some measures 70% or more, who have contracted #SARS-COV-2 suffer damage to their organs. 🚨\n\ndoi.org/10.1515/mr-2...", "created_at": "2026-04-25 22:22:01", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mke2eemcak2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mke2eemcak2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:n45iy5asfprr547iipk2kgzz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkdzvd37gc24", "author_handle": "jaxtait.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr Jackie Turvey Tait", "text": "This is true. We don't have a sterilising vaccine for #Covid. The vaccines we have wane quickly & the virus is evolving to evade them. More people will die from acute Covid & its insidious sequelae, or have their lives blighted by #LongCovid, until airborne infection control measures are in place.", "created_at": "2026-04-25 21:57:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etsr77fsueqgom37xotqd5fj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkduyol5o22z", "author_handle": "nightmajk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nettie Jo 👩🏻‍🏫", "text": "Got this jam on repeat today while I make #COVID #art.\n\nI'm breaking glass all over this sickbed today. #mosaics\n\n\"Revolution never comes with a warning...\"\n\nWhat are YOU listening to? Does it inspiring you to want to DO something?\n\n#MichaelFranti", "created_at": "2026-04-25 20:29:39", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7dbm3w33ugpwuuptrxmnintt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkdryvwck22n", "author_handle": "yavomladenov.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Yavo", "text": "Think about it: Just as COVID-19 depletes zinc leading to impaired sense of smell, so it depletes L-Arginine leading to a group of persistent symptoms, known as 'long covid.'\n\n#covid #Covid19 #SarsCovid19 #LongCovid #Biohacking #Nutraceuticals", "created_at": "2026-04-25 19:36:03", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkdqndtdga27", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "I'm still playing Forza Horizon 3 a decade after release — here's why I can't get enough of its beautiful world https://cstu.io/0a5e4d #robotics #iot #covid", "created_at": "2026-04-25 19:11:39", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkdnpisxrk2x", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\nBecause everyone, including 🇨🇦 doctors, is at risk of #LongCOVID after enough #Reinfections. \n\nWhat the public needs to hear, is that Long COVID is preventable. And that the way to avoid it, is to avoid #COVID. Which is also preventable. \n\n#WeAreNotHelpless", "created_at": "2026-04-25 18:19:10", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkdnpiggfs2x", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nThis weight will lift off our collective shoulders when members of @cmadocs.bsky.social start wearing #N95 masks ✅, focus on #IAQ ✅, run #HEPAs ✅ - & stop telling the public that #COVID is just like \"any other respiratory illness\" ❎, & that they can #VaxAndRelax ❎.", "created_at": "2026-04-25 18:19:10", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkdnpisxrk2x", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. new report reveals impact of US funding cuts on HIV programs in South Africa; and US #CDC blocks #COVID vaccine study raising concerns on #science, policy & transparency.\n\navac.org/blog/global-...", "created_at": "2026-04-24 14:36:49", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etsr77fsueqgom37xotqd5fj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkamii3qks2s", "author_handle": "nightmajk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nettie Jo 👩🏻‍🏫", "text": "Flipping through photos of #cicadas today\n\nCuz this latest #COVID variant takes its name from that insect.\n\nI find the name far too cute to describe what my body feels like rn\n\nbut adding bright red \"eyes\" to my COVID #art\n\namuses TF outta me\n\nso... 👩🏻‍🎨🎨🫟\n\nHave a good day. 💙\n\nStay safe. 😷\n\n#inspo", "created_at": "2026-04-24 13:19:23", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkalvef2w22j", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "#Covid\n\nSchätzung Infektionsinzidenzen für Zürich aufgrund Kalibrierung der Abwasserprävalenzen Werdhölzli, Daten bis 19. Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Long COVID in children doubles risk of poor grades\n->News-Medical | More on \"Long COVID children school performance\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:49:53", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nlyrswb2z", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "🇺🇸 Après l'avoir suspendue, le ministère américain de la Santé bloque la publication d'un énième rapport montrant une baisse de 50% du risque d'hospitalisation chez les adultes (re)vaccinés contre le #Covid cet automne/hiver.\n\n1/3", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:01:14", "like_count": 20, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 14, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nm63pel2h", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "Il met en avant des problèmes sur \"l'approche méthodologique utilisée pour estimer l'efficacité du vaccin\", basée notamment sur le résultat d'un test positif ou négatif.\n\nUne chercheuse décrit pourtant \"un protocole d'étude standard et bien établi, utilisé depuis longtemps\".\n\n2/3", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:01:19", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nlyrswb2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nlyrswb2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nmdelci2r", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "Par ailleurs, des études basées sur la même méthodo sont déjà parus dans de grandes revues scientifiques. Ainsi, \"cela ressemble fort à une ingérence dans les processus scientifiques d'une personne nommée à un poste politique\".\n\n3/3", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:01:25", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nm63pel2h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nlyrswb2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qet25pm2c4vn2zoembiqokud/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk65xxz22223", "author_handle": "antiextreme.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "LFI=RN", "text": "En voilà une surprise 😲", "created_at": "2026-04-23 13:54:14", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nmdelci2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nlyrswb2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5msaarhk2h", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "Running Point season 2 Netflix dedication explained: who is Niko Mijailovic? https://cstu.io/7c56c9 #internet #covid #oneplus", "created_at": "2026-04-23 08:46:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5kgrzacl2j", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Could Iran war trigger bigger trade crisis than COVID?\n->Deutsche Welle | More on \"Iran war global trade crisis\" at BigEarthData.ai | #IranWar #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-23 08:04:38", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3lkp6xj3vtrwvtd3szj4x2hy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5kck3uns2s", "author_handle": "darlingultra.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "DarlingUltra", "text": "Soso. Viele Kinder sollen nun bis zur Einschulung gefördert werden.\n\nAber: Vor allem der hohe Krankenstand (‼️) erlaube häufig keine individuelle Förderung, die über die reguläre Betreuung hinausgehe.\n\nwww.ndr.de/nachrichten/...\n\n#COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-23 06:54:58", "like_count": 25, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 6, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:me3o5ooamjxa5mdbnmzzpbde/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nxjjiac2l", "author_handle": "impfluencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Impf-Fluencer", "text": "Lass mich raten: Die jetzt, im Jahr 2026 5- jährigen Kinder, sind alle so inkompetent, weil sie als Eizellen im Lockdown 2020 so wenig soziale Kontakte hatten?", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:07:40", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5gk64jvk2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5gk64jvk2c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5qpafodc2c", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Sie hatten damals aber tatsächlich nur wenige Kontakte. 😉\n\nSpäter dann mehr, z.B. in der Kita. Spencer", "text": "2/\nArticles like these abound: the gnashing of bureaucratic teeth, fretting about \"chronic absenteeism\" while ignoring high levels of chronic illness resulting from an ongoing pandemic now in its 7th untrammelled year - \n\nbsky.app/profile/tani...", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:49:42", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s525ogc2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s525ogc2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s2wntquc2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "Hi, these are the weekly #washingtonstate #kingcounty (that is, #seattle and environs) #COVID #COVID19 #wastewater toots. Which are updated this week, yay!\n\nA quick reminder that this King County respiratory disease data comes from Washington State, not the […] \n\n[Original post on infosec.exchange]", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:48:45", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s4wyo5vc2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "The Brightwater sewage treatment plant (BWT) in Woodinville 7DRA numbers is also low. The last 7DRA calculation was made on 4/15.", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:49:46", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s2wntquc2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s2wntquc2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s6srqedc2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "The last of the three King County sites is King County South (KCS) treatment plant, and its Sars-CoV-2 7DRA numbers spiked up, welp. The last 7DRA calculation was made on 4/15.", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:50:46", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s4wyo5vc2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4s2wntquc2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qncnobc2u", "author_handle": "ugbookshelf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Underground Bookshelf", "text": "April is FND Awareness Month! I acquired functional neurological disorder a few years ago as a result of COVID infection. I experience intermittent paralysis, muscle weakness, brain fog, tremors, and non-epileptic seizures as a result.\n\n#FNDAware #FND #disability #covid\n\nfndhope.org/fndaware/", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:23:02", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qnyihls2u", "author_handle": "ugbookshelf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Underground Bookshelf", "text": "FND comes with a lot of stigma both in the medical community and the general public in part due to its previous name: hysteria. Because it is invisible to most brain scans, it's easy to brush symptoms off as \"made up.\"", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:23:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qncnobc2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qncnobc2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qtdrwt22u", "author_handle": "ugbookshelf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Underground Bookshelf", "text": "But my symptoms are most definitely not \"made up.\" They affect my life every day. As a writer, I've explored some of my experiences through my poetry and fiction. I harp on representation a lot, but that's because it is key to overcoming misinformation, stigma, ableism, and inaccessibility.", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:26:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qnyihls2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:my3fhhomu5p42wuvu5rrqzh6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4qncnobc2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:k6a35s56ijvrb4zjkq4ojll5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4pezplbw2b", "author_handle": "toptags.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Trending Hashtags", "text": "🔥 BlueSky trending hashtags (30m) #16-30:\n\n#cum #artsky #gay #musicsky #dogsofbluesky #ass #cats #covid #nature #illustration #humpday #digitalart #realnsfw #horny #aiart\n\n👇 #1-15 trending hashtags", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:00:27", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5qs453s3a5ynhnh5ulg7v4fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4owtrfes22", "author_handle": "deadlyauntiemystic.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mystic", "text": "I miss working from home and not having bullshit eye stuff. #covid #oldvideo", "created_at": "2026-04-22 23:52:32", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jiqx32zryh5olgrrru2mwzzx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk6zsuycgc2f", "author_handle": "gothicrenaissance.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "I wish your bullshit eyestuff to come to an end and your sight restored. Und auch dann werde ich mich weiterhin vor Krankheiten schützen, denn ich habe dazugelernt.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 21:46:16", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4fodjqds2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4fodjqds2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4iu2yl322l", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Ja, eigentlich kann man mit SARS-CoV-2 keine Kompromisse schließen. Aber das muss jede*r für sich selbst entscheiden. Ich verstehe nur dieses Mitteilungsbedürfnis nicht. Warum muss man es öffentlich kundtun? Ist das so eine Art Ablasshandel?", "created_at": "2026-04-22 22:03:36", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rxcibd3qisrta23gzaqjwibx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4hv2xtzc2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4fodjqds2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4fnvfau224", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #spurs #chelseaFC\n\nMatrix - Breaking News End of the Tudor Rose football", "created_at": "2026-04-22 21:06:42", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dewjhlc2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\n\" #ClimateChange denialism & #COVID denialism both lead to inaction. This inaction means individuals don’t know what needs to be done, or that anything needs to be done\":\n\nopen.substack.com/pub/uptonreb...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:25:41", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hve3e4ytdgrmbohnbvrpb742/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dgf3yts2k", "author_handle": "airspotrob.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "AirSpot 😷❤️", "text": "bsky.app/profile/airs...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:26:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dewjhlc2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dewjhlc2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dexsquk2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nAnd, \"Denialism leads to more inaction from governments, politicians, institutions, corporations, & employers. It leads to inaction from the #Media as they ignore the issue or circulate misinformation instead of covering the issue responsibly\".", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:25:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dewjhlc2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4dewjhlc2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3y4deyn6kw7aehox6e52gt7l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4cqutds52o", "author_handle": "democracymatters.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Democracy Matters!", "text": "RFK will kill us all. RFK must go.\n\nCDC refuses to publish valid study detailing the effectiveness of COVID vaccines\nwww.lawyersgunsmoneyblog.com/2026/04/cdc-...\n\n#PublicHealth #BobKennedy #PublicHealth #Vaccines #CDC #COVID #RepublicansDidThis #NoRepublicansEverAgain #USPol", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:14:28", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:b3qel3lxiz5eb6tx62vzkptu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4cqtnji6m2", "author_handle": "democracymattersalot.mstdn.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Democracy Matters :verified:", "text": "RFK will kill us all. RFK must go.\n\nCDC refuses to publish valid study detailing the effectiveness of COVID vaccines\nhttps://www.lawyersgunsmoneyblog.com/2026/04/cdc-refuses-to-publish-valid-study-detailing-the-effectiveness-of-covid-vaccines\n\n#PublicHealth #BobKennedy #PublicHealth #Vaccines […]", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:14:31", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etsr77fsueqgom37xotqd5fj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bx474wk23", "author_handle": "nightmajk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nettie Jo 👩🏻‍🏫", "text": "I'm fascinated by how \"soft\" it looks, like a child's toy.\n\nAre the triangular spike proteins squishy? 🤔🧐\n\nThis model looks like it's been created in crushed velvet.\n\nI am enchanted by this beautiful (and deadly) little thing. 🤧😷\n\n#molecule #COVID #biology #medicine #curiosity #virology", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:00:07", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bwcfpta2e", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "A fresh take on the 'COVID generation': How the pandemic may have changed young people for the better\n->Newswise | More on \"Youth resilience during COVID pandemic\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Pandemic #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:59:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "#Moderna groß in Form! Nach dem #mNexspike (Nachfolger von Spikevax) hat die EU jetzt auch den Kombi-Impfstoff #mCOMBRIAX gegen #Covid und #Influenza zugelassen.\nwww.accessnewswire.com/newsroom/en/...\n#TeamVorsicht #ImpfenSchuetzt\n1/2", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:53:49", "like_count": 72, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 26, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vyhpgrtxd3okzopdpy4gcbi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bz7lewk2i", "author_handle": "taubenschwanz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Frau A aus S", "text": "Oh! Dann nächsten Herbst nur noch eine Impfung? 😍", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:01:12", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nxo5y6s2g", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "Ja, wenn der Impfstoff im Herbst wirklich verfügbar ist, es terminlich passt (Influenza nicht zu früh impfen) und du mindestens 50 Jahre alt bist.", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:07:45", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:vyhpgrtxd3okzopdpy4gcbi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bz7lewk2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vyhpgrtxd3okzopdpy4gcbi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5ofwoqns2h", "author_handle": "taubenschwanz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Frau A aus S", "text": "Cool! Dann hoffe ich mal, dass das alles hinhaut.", "created_at": "2026-04-23 09:15:45", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk5nxo5y6s2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blytv2c22", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "Hauptvorteil ist wohl der Influenza-Impfstoff auf mRNA-Basis, der gegenüber herkömmlichen Grippe-Impfstoffen sehr gut abschneidet. Das ist der hier: mRNA-1010.\nwww.newswire.com/news/moderna...\n2/2", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:53:49", "like_count": 22, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:y2xa7essvxpm5ksca657wbbg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4d5q6aoc2w", "author_handle": "sophief.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Miss_the_way_is_green", "text": "Schön 🤩 \n\nHoffentlich denken die bis dahin noch alle wichtigen Varianten ab. 🙏", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:21:39", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blytv2c22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4r27mwws2v", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "Nachtrag: Ein Wermutstropfen ist, dass die Zulassung von mCOMBRIAX nur für Menschen ab 50 Jahren beantragt wurde 🫣", "created_at": "2026-04-23 00:30:12", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blytv2c22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:uo3ipihcdj7jc5nrgp7ua3yf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk56tnfnxc2n", "author_handle": "molestando.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Molestando", "text": "😢 Muss ja auch Vorteile haben, alt zu sein! 😁", "created_at": "2026-04-23 04:37:05", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4r27mwws2v", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4blxqj7k22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ylgwqpdn77gfogxn4tk2fxfo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bd3gbns2k", "author_handle": "lykos-phi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lykos_Phi", "text": "Aber Durchseuchung der Kinder mit #Covid geht auch munter weiter - wird nur vorsätzlich nicht mehr nachgemessen!\nWenn Kinder 10x #Sars2 hatten, sind verdeckte PHYSISCHE BIOLOGISCH-MEDIZINISCHE Long-Covid-Fälle wahrscheinlich, die gern falsch psychologisiert werden\n\nTHE ILLNESS WICH MUST NOT BE NAMED", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:48:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:b342uzazf2ebc5rgrtaojgvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bcvzbjk25", "author_handle": "well1647.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Truth and Justice For All", "text": "Glad Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick is out after allegations she funneled millions in COVID relief funds through businesses and family to finance her campaign—but this shouldn’t stop here. Both parties must face consequences when they do illegal activity. #SheilaCherfilusMcCormick #COVID #Congress", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:48:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ylgwqpdn77gfogxn4tk2fxfo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4bcmcce22k", "author_handle": "lykos-phi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lykos_Phi", "text": "Aber Durchseuchung der Kinder mit #Covid geht auch munter weiter - wird nur vorsätzlich nicht mehr nachgemessen!\nWenn Kinder 10x #Sars2 hatten, sind verdeckte PHYSISCHE BIOLOGISCH-MEDIZINISCHE Long-Covid-Fälle wahrscheinlich, die gern falsch psychologisiert werden\n\nTHE ILLNESS WICH MUST NOT BE NAMED", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:48:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jle22w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\nClearly, (1) epidemics & pandemics don't just go away with government denial; & (2) adding #COVID infections to immune systems already compromised by HIV/AIDs, can help SARS-CoV-2 mutate ( #Omicron). \n\nIn sum: we urgently need ALL #Media to raise #COVID awareness, inform, & talk truth to power.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jpb22w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "10/\n* I was a young journalist in KwaZulu-Natal during the 90s. I saw the HIV/AIDS crisis unfold, firsthand. And in 2020 when I developed #LongCOVID, I wasn't the least bit surprised by the self-serving political incompetence that followed, globally. \n\nWe've learned nothing.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jle22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jle22w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nAnd many of us who witnessed this government denial (accompanied with patient silencing due to social stigma), have a strong sense of déjà vu now with this #OngoingPandemic of #COVID / #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiym45c2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nWhile the first #AIDS cases were reported in 1984-1985, it was only in 1995 that the full force of the epidemic in South Africa began to be felt, & government denial went into overdrive - \n\nwww.theguardian.com/world/2008/n...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aizeu522w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nThe consequence? \n\nA generation of #AIDS orphans raised by their grandmothers (on miserable pensions) - \n\nhumanrights.ca/story/powere...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiym45c2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj25uw22w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nSadly, \"South Africa remains the epicenter of the HIV pandemic as the largest AIDS epidemic in the world—20 percent of all people living with HIV are in South Africa, and 20 percent of new HIV infections occur there too\":\n\nwww.csis.org/analysis/wor...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aizeu522w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jle22w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\nClearly, (1) epidemics & pandemics don't just go away with government denial; & (2) adding #COVID infections to immune systems already compromised by HIV/AIDs, can help SARS-CoV-2 mutate ( #Omicron). \n\nIn sum: we urgently need ALL #Media to raise #COVID awareness, inform, & talk truth to power.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj25uw22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jpb22w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "10/\n* I was a young journalist in KwaZulu-Natal during the 90s. I saw the HIV/AIDS crisis unfold, firsthand. And in 2020 when I developed #LongCOVID, I wasn't the least bit surprised by the self-serving political incompetence that followed, globally. \n\nWe've learned nothing.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aj3jle22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nWhile most of #MSM is still asleep at the wheel, some small #Media outlets/publications continue to do an excellent job of raising awareness about #COVID & #LongCOVID. \n\nFor example, the @thesicktimes.org - \n\nthesicktimes.org/write-for-us...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 47, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 15, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiswqgk2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nAnd more recently, @thewhn.bsky.social -\n\nwhn.global/voices-magaz...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiu4gic2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nTheir efforts are reminiscent of a community magazine that a handful of us (doctors, psychologists, activists, & journalists) produced in the 90s, during the #HIV/AIDS crisis in 🇿🇦 South Africa -", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiswqgk2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylwbs2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nI have never forgotten photographing this young person for the cover. Nor his sorrow. We were the same age, & his future was bleak because no help was coming. \n\nWhy? \n\nFour decades ago, when #HIV/AIDS began to circulate, it was met with reflexive government denial.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiu4gic2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nAnd many of us who witnessed this government denial (accompanied with patient silencing due to social stigma), have a strong sense of déjà vu now with this #OngoingPandemic of #COVID / #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylwbs2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiym45c2w", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nWhile the first #AIDS cases were reported in 1984-1985, it was only in 1995 that the full force of the epidemic in South Africa began to be felt, & government denial went into overdrive - \n\nwww.theguardian.com/world/2008/n...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:34:18", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4aiylz7k2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:age5xvis2s2vy5qiz2tjxoc6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4c35k56c25", "author_handle": "thesicktimes.org", "author_display_name": "The Sick Times", "text": "Thank you! 💜", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:02:17", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4clyxs7s2c", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "Actually, thank you! 🙏", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:11:43", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:age5xvis2s2vy5qiz2tjxoc6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4c35k56c25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4airbjck2w"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etsr77fsueqgom37xotqd5fj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk46orqdxs2n", "author_handle": "nightmajk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nettie Jo 👩🏻‍🏫", "text": "#Art inspires and informs my life.\n\nThe reverse is also true.\n\nI'm cozy in my bed, sipping herbal tea with a heating pad against my aching spine right now.\n\nI'm snooping around the 'net, researching the latest #variants of the #COVID virus.\n\nSo I can #create art.\n\n#tinyart #science #science", "created_at": "2026-04-22 19:01:46", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4q2kjxsqxwnmox4bgqzmlshi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk463zxg5c23", "author_handle": "democracycatalyst.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Democracy Dog", "text": "www.nytimes.com/2026/04/22/u...\n\nCan we NOT bury the facts, please.\n\n#sunlight #COVID #science", "created_at": "2026-04-22 18:51:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk45uljhws2b", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #epstein\n\nMatrix - Crusaders - Richie Lionheart and Prince Harry", "created_at": "2026-04-22 18:47:22", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etsr77fsueqgom37xotqd5fj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk44yshz4s2y", "author_handle": "nightmajk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nettie Jo 👩🏻‍🏫", "text": "Sending lots of love out to my #MGB and #RiversideCC #healthcare teams.\n\nThank you for the check-in phone calls today. 📞\n\n#COVID is tough but your kind words of #support and care help me feel like I'm not alone in my recovery process.\n\nYou are appreciated.\n\n💙💙💙💙💙💙💙💙\n\n#mentalhealth #Boston #community", "created_at": "2026-04-22 18:31:29", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:s3u2auluizgmm6kpy6aevhed/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk43jf2yvs2p", "author_handle": "publichealthinst.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Public Health Institute", "text": "The study, conducted by researchers at PHI's @getitrightonmj.bsky.social and @kaiser-permanente.bsky.social, analyzed 1.3 million pediatric screenings from 2011-24 and found #adolescent use increased after recreational #cannabis was legalized in California, but dropped during #COVID.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 18:05:05", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:s3u2auluizgmm6kpy6aevhed/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk43jgaoxk2p", "author_handle": "publichealthinst.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Public Health Institute", "text": "The #study points to the need for additional #research to better understand the impact of local #cannabis policy on #adolescent use. Read the full study pubished by @jama.com: jamanetwork.com/journals/jam...\n\n@kaiser-permanente.bsky.social @getitrightonmj.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-04-22 18:05:06", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:s3u2auluizgmm6kpy6aevhed/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk43jf2yvs2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:s3u2auluizgmm6kpy6aevhed/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk43jf2yvs2p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zzdq7bzha6z4htkbaogbgwrx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk424fpjlk2u", "author_handle": "maickelronzino.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "\"El #COVID puso de manifiesto la excesiva dependencia de un centro de fabricación, mientras que #Ormuz puso de manifiesto la excesiva dependencia de un corredor de transporte y de los insumos energéticos\", explica un analista de cadenas de suministro.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 17:39:51", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zzdq7bzha6z4htkbaogbgwrx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3zpuq6322u", "author_handle": "maickelronzino.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "¿La guerra en #Irán reformará el #comercio más que el #COVID? Mientras la guerra en Irán sigue latente, los expertos en comercio se preguntan si este conflicto cambiará las cadenas de suministro más que la pandemia.\nwww.dw.com/es/la-guerra...", "created_at": "2026-04-22 17:32:52", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zzdq7bzha6z4htkbaogbgwrx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk424fpjlk2u", "author_handle": "maickelronzino.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "\"El #COVID puso de manifiesto la excesiva dependencia de un centro de fabricación, mientras que #Ormuz puso de manifiesto la excesiva dependencia de un corredor de transporte y de los insumos energéticos\", explica un analista de cadenas de suministro.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 17:39:51", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:zzdq7bzha6z4htkbaogbgwrx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3zpuq6322u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:zzdq7bzha6z4htkbaogbgwrx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3zpuq6322u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3x6isysc2q", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "The Christian Nationalist movement expanded over the past 5 years by sowing distrust in vaccines. First with mRNA #COVID vaccines and now flu vaccines. It's what unifies their ongoing coup against the US.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 16:47:24", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3u4pckk6t2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "Lena Sun has a follow up story, saying that the CDC won’t publish the 2025-2026 vaccine effectiveness findings:\n\nhttps://www.washingtonpost.com/health/2026/04/22/covid-vaccine-report-blocked-cdc-mmwr/\n\n#COVID #COVID19", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:52:39", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mkjhew37x722", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "Jeremy Faust got a copy of the censored paper and published it: https://insidemedicine.substack.com/p/exclusive-heres-the-covid-19-vaccine.\n\nFaust’s source says that they think RFKJr doesn’t want to publish the study because he wants to weaken CDC recommendations for the vaccines this year […]", "created_at": "2026-04-28 01:41:56", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3u4pckk6t2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3u4pckk6t2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3tydjyns2x", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #epstein\n\nMatrix - what time did you die Lizzie 2nd ? 1510?", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:50:30", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "Hier noch ein Thread vom Autor @snpoehlm.bsky.social dazu:\nbsky.app/profile/snpo...\nIch verstehe die These so: Es wird grundsätzlich schwerer für das Virus, eine neue Variante zu entwickeln, die erfolgreich sehr viele Menschen infizieren kann,\n#TeamVorsicht #Covid\n1/5", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:22:14", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeotxc2k", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "weil mittlerweile viele Menschen eine erhebliche Immunität entwickelt haben und diese Immunität auch nicht bei allen gleich ist. Das erscheint mir logisch, da die Historie der Begegnungen mit dem Virus durch Infektionen und Impfungen individuell sehr unterschiedlich ist.\n2/5", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:22:14", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeovvs2k", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "Das führt dazu, dass nicht mehr wie früher eine einzige sehr erfolgreiche Variante alle anderen weitgehend verdrängt. Sondern es kommt zu einem gleichzeitigen Zirkulieren mehrerer Varianten (auch regional unterschiedlich). Potenziell kommt es damit insgesamt zu weniger Infektionen,\n3/5", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:22:14", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeotxc2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeovvt2k", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "mit kleineren und relativ regelmäßigen Wellen, da diese nicht durch das (nicht planbare) Auftreten neuer Varianten getriggert werden, sondern sich aus dem relativ gleichmäßigen Prozess abnehmender Immunität nach der letzten Begegnung mit dem Virus ergeben.\n4/5", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:22:14", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeovvs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeovvu2k", "author_handle": "hwiesenmueller.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heidrun Wiesenmüller", "text": "Zusätzlich zu Sinken der absoluten Infektionszahlen insgesamt (was wir ja schon seit einiger Zeit beobachten können), würde das vermutlich auch bedeuten, dass die Phasen mit höherem Risiko besser vorhersehbar sind. (Ich hoffe, ich habe mir das richtig zusammengereimt).\n5/5", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:22:14", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeovvt2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vokrztzsdmxkcepu5fqhpakd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4cjsla6s2c", "author_handle": "kannitverstan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Kannitverstan", "text": "Klingt schlüssig. Vielen Dank für dieses persönliche Resümee.\nDie bessere Vorhersehbarkeit von Phasen mit höherem Risiko wär ein großer Gewinn!", "created_at": "2026-04-22 20:10:31", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgeovvu2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gjkbl5b7azkklcdlwl3b5fhx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3sgebcec2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3rgs7sbk2c", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "Likewise. I never thought we’d normalize an organ- and immune system-damaging virus as a simple respiratory virus, but here we are. One led to the next. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-22 15:04:34", "like_count": 36, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 7, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3q7u3bh22g", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #epstein\n\nMatrix - Next level connections , The Empire Lizzies.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 14:43:08", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3pk2ffny2b", "author_handle": "nicolasberrod.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nicolas Berrod", "text": "Le ministre américain de la guerre Pete Hegseth a qualifié la vaccination obligatoire des militaires contre le #Covid à l'époque de \"trahison\".\n\nPour rappel, plus de 8 000 militaires avaient été écartés pour avoir refusé de se faire vacciner.\n\n3/3", "created_at": "2026-04-22 14:30:36", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tray2rmvmui6dxyavsde2sqd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3quqk2dc2p", "author_handle": "tropcuit.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "Là-haut sur la colline", "text": "Ensuite, il faudra regrouper ces militaires dans des unités de fidèles parmi les fidèles et les affecter aux postes clés dans les états majoritairement démocrates.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 14:54:29", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3pk2ffny2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3pk2ffny2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:p3vqxp6xls3rbdlvke5yomli/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3pqtmr322e", "author_handle": "andreolli.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "La Chine, la Russie, l'Iran applaudissent. Ils ne sont pas les seuls.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 14:34:24", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3pk2ffny2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jdmdyejmo3wm4ecby6c6jvfb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3pk2ffny2b"} {"uri": scientific-review process, which includes dozens of scientists,\" #COVID #vaccine #CDC\n\n#RFKJr #MAHA suppress data they does not align with their #antivax narrative\n\nwapo.st/41JhAhb", seatbelts and airbags, masks are like responsible driving.\n\n#CovidIsNotOver #CovidIsAirborne #KeepMasksInHealthCare #maskup #WearAMask #VaccinesPlus #covid19 #covid #SARSCov2 #DavosSafe pharmacy. In #Alberta I don't \"qualify\" for the free shot, but fortunately my insurance covered it. Wasn't sure if it would since I was also covered in the Fall. #ABHealth #CovidIsntOver", "created_at": "2026-04-22 01:03:21", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d", "author_handle": "soumya-goblue.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Soumya Rangarajan, MD, MPP", "text": "I'm thankful Dr. Jacobs can watch all 7 of these hearings, I was barely able to get through one with my sanity intact (the worst thing among all the awful shit he said in W&M was that people didn't die of #COVID, they died of chronic diseases)\n\nTook a great deal of effort to not throw my stress ball", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:29:05", "like_count": 19, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rd2t2hxlkdvamoh5cvmzwlo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2hamdf6c2e", "author_handle": "notmiddlec.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "C", "text": "Yeah I screamed when he said family caregivers shouldn't be paid to do what they used to do for free.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 02:29:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2hfsys4k24", "author_handle": "soumya-goblue.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Soumya Rangarajan, MD, MPP", "text": "Oh yes I remember that from Ways & Means, I was gritting my teeth and had that stress ball in a vice. I know of a #Pediatrician who had to give up her entire practice to care for her frail mother.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 02:32:24", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rd2t2hxlkdvamoh5cvmzwlo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2hamdf6c2e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rd2t2hxlkdvamoh5cvmzwlo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2hqkmle22v", "author_handle": "notmiddlec.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "C", "text": "He's primarily trashing Medicaid HCBS, which, even when someone is eligible, still doesn't cover everything. Also, caregiving is not a 1 person job. \n\nYou'd think he'd know better when one of his own relatives needed life-long care.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 02:38:23", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2hfsys4k24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk25c4rsos2d", "author_handle": "soumya-goblue.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Soumya Rangarajan, MD, MPP", "text": "", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:31:26", "like_count": 11, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mqqmv2kmo7q3dfs3vwizyoxy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk25uaieu22k", "author_handle": "martenhawkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marten Hawkins", "text": "Yahhhhh. There’s actual medical reasons why me asking about how people immigrated matters and why it being an even more loaded question affects my practice… these clinics also do TB testing/treatment and a bunch of other ID things and NONE of this available on CareEverywhere usually.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:41:31", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk25c4rsos2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mqqmv2kmo7q3dfs3vwizyoxy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk25vrxzmc2k", "author_handle": "martenhawkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marten Hawkins", "text": "Especially in tests that perform poorly and pre-test probability is CRITICAL, which is most of these things. Le sigh.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:42:23", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mqqmv2kmo7q3dfs3vwizyoxy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk25uaieu22k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk255u65522d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk26pbvrdc2d", "author_handle": "soumya-goblue.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Soumya Rangarajan, MD, MPP", "text": "Oh I get it, I definitely remember the importance of #travel history in my #ID rotations!
