Spencer", "text": "2/\nIncreasingly, the puzzling medical consequences of #COVID infections are popping up outside of #LongCOVID support groups, such as this one in a subreddit -", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:20:00", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk24npsefc2e", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n\" Parosmia is a well-documented consequence of smell loss associated with Covid 19\":\n\npmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC...", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:20:00", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk24nogstk2e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk24nogstk2e"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk24nr63sk2e", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n\"Those who experience this qualitative olfactory disorder during recovery find that the odour of common foods & household items is distorted, & the experience can range from merely altered to profoundly disgusting\".", "created_at": "2026-04-21 23:20:00", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk24npsefc2e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk24nogstk2e"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etsr77fsueqgom37xotqd5fj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzwapeya22j", "author_handle": "nightmajk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nettie Jo 👩🏻‍🏫", "text": "Wonderful.\n\n#COVID and I go waaaayyy back.\n\nI guess two previous infections in 2020 in MS, and six long years spent in #recovery in Boston don't mean a damned thing now.\n\nWhat fresh hell is this 3rd go-round going to produce in my body?\n\nI'm devastated by this news. 😷\n\n#disability #LongHauler", "created_at": "2026-04-21 21:26:49", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzv57kvz225", "author_handle": "soumya-goblue.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Soumya Rangarajan, MD, MPP", "text": "I found out that a #government #lobbyist for the AMA (American #Medical Association) makes more than most #primarycare physicians in the country. At the top end they make more than I did even the year I did a ton of #moonlighting as front-line in #COVID wards ($180k-$240k)", "created_at": "2026-04-21 21:05:29", "like_count": 11, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzvh72wxc25", "author_handle": "soumya-goblue.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Soumya Rangarajan, MD, MPP", "text": "I actually have both the things they need (a Masters in Public Policy (or Political Science, etc) and #CapitolHill experience) to just walk into making more money than I ever did seeing #patients. \n\nI dislike the AMA, would hate lobbying, not a thing I would ever do, but 🤦🏻‍♀️ great system we have here", "created_at": "2026-04-21 21:11:06", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nxlh63mkcieh3tjloibre7hp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzv57kvz225", "root_uri": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "Intriguingly, they see the <1 year old spared, like in the Scottish hospital admission data. "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphmobwc27", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "They also look at severity, albeit at a population level. Would be highly interesting to know if they see any signal if they stratify. \n\nI couldn't, using German hospital admission data (see thread).\n\nSource: www.phfscience.nz/digital-libr...\n\nbsky.app/profile/domi...", "created_at": "2026-04-21 09:51:17", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphkoqps27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": think", "created_at": "2026-04-21 11:13:00", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphmobwc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyuaqeb7s2f", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "I presume they have too low numbers.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 11:16:53", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:x52pjfao7boifdjfglqtymbc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjytzr4sfk2v", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:x52pjfao7boifdjfglqtymbc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyuqesyvk2v", "author_handle": "catlove40476297.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Catlover", "text": "Wouldn't be a problem by July", "created_at": "2026-04-21 11:25:39", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyuaqeb7s2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:c25e6vi7ojpyitmoi3xpuvpf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2n5rekqk2c", "author_handle": "thoughtfulnz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "David Hood", "text": "FWIW, without knowing what the exact variant people had, \nin the 28 days to 30 July 2025 there were 50 under 10 hospitalisations (and 400 older for 11% <10).\nin the 30 days to 19 April 2026 there were 55 under 10 (227 older folk for 20% <10) but driving that is the fall in older hospitalisations", "created_at": "2026-04-22 04:15:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyuaqeb7s2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rcxyibhzcrkyqwjow4yddom6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2bdizvtc2n", "author_handle": "ryanhisner.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ryan Hisner", "text": "Given that BA.3.2 is massively overrepresented in youth, you'd expect its hospitalization rate to be much, much lower. The fact it's about equal to other variants could be an indication it tends to cause more severe acute illness than other variants. Note enough data to say anything w/confidence.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 00:43:46", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphmobwc27", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2kwh2dzc2f", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "Quite vexing that surveillance has gotten so poor that this cannot be readily determined. \n\nFWIW, in the Scottish age-stratified data, test positivities rose along with admission incidences. During the German BA.3.2 maximum, cases (from ED visits?) to admissions, age-stratified, remained stable.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 03:35:24", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rcxyibhzcrkyqwjow4yddom6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2bdizvtc2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2t4z2gfs2a", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "Regarding your argument: Possibly, the fact that still one third of <1 are BA.3.2 and that age group has very high hospitalisation incidences (independent of BA.2) accounts for the whole-population result in the figure? Very hard to say much without stratification.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 06:02:15", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2kwh2dzc2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7uu3o2u47rjeadff3bueso2u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4kjf47mk2f", "author_handle": "michaelsfuhrer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Prof. Michael Fuhrer", "text": "There's actually enough information here to test a couple hypotheses. \n\nIn fact, I think we can rule out changes in severity alone being responsible for the observations.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 22:33:29", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rcxyibhzcrkyqwjow4yddom6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2bdizvtc2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7uu3o2u47rjeadff3bueso2u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4kjgqx4k2f", "author_handle": "michaelsfuhrer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Prof. Michael Fuhrer", "text": "From this chart we can determine that there were 39 BA.3.2 community cases, and 26 BA.3.2 hospitalized cases. \n\nSo the 35 BA.3.2 child cases can't all be hospital cases, at most 26/35.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 22:33:29", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7uu3o2u47rjeadff3bueso2u/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk4kjf47mk2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyphgnf3227"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjydgjkqos2o", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "\"Because the conditions that produced COVID‑19 haven’t disappeared...\" \n\n- and actually neither has #COVID. \n\n@profesterman.bsky.social \nVia @thecovidinfoguy.bsky.social \n\nmedium.com/@adrian.este...", "created_at": "2026-04-21 06:15:55", "like_count": 16, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2kr3cva3i7sgaf6zjnlhh5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjybmyu3wc2h", "author_handle": "eviebauer727.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🦋 kris🌻⋆⋆⋆", "text": "🦠 LA JOLLA, CA — We’re keeping an eye on new influenza and SARS-CoV-2 viral variants. Here’s what we know about those viruses—and your immune system’s ability to fight back. \n#COVID #Cicada #Influenza\nwww.lji.org/news-events/...", "created_at": "2026-04-21 05:43:45", "like_count": 3, Respirator masks are still one of the simplest ways to reduce risk, for you and the people around you.\n\n#COVID19 #COVIDIsNotOver #COVID #LongCOVID #InfectionPrevention #PublicHealth #LongCOVIDAwareness", "created_at": "2026-04-21 00:30:59", "like_count": 129, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 63, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xltjrmjffpamujgujtglxbyo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlkupcscmk2o", "author_handle": "marilynjs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marilyn Difficult Shepherd", "text": "covid never existed, no one ever has to muzzle themselves, it's a con and a lie easily proved to be a lie", "created_at": "2026-05-11 08:38:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jj3szqwfglmbzrzuj7m6rhhz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxq5okpf22i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:jj3szqwfglmbzrzuj7m6rhhz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxq5okpf22i"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxjgrm2272e", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "New COVID subvariant 'Cicada' is on the rise. Here's what you need to know\n->Los Angeles Times | More on \"Cicada COVID subvariant summer spread\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-20 22:30:45", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zaq4lkhmvagkmrln3ixjcuku/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxjj6fsws2s", "author_handle": "djjakej.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jake", "text": "Got #10 \n7th Pfizer 2 weeks ago!\nWeddings are Starting back up.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 22:32:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxjgrm2272e", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxjgrm2272e"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dfecnfa7ql526y2aiusiucgu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxf7bhmh22k", "author_handle": "1789jam.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Judith A. Miller", "text": "Am immune compromised (leukemia in 1992). Still wear a mask... & even w precautions & a mask, ended up with a virus when I went to #Emory last week to see some student presentations. So, yeah, I am keeping my masks & staying outside. No more indoor events for me this spring. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-20 21:14:58", "like_count": 25, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5dokrqnikwh5egun7yfivvi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxzonzyhk25", "author_handle": "tyrotcm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "The Creatively Maladjusted", "text": "Tinu died in similar circumstances - COVID reactivated her leukemia.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 03:21:28", "like_count": 13, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dfecnfa7ql526y2aiusiucgu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxf7bhmh22k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dfecnfa7ql526y2aiusiucgu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxf7bhmh22k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xpdbc4ra6kwbv7srxklv6vqu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjy5uxug3s22", "author_handle": "pumpkinstars.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "pumpkin", "text": "for Tinu 💛", "created_at": "2026-04-21 04:36:36", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5dokrqnikwh5egun7yfivvi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxzonzyhk25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dfecnfa7ql526y2aiusiucgu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxf7bhmh22k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5dokrqnikwh5egun7yfivvi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxzusny7k25", "author_handle": "tyrotcm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "The Creatively Maladjusted", "text": "She raised MILLIONS of dollars for others over the years, but by the time she needed that kind of help Twitter had gotten down the Nazi shithole. We couldn't even fund a move from Texas to California.\n\nThe mutual aid network here is a pale shadow of what we built there.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 03:24:54", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5dokrqnikwh5egun7yfivvi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxzonzyhk25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dfecnfa7ql526y2aiusiucgu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxf7bhmh22k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5dokrqnikwh5egun7yfivvi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxzwx6hfc25", "author_handle": "tyrotcm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "The Creatively Maladjusted", "text": "@ommerdraven.unitedsyncretic.org is in somewhat similar circumstances. Go help him if you feel bad about not helping Tinu before she died.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 03:26:06", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5dokrqnikwh5egun7yfivvi2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxzusny7k25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dfecnfa7ql526y2aiusiucgu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxf7bhmh22k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:yatypamxilykcsvpcs5s2sv7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxex5ribll2", "author_handle": "brucemirken.mas.to.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Bruce Mirken", "text": "\"People #vaccinated against #COVID in Germany in 2023 experienced reduced hospitalization rates, fewer #LongCOVID diagnoses, and lower all-cause mortality than those who weren't vaccinated, according to a new study published in Eurosurveillance.\" Hmmm... less disease, less death. Seems like a […]", "created_at": "2026-04-20 21:10:29", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4czvapwjazxrs5n33a3pyjus/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxcgdcfqk24", "author_handle": "mikasa4231.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mikasa4231", "text": "New #COVID subvariant #Cicada is on the rise in California - Los Angeles Times #Health \n\nwww.latimes.com/california/s...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 20:25:15", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7ect22u", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "#Medsky🧪 #IDsky #vaccinesmatter #publichealth #COVID vaccinated individuals experienced lower hospitalisation rates associated with COVID, respiratory or #CVD, as well as reduced all-cause mortality & #longCOVID diagnoses. \n@eurosurveillance.org \nwww.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:36:06", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7kowc2u", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "With #SARSCoV2 remaining endemic, the findings highlight the continued health & economic benefits of #COVID19 vaccination. These results support the sustained implementation of national vaccination recommendations", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:36:06", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7ect22u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7ect22u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7kqus2u", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "& provide evidence to guide policy decisions in 🇩🇪 and other countries with similar healthcare systems.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:36:06", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7kowc2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4d7ect22u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mbqylqyif2gucfd2dy2lpxvw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx3g4hmk22y", "author_handle": "beachbum7777.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Another GAY Steven", "text": "health.yahoo.com/conditions/i...\n\n#Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:19:52", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "The Twilight Zone is my usual go-to reference for how it feels to know a dangerous airborne virus is on the loose but the majority of people don’t care or aren’t aware. Due to other current events, more people feel similarly now. But the COVID-aware have felt like this for 4-5 years already. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:10:55", "like_count": 34, "reply_count": 3, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2ykpz3c2f", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "And it’s TIRING, and relentless. And there’s no end in sight—certainly not until more people snap out of their denial.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:12:17", "like_count": 15, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx32xu6jk2f", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "It’s 4 years for me because I became “awakened” in 2022—when most people gave up taking any precautions but the science was saying you should do anything but.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:13:38", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2ykpz3c2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lyatvepwtmtkoiyrdnefqc2y/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxclkvzic2a", "author_handle": "kegel7.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Kegel", "text": "Six years for me. I was wearing a respirator the week before lockdown in the UK. The looks I got going to the pharmacy. Then the death and disablement started.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 20:28:10", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx32xu6jk2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxcql2wkk2j", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "I was very “locked down” in 2020 but fell some for “Vax & Relax” in ‘21 and ‘22 before “locking down” again.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 20:30:57", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:lyatvepwtmtkoiyrdnefqc2y/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxclkvzic2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyerlfxn22j", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "I've become completely used to being emotionally numb. I know that's not a good thing, but I think it's my brain protecting itself from eternal PEM.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 06:40:01", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk2m3cn3jk25", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "It’s sad, but it makes sense. It’s been a LONG 4-6 years, and there’s no let up in sight.", "created_at": "2026-04-22 03:56:01", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyerlfxn22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx3iigyas2y", "author_handle": "quarantegan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quarantegan", "text": "My initial go-to analogy for explaining how it felt was \"Nightmare at 20,000 Feet\" (Season 05/Episode 05)... over time, \"The Old Man in the Cave\" (S05/E07) has gradually reveled itself to be the more accurate analog.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:21:13", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx474ak6c2r", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "I’m familiar with & have also referred to the Shatner episode several times but I don’t think I’ve seen the latter. I need to rectify that!\nen.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Old...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:33:52", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx3iigyas2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": Burgess Meredith episode but that makes me think I shouldn’t break my glasses.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:35:07", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": Burgess Meredith episode but that makes me think I shouldn’t break my glasses.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:34:58", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4et7rec2y", "author_handle": "quarantegan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quarantegan", "text": "Oh that's an excellent deep cut, I'd forgotten all about that one!", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:37:04", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4b2vehs2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4kvrvos2r", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "We recently watched the early one with a young Robert Redford (who couldn’t act that well yet!) & enjoyed it.\n\nIt’s wild to consider how wise & philosophical TZ was, especially considering when it originally aired.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 18:40:28", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx4et7rec2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjx2vzxlvs2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hdkkb7pjgv5cc2h3q3y52o7x/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwzpqayrok2", "author_handle": "andybrwn.sfba.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "andybrwn", "text": "New #COVID subvariant 'Cicada' is on the rise in California - Los Angeles Times https://www.latimes.com/california/story/2026-04-20/new-covid-subvariant-cicada-is-on-rise-what-you-need-to-know", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:49:58", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nAs we've learned from malaria, \"endemic\" was never a free pass for governments to do nothing about #COVID -\n\nwww.malarianomore.org/story/5-less...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaej22j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nI've lived in endemic malaria areas for several years, including with an infant. And none of us ever got malaria, in spite of not taking prophylactic meds, which are designed for travellers, not residents (it's not good to take antimalarial meds long term).", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaghk2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nSo how did we avoid malaria? \n\nBy educating ourselves about the risks & how to mitigate against them with #NPIs. It was a multi-layered approach that entailed:\n\n▶️ Living in houses covered window/door screens.\n▶️ Sleeping under mosquito nets treated with repellents/insecticides.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaej22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uajfc2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\n▶️ Diligently (no exception) avoiding being outdoors from dusk to dawn when mosquitoes are most active.\n▶️ Wearing boots & light-coloured, loose clothing, long sleeves & trousers no matter the heat/humidity.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaghk2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3ualds2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n▶️ Using mosquito repellent on any exposed skin (wrists, hands, neck, face). \n▶️ Having Malaria rapid diagnostic tests (RDTs) on hand, that gave a reliable result in 20 minutes.\n▶️ And likewise, having on hand the antimalarial med, artemisinin.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uajfc2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uamd22j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nIn sum, avoiding malaria meant being neurotically careful & alert to the slightest symptom: it's not hard to get your mind around, once you hear of that healthy 30-something person, who ignored a sore throat & was dead 2 days later.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3ualds2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\n\"Despite decades of dogma that severe malaria survivors make full and uneventful recoveries, ...'it is now recognized that the consequences of malaria extend well beyond hospital discharge'\". \n\nSimilar to the long term effects of paediatric #COVID -", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nAs we've learned from malaria, \"endemic\" was never a free pass for governments to do nothing about #COVID -\n\nwww.malarianomore.org/story/5-less...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaej22j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nI've lived in endemic malaria areas for several years, including with an infant. And none of us ever got malaria, in spite of not taking prophylactic meds, which are designed for travellers, not residents (it's not good to take antimalarial meds long term).", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t6bos2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaghk2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nSo how did we avoid malaria? \n\nBy educating ourselves about the risks & how to mitigate against them with #NPIs. It was a multi-layered approach that entailed:\n\n▶️ Living in houses covered window/door screens.\n▶️ Sleeping under mosquito nets treated with repellents/insecticides.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaej22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uajfc2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\n▶️ Diligently (no exception) avoiding being outdoors from dusk to dawn when mosquitoes are most active.\n▶️ Wearing boots & light-coloured, loose clothing, long sleeves & trousers no matter the heat/humidity.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uaghk2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3ualds2j", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n▶️ Using mosquito repellent on any exposed skin (wrists, hands, neck, face). \n▶️ Having Malaria rapid diagnostic tests (RDTs) on hand, that gave a reliable result in 20 minutes.\n▶️ And likewise, having on hand the antimalarial med, artemisinin.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:20:28", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3uajfc2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwy3t5r3k2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7dreaw42xf5d63urimexzq3h/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwxsalp7k2g", "author_handle": "munizreplacement.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "muniz replacement", "text": "#COVID & #longcovid is one of the biggest mass denials in modern history, not because it ended but because we collectively decided it did. People are still ill, more chronically than ever. Only change is we just stopped being direct about it & started calling it cuter, funnier, more relatable names.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 17:15:00", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6xcdzoryvcfrthh6pwbnawor/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwwptgr6k2m", "author_handle": "rubymae326.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ruby Mae Gallagher (she/her)", "text": "I knew an #Amazon employee who was homeless in his car through #Covid. They wouldn't even let him park overnight in their lot when they discovered he was homeless. He asked them for help, and they offered him a financial class, saying it was his fault for not budgeting the wage they paid him.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 16:55:48", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jh5b3ruvk3enhysr57y4n7rq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzf5k2isx2i", "author_handle": "stackedupfinance.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Stacked Up Finance", "text": "That's a tough narrative to buy into. Did the employee have any health or disability issues that might have contributed to his homelessness?", "created_at": "2026-04-21 16:19:19", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6xcdzoryvcfrthh6pwbnawor/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwwptgr6k2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6xcdzoryvcfrthh6pwbnawor/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwwptgr6k2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6xcdzoryvcfrthh6pwbnawor/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzjmzjng22o", "author_handle": "rubymae326.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ruby Mae Gallagher (she/her)", "text": "Did I mention that it was during quarantine? We had one of the famed shady landlords who took rental assistance and then kicked us out anyway.\n\nAnd fwiw, people like you are what make life harder for people who like us who go through things like that. Thanks.\n\n\"Tough narrative...\" Jfc.", "created_at": "2026-04-21 17:39:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:jh5b3ruvk3enhysr57y4n7rq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjzf5k2isx2i", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6xcdzoryvcfrthh6pwbnawor/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwwptgr6k2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwwi7bcvs2f", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "“Why would we need to research a cold that has no affect effects?” #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-20 16:51:32", "like_count": 24, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:k6fbzahxqtzsyiu2hwgwj5tt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwty4al6a2f", "author_handle": "bilaltariq01.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bilal Tariq", "text": "Serverless by Design - Building an Analytics Platform on Cloudflare https://cstu.io/96beb3 #love #covid #google", "created_at": "2026-04-20 16:06:44", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:geg4i5v66l6yeacremhu3bal/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwrv2kq2s2h", "author_handle": "capttamagochi.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "CAPTTAMAGOCHI ™️", "text": "Ahh... Jenner, smallpox New Order", "created_at": "2026-04-20 11:01:16", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwerpsgik2u", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "ps in my ongoing cycle of typos, and the decline in my keyboard, in this analysis i managed to misspell the word mistake. ...amongst other offences!", "created_at": "2026-04-20 11:34:45", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwcup75nk2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwcup75nk2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwd7j3g7s2q", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "This is half way through. Needs the correct calendar labelling, and a check through. it's an idea of what Jenner and the pandemics/viruses dock into in the wider story of elite history in the Matrix", "created_at": "2026-04-20 11:06:47", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwcup75nk2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwcup75nk2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hawdxrgxyvfwgm7cginvvdzd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwcmfhqbk27", "author_handle": "lilablau23.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lilablau23", "text": "\"Diagnose der Experten lautet andererseits aber: Es beziehen immer mehr Arbeitnehmer diese Leistung - und das für immer mehr Tage. Rund 2,3 Millionen Krankengeldfälle gibt es derzeit pro Jahr\"\n\nJa, das passiert wenn man* ne pandemie ignoriert! #covid\n\nwww.tagesschau.de/inland/innen...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 10:56:00", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwa3yyjgk2p", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "#Covid\n\nWastewater prevalences in Switzerland are a factor 2-3 lower currently as compared to previous year minima. \n\nI'd suspect a shift in the relation of infections to measured viral load, but survey-based proxies like the RKI's Grippeweb or the RIVM's infectieradar show very low incidences, too.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 10:11:05", "like_count": 16, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwacvihhs2p", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "Possibly, this is related to rising BA.3.2 fractions that shift (or tend to restrict) infections to children.\n\nbsky.app/profile/domi...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 10:14:51", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwa3yyjgk2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwa3yyjgk2p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4ulxz5k46g3kk3ha5gtq7iyc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwamlsvv22w", "author_handle": "davepermen.net", "author_display_name": "davepermen", "text": "Definitely noticeable in the office. First couple weeks without people coughing all the time.\n\nExcept for allergy season hitting hard, so lots of sneezing and red eyes (for many, a new thing to have since q couple years for no reason whatsoever ...)", "created_at": "2026-04-20 10:20:15", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwacvihhs2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwa3yyjgk2p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22", "author_handle": "logical1966.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Aaron", "text": "So for the first time since 2020 I won’t be eligible for a #Covid vaccine \nWhat an utter disgrace JVCI are it’s not gone away @elhopkins.bsky.social @profstevegriffin.bsky.social @chrischirp.bsky.social \nSo now no vaccine or therapeutics", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:32:38", "like_count": 11, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw62vvmhs25", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "Same here for the first time. They are a total disgrace and also no antiviral access. It isn’t a true reflection of the risk. Before Christmas I bought a private one but they aren’t as up to date as the NHS ones. I am even less safe now. Labour are truly hopeless on this.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:34:36", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw64p5ilk25", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "I paid for the one I had previously 6 months earlier. It’s all such a mess.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:35:36", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw62vvmhs25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6fgj4x225", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "Tesco and Pharmadoctor are doing them but still phoning around and it’s so expensive.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:40:29", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw64p5ilk25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6m4ujwc22", "author_handle": "logical1966.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Aaron", "text": "Let me know I have an appointment with my acute asthma specialist on Monday next week so I’ll raise it with him too \nHe has always said I need the vaccine because my lungs are in such poor shape 55 years of asthma attacks and collapsed lungs plus my immune system being compromised", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:44:14", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6fgj4x225", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:idw3wm76kt2liq2vixfcgsds/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6qsfe6k25", "author_handle": "elhopkins.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Esther", "text": "I will let you know. My consultant said the same and have had pleurisy so many times. How can we be eligible for the flu and not Covid? Everyone is eligible in France. It’s not about science, it’s about cost. They don’t even try to make the private ones cheaper, it’s all such a rip off.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:46:52", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6m4ujwc22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:rpjnvmhtzd4zoyrjq5mhh3yl/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5xecxus22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "J'ai fait 3 pharmacies différentes ce matin et aucune n'a de dose de vaccin. \n\nD'après ce qu'ils m'ont expliqué, ils ne vont recevoir les doses que dans 15 jours alors que la campagne de vaccination #COVID est censée commencer aujourd'hui.\n\nOn a vraiment des winners au ministère de la santé 🙃", "created_at": "2026-04-20 08:51:01", "like_count": 43, "reply_count": 7, "repost_count": 14, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:scvhi3y4a75ducedzo7eo52g/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwfzsgvds2j", "author_handle": "itripixels.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Meme histoire, et puis y tiennent absolument à ce que ça fasse toujours BIEN 6 mois, pas quelques jours de moins ou quoi...Donc ça pousse ça pousse.. La personne affirmait aussi que \"fallait etre dans les critères\" alors que non", "created_at": "2026-04-20 11:57:10", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwgbdi5ks2c", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "Purée que c'est énervant... 🤦", "created_at": "2026-04-20 12:01:21", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:scvhi3y4a75ducedzo7eo52g/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwfzsgvds2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q2kn4ob6rrswfzbj6dcewv2e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxg7zo6qs2g", "author_handle": "velosimone.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "A vélo, Simone ! 😷 11x💉", "text": "Ah flûte, j'ai pris rv demain matin sur Doctolib, je n'ai même pas pensé qu'ils pourraient ne pas en avoir...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 21:33:17", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyd7th6os2m", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "À mon avis si tu as pu prendre rdv, ils doivent avoir des doses. Ça m'étonnerait qu'il proposent des rdv sans avoir prévu le coup en amont. Tu nous diras ? \n\n(Ah au fait, le Laroxyl n'est pas super efficace dans mon cas... J'hésite à arrêter. Je suis dégoûtée 😭)", "created_at": "2026-04-21 06:12:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:q2kn4ob6rrswfzbj6dcewv2e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjxg7zo6qs2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q2kn4ob6rrswfzbj6dcewv2e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjymrq3p2c2u", "author_handle": "velosimone.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "A vélo, Simone ! 😷 11x💉", "text": "Reçu un SMS de la pharmacie ce matin : ne venez pas, on ne reçoit les doses que vendredi... 🫠\nMp sur le laroxyl!", "created_at": "2026-04-21 09:03:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjyd7th6os2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjymwylbd22m", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "Ben de mon côté, je viens tout juste de me faire vacciner par ma pharmacie habituelle ! En allant chercher mon traitement habituel, j'ai demandé s'ils avaient des doses sans trop y croire et... Ils en avaient ! Ah ah \n\nMais pas beaucoup en revanche. C'est le bordel quand même...", "created_at": "2026-04-21 09:06:10", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:q2kn4ob6rrswfzbj6dcewv2e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjymrq3p2c2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q2kn4ob6rrswfzbj6dcewv2e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mka7hr7kls2n", "author_handle": "velosimone.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "A vélo, Simone ! 😷 11x💉", "text": "Ça y est, c'est fait.\nApparemment maintenant les flacons viennent pour 10 doses au lieu de 6. Déjà s'il y avait du gaspillage avant...", "created_at": "2026-04-24 09:26:19", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjymwylbd22m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwg4gcjd22f", "author_handle": "themis2023.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "Donc ils n'ont pas anticipé, car les commandes étaient ouvertes avant le début de la campagne. Misère...🤦‍♀️", "created_at": "2026-04-20 11:58:37", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwgqueusk2c", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "Voilà 🙃\n\nEt même pire pour certaines pharmacies 👇\n\nbsky.app/profile/mamq...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 12:10:05", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwg4gcjd22f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:n3ifdtwys4ypt55cyr4wvm2z/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5v6fn5k2f", "author_handle": "sochalila.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Sochalila", "text": "Et pourquoi dans 3 semaines ? \n\nPlus rien ne m’étonne concernant le programme de non prévention Covid. \nDonc en fait, « La campagne commence le 20… peut-être ».\n\nIci, en campagne dpt 44, j’ai pu avoir un rdv pour jeudi 24 avril en appelant vendredi.\n(Même le 24 au lieu du 20 c’est pas normal)", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:31:23", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6bbhujk2g", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "Au hasard... Parce qu'on a des triple buses au gouvernement ? 😅\n\nIl y a une pharmacie qui me rappelle vendredi pour me tenir au courant mais comme les autres ont parlé de 15 jours, je n'y crois pas trop pour vendredi.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:38:10", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:n3ifdtwys4ypt55cyr4wvm2z/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw5v6fn5k2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6datbi22g", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "Et après ils jouent les étonnés parce presque plus personne ne se fait vacciner 🙃", "created_at": "2026-04-20 09:39:16", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6bbhujk2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:scvhi3y4a75ducedzo7eo52g/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwg3pgqdc2j", "author_handle": "itripixels.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "la plupart des pharmas aussi ont pas du tout l'air d'en parler.. Mettre des \"boosters d energie\" etc en avant ça oui, mais demander si les gens voudraient un rappel covid, bizarrement y a personne.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 11:58:14", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6datbi22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwgjrh3u22c", "author_handle": "mamquilla.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Quilla", "text": "Ben déjà le fait que l'écrasante majorité des pharmaciens ne porte plus de masque fait que mon estime pour eux et leur professionnalisme est vraiment au raz des pâquerettes. \n\nDonc oui, c'est clairement un mélange des deux. 🔽", "created_at": "2026-04-20 12:06:05", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:scvhi3y4a75ducedzo7eo52g/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwg3pgqdc2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwgjbqvk22f", "author_handle": "themis2023.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "Alors qu'ils doivent bien avoir quelques clients qui se vaccinent régulièrement. C'est lunaire de ne rien anticiper à ce point.\nDe notre côté ils faisaient des commandes groupées d'une semaine à l'autre en fonction du nombre de rdv.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 12:05:48", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw6datbi22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dqzrp4h5t74jpxdtzxdxynf6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw7y6wbgk2s", "author_handle": "associationarra.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "ARRA - Association pour la Réduction des Risques Aéroportés", "text": "le MISP du 3 avril (juste avant le week-end de Pâques) donne une ouverture des commandes le 3 (mais en pratique pas avant le 7 vu le lundi férié) et 10 jours de livraison donc oui les pharmacies qui n'ont pas anticipé (= quasi toutes) sont dans ce cas\nsante.gouv.fr/IMG/pdf/misp...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 10:08:52", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:6ybkoiys5d3x32bu2fnqedbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjw3mye7sc2d"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nyu5atwhevkymja4aam2fbyj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjwgctrvgk2f", "author_handle": "themis2023.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thémis 😷 Covid is not over ≽(•⩊ •マ≼", "text": "Notre pharmacie avait un délai d'une semaine jusque là. 0kale/acc", "text": "Notwithstanding the uncertainty, the total number of infections are declining with time, so people are getting fewer opportunities to reinfection. If most LC is the result of the acute damage + persistence and secondary immune response to infection as detailed here open.substack.com/pub/christos...", "created_at": "2026-04-20 00:01:34", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ktklmzd4c3flgz53ylnl65fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjv627xi3c2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ktklmzd4c3flgz53ylnl65fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjv627xi3c2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ktklmzd4c3flgz53ylnl65fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjv62as5ls2z", "author_handle": "christosargyrop.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Christos Argyropoulos MD, PhD, FASN 🇺🇸 0kale/acc", "text": "the increase in the interval between successive infections mean that one gets a longer break to heal and inflammation to cool down. At the same time, the decrease in severity of the acute presentation means less initial damage. Both mechanisms would lead to a ⬇️ incidence & prevalence of #longcovid.", "created_at": "2026-04-20 00:01:34", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ktklmzd4c3flgz53ylnl65fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjv62armyk2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ktklmzd4c3flgz53ylnl65fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjv627xi3c2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ktklmzd4c3flgz53ylnl65fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjv62ashec2z", "author_handle": "christosargyrop.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Christos Argyropoulos MD, PhD, FASN 🇺🇸 0kale/acc", "text": "However newborns and kids who are not vaccinated are experiencing covid as it first appeared in the post Omi period. NJ.com\n\n#covid #media #society #social media ", "created_at": "2026-04-19 20:05:12", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjummolknk2u", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "Medical researchers at Stanford University shamelessly promoted their papers about #SARSCoV2 and viral clearance without any proof. They assumed that symptom cessation was enough. They were wrong and it was obvious.\n\nThe virus persists in bone marrow MK cells even in #COVID recovered patients.", "created_at": "2026-04-19 18:49:52", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhvcx2z27zq2jtb3i7f5beb7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjukkdt6nc25", "author_handle": "m00psy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "chadzia dax 🔞😷", "text": "the same way you ignore an ongoing mass-disabling event, i guess. #covid", "created_at": "2026-04-19 18:12:39", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:yp42wbf536uiihzlxgtviolc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjujv5i6mk26", "author_handle": "longcovidcan-co.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Long COVID Canada - Collaborative", "text": "www.facebook.com/share/v/1DwW...\n\nLong Covid in kids is a huge issue worldwide and often misdiagnosed. \n\n#LongCovid #longcovidkids #covid #health #kids", "created_at": "2026-04-19 18:00:48", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3oxo7fwlc6tr3t6vaerc623e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjuilg5no222", "author_handle": "dmcwriter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dawn Colclasure Wilson", "text": "NEW SUBSTACK: \"You’re Not Writing What Everybody Else is Writing if You Make it Your Own\" dawncolclasure.substack.com/p/youre-not-... #anthologies #bookreview #books #callsforsubmission #COVID #ebooks #horror #interview #NationalPoetryMonth #poetry #writing", "created_at": "2026-04-19 17:35:30", "like_count": 62, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 47, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:kptfojduei7xcznwqzeen3lp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjucvcnigk2s", "author_handle": "jojomineo69.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "JoJo Mineo", "text": "It was particularly evident during #COVID. Since then, it's only gotten worse.", "created_at": "2026-04-19 15:55:29", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjubyuc2es2u", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "interessant, noch kein Wort darüber gehört aus der \n\"ersten Adresse für Information\" Tagesschau\n\nBundestag hört sich nach sechs Jahren #Corona Sorgen von Kindern und Jugendlichen an \n150 Kinder und Jugendliche berichten am Montag hinter verschlossenen Türen.\n\n#Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-19 15:39:42", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjun6wfvmc2a", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "", "created_at": "2026-04-19 18:59:56", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjubyuc2es2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjubyuc2es2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjubmq5fgs27", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. New research reveals that SARS-CoV-2 causes small blood vessel injury and ongoing brain inflammation even after the virus is cleared. neurosciencenews.com/covid-flu-br... #covid #longcovid #inflammation #brain", "created_at": "2026-04-19 15:18:26", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jq7l44mdkph5s3igyni7wsav/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjuyiiscr225", "author_handle": "biologistbunk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thomas Bunker Ph.D.", "text": "Is the virus cleared or is it hiding in select tissues? link.springer.com/article/10.1...", "created_at": "2026-04-19 22:22:11", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bqaa5cpww4vkr2afb2a53t7h/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjuaspuem22l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bqaa5cpww4vkr2afb2a53t7h/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjuaspuem22l"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u46dyfo2232m6allcnuhvmqr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjua4efkss2n", "author_handle": "michael-hoerger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mike Hoerger, PhD, MSCR, MBA", "text": "Are you doing any #COVID advocacy work within a broader professional organization?\n\nIf so, please reach out. "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "#Medsky🧪 #IDsky #publichealth #pedsky #vaccinesmatter\nThere were lots of sneezers around & after 3 RAST tests I (😷💉) came back with-ve #COVID. However,I’ve been experiencing constant diarrhoea to a common cold 🙄\nAs evidence from many studies shows diarrhoea often occurs alongside cold-like symptoms.", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:47:41", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6ddhk2n", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "🧨 1- Respiratory viruses themselves commonly cause gastrointestinal (GI) symptoms, including diarrhea.\n- A second, co‑infecting enteric pathogen (viral or bacterial) may be present and is often detected in patients with acute respiratory infections.", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:47:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dfg22n", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Why Respiratory Infections Can Cause Diarrhea?\n-1. Respiratory viruses frequently produce GI symptoms\nMultiple respiratory viruses including influenza, adenovirus, bocavirus, coronaviruses, RSV & parainfluenza are documented to cause diarrhea in a substantial portion of cases.", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:47:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6ddhk2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dgfc2n", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "- #Influenza often causes nausea, vomiting & diarrhea, with GI involvement reported in 24–31% of #influenzaA cases \n- Influenza-associated diarrhea is explained by lung–gut immune crosstalk, gut microbiota disruption & Th17‑mediated intestinal injury", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:47:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dfg22n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dids2n", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "The reference specifies that gastrointestinal symptoms in cases of influenza A range between 24.2% and 30.9%, which aligns with the claim stating a range of 24–31% for GI involvement. The evidence provided by the reference directly supports the claim's figures and symptom description.", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:47:41", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dgfc2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dlbk2n", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "www.frontiersin.org/journals/imm... \n\njournals.asm.org/doi/10.1128/... \n\nwww.mdpi.com/1999-4915/17... \n\nwww.urmc.rochester.edu/news/publica... \n- Human bocavirus commonly causes diarrhea alongside respiratory symptoms \n\njournals.asm.org/doi/10.1128/...\n\nwww.medicinenet.com/bocavirus_in...", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:47:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6dids2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mju3q6cuss2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gwszm6biy2eahsgkboplugec/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzj3dcus2n", "author_handle": "sarahyb.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Sarah B 🇺🇦", "text": "I desperately want to go to bed tonight & wake up to find that the last 10 years never happened, for many reasons:\n1. My mother’s #dementia 😔\n2. #Crimea ‼️\n3. #Brexit 🇪🇺\n4. #Trump🤡\n5. #InvasionOfUkraine ‼️\n6. #COVID ☠️\n7. Destruction of #Gaza ⛑️\n8. Unnecessary war in #Iran 💣\nI want a #PeacefulWorld 🌍🌐", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:07:44", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:a5pjcgvmfed3uwh4u6ibnqdv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzr2prgk2a", "author_handle": "dutchsunshine.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ray ( Defend Democracy 💪 ) 🐸", "text": "🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:12:11", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gwszm6biy2eahsgkboplugec/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzj3dcus2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gwszm6biy2eahsgkboplugec/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzj3dcus2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2evr2kjdczwum2kxppb6m4bo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzrrulic22", "author_handle": "indystitcher.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Indystitcher 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿🇬🇱🇩🇰", "text": "Ditto!", "created_at": "2026-04-19 13:12:36", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:gwszm6biy2eahsgkboplugec/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzj3dcus2n", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:gwszm6biy2eahsgkboplugec/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtzj3dcus2n"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:k6fbzahxqtzsyiu2hwgwj5tt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtxaz4fks2w", "author_handle": "bilaltariq01.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bilal Tariq", "text": "The bellows move, but the CPU stays quiet — what’s powering this browser based harmonium? https://dev.to/zwin/the-bellows-move-but-the-cpu-stays-quiet-whats-powering-this-browser-based-harmonium-l14 #covid #s #india", "created_at": "2026-04-19 12:27:25", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3rock2t", "author_handle": "daboo23.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "Daboo 🧐", "text": "2️⃣ This reflex, born from the \"Greenspan put\" and reinforced during #COVID, is dangerous. With US debt skyrocketing and the Fed trapped by inflation, traditional rescue tools are exhausted. Instead, the market's only real backstop is an extreme reliance on Artificial Intelligence. 🤖", "created_at": "2026-04-19 09:33:32", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3rs7k2t", "author_handle": "daboo23.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "Daboo 🧐", "text": "3️⃣ Investors are heavily betting that AI will offset economic downturns. However, AI is incredibly energy-intensive and reliant on fragile semiconductor supply chains. The very tech expected to save the market is highly exposed to the geopolitical risks being ignored. 🌍⚡", "created_at": "2026-04-19 09:33:32", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3rock2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3rock2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3ru622t", "author_handle": "daboo23.eurosky.social", "author_display_name": "Daboo 🧐", "text": "4️⃣ To survive a potential crash, experts suggest we need honest risk pricing and new policies. Proposals include a \"Glass-Steagall for AI\" to separate model makers from data centres, and ensuring the public gets equity stakes if the government is forced to bail out AI firms. 🏛️💻", "created_at": "2026-04-19 09:33:32", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3rs7k2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:naegzs6ifwyt5hik2et7uo34/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtnk3rock2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4rmxvouvd6tsupfjsr3bjsdh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjtm3sg76c2e", "author_handle": "organicbotanic.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Sue McBean🇺🇦⛵️💚🌱✍️📸🔸🐸", "text": "Not only risks of serious illness & permanent harm from any episode of #Covid People are loosing life (both quality & quantity) being ill for around a month 3-4 times per year. Being older I can’t give up ¼ to ⅓ of my life to avoidable illness. Spencer", "text": "2/\nBen Lerner's Transcription (2026) featured #COVID directly, while Solvej Balle's work, On the Calculation of Volume (2025), reflects the isolation & disrupted time experienced during the first few years of the pandemic.", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr7522y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nBoth novels feature a prominent character named Thomas. A \"doubting Thomas\", perhaps.", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhra4c2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n \"...seems at once massive & slippery, glaring & subtle; the effects are phenomena without edges, pervasive yet noticeable only when caught by middle-distance memory. \n\nFew things are as hard to discern as what was different about the recent past\" - \n\nwww.theatlantic.com/magazine/202...", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr7522y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynjb3ec2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nRead without paywall -\n\n\"THE FEELING OF BECOMING LESS AND LESS OF A PERSON\":\n\narchive.is/FYt6I", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhra4c2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynjb6c22y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nI haven't yet read Lerner's novel, but I sense it may have been easier to put a pin in 2007 rather than 2019, which set the stage for how we would process the latter. \n\nMainly through the distance of a small screen close to our face, that rendered the enormity manageable, possible even to deny.", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynjb3ec2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynjbaak2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\n\"Only the reality-bending qualities of fable, perhaps, can evoke the threshold in human cognition that was crossed just a short while ago and convey the mystery of how or if we have remained ourselves on the other side of that change\".", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynjb6c22y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhqjnk2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nThe first literary #Novels about #COVID are beginning to appear, giving some indication that we may be ready to obliquely process our collective pandemic trauma through the lens of writers & artists.", "created_at": "2026-04-18 17:47:00", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrynhr56k2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n▶️ How about protecting other (still healthy) students from developing #LongCOVID, by preventing them from being infected with #COVID at school? \n\n▶️ And, lastly, how about protecting teachers - one of the frontline occupations hardest hit with #LongCOVID - from #Reinfections ( #WestrayLaw)?", "created_at": "2026-04-17 19:35:52", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpobbqefc22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nAdditionally:\n\n▶️ How about advocating for #DavosSafe schools, #N95s, #CleanAir, upgraded #Ventilation + #Filtration, #HEPAs, & publicly displayed #CO2 monitors?\n\n▶️ How about preventing these already ill students from getting more #COVID #Reinfections, which can worsen their #LongCOVID symptoms?", "created_at": "2026-04-17 19:35:52", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpobbqjbk22", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. an Kinder durch die Verleugnung von COVID angetan wird.", "created_at": "2026-04-18 12:06:24", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpo4k5cyk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpo4k5cyk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rxcibd3qisrta23gzaqjwibx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjrir2uubc2y", "author_handle": "cthulhcc.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "cthulhcc", "text": "😥😥", "created_at": "2026-04-18 13:02:38",
