"at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpo4k5cyk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpm2mucrr2j", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "“Tokenmaxxing” is making developers less productive than they think https://cstu.io/e961d5 #robotics #covid #python", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:56:21", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2dgvyk2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\n\"In the wake of unprecedented challenges, teachers were thrust into the frontline of danger & uncertainty, often without adequate protection or support - \n\n#COVID + #LongCOVID\n\nwww.longcovideducatorsforjustice.co.uk/about-us", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:38:20", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2e4ghs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\n\"...Their safety & well-being disregarded as classrooms became battlegrounds for the spread of illness, with children knowingly being the largest vectors of the disease\".", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:38:20", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2dgvyk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2dgvyk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2e4s6s2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nIf you're a 🇬🇧 British #Teacher, you can join this advocacy group on social media (unfortunately they're not yet on @bsky.app) -", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:38:20", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2e4ghs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpl2dgvyk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t", "author_handle": "labliston.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Liston", "text": "We had only just moved to Cambridge, and I still had a team in Belgium. They were processing clinical samples from #COVID patients, so we already had a good idea that the respiratory failure was driven by excessive #inflammation rather than the virus itself\n\nonlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:07:36", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjf5qotk2t", "author_handle": "labliston.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Liston", "text": "At the time we had been working on a system to boost #Tregs in the brain, as a way of combatting neuroinflammation. Our AAV system was working great, so we thought \"what if we tried to do the same thing in the lung?\"\n\nwww.nature.com/articles/s41...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:08:18", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjhfc5js2t", "author_handle": "labliston.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Liston", "text": "It took quite some trial and error, but eventually we found that intranasal delivery of AAV6.2 capsid with the CC10 promoter drove tight expression of our cargo by club cells, limited to the lung tissue.\n\nGorgeous imaging from the team of @regisjoulia.bsky.social ia.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:09:35", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjf5qotk2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjjcjyes2t", "author_handle": "labliston.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Liston", "text": "The system works great! AAV6.2.CC10 driving #IL2 production gives an expansion of #lung #Tregs without impacting other sites, even the draining LN of the lung.\n\nAnd it is not just IL2 - in the same way we can drive #IL10 or #IL1RA in the lung without altering systemic levels. Pick your own cargo!", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:10:37", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjhfc5js2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjk6nkj22t", "author_handle": "labliston.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Liston", "text": "We never ended up testing it in SARS-CoV2 infection - by that point the #vaccine had come along. But COVID isn't the only important lung infection. You might not even have heard of one of the most deadly:\n\nInfluenza-Associated Pulmonary Aspergillosis (IAPA)", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:11:11", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjjcjyes2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjmqnchs2t", "author_handle": "labliston.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Liston", "text": "Aspergillus is a fungus common in decaying soil, that can infect the lung. For healthy individuals it is rarely a problem, and is easily cleared\n\nFun fact: Aspergillus may be the \"Curse of the Pharaohs\" as Egyptian tombs were full of spores, and tomb robbers would have breathed in very high doses", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:12:41", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjk6nkj22t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mhz6qmqs4pbltnd2roskj4uq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpjduyw522t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nThe previous incumbent did very little to advocate for #YukonTeachers, while the consequences of unmitigated #COVID infections essentially slid off the table. \n\nHerewith a brief spluttering in 2022, followed by radio silence -\n\n www.whitehorsestar.com/News/covid-1...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:05:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja4kq5k2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nCirca 2022\n\"The Department of Education has told #Yukon parents it will no longer inform them of COVID-19 exposures in the schools\". \n\nAnd that was that. The end of the pandemic. Because what a government doesn't measure, it doesn't have to manage - \n\nwww.whitehorsestar.com/News/teacher...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:05:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja5vvyc2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nAccompanied with the usual veil of \"privacy\" to facilitate government incompetence - \n\n“To protect personal privacy, schools also cannot release individual contact information for the purpose of an individual (staff, student or parent/guardian) seeking to notify others of their test result\".", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:05:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja4kq5k2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja5vzvc2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nCompounded with the fact that the @yukon.ca's education department doesn't have a good track record of connecting the dots & acting responsibly - e.g.\n \nwww.thecanadianpressnews.ca/north/yukon-...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:05:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja5vvyc2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja6v5yc2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nIn sum, these are strange times in which we tolerate the politicization of #Masks, #CleanAir, & an injurious #AirborneVirus, while insisting that any form of leadership out of this injurious predicament be \"pandemic neutral\". \n\nWhen this false neutrality is actually political.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:05:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja5vzvc2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja6vbvc2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "9/\nWhen the public continue to get sick & disabled from a preventable virus, doing nothing is certainly political. \n\nAll while government claims to be \"following the science\" while pursuing their own political agendas, remain unchallenged by most in 🇨🇦 #Media.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:05:50", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja6v5yc2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpja3kwl22t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpfqw6zkc2n", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #lebanon #Iraq #France\n\nMatrix - End of the French Monarchy - mega mix", "created_at": "2026-04-17 17:04:21", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vb4lerj3jqa5yg4dhnblroab/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpdi36te22y", "author_handle": "getitrightonmj.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Getting it Right from the Start", "text": "Study by #KaiserPermanente in @jamanetworkopen.com\n (we/@publichealthinst.bsky.social co-authored): \n\nNorCal teen #cannabis use rose post legalization—even before retail sales—& declined during #COVID, returned to “pre” levels by 24’.\n\nNorms, perceptions, & access DO impact behavior.\n\nbit.ly/4vTAFev", "created_at": "2026-04-17 16:22:53", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ou6sjyhswn7s3qyfqhw7mbk6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpauqtkms22", "author_handle": "mark-ungrin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mark Ungrin", "text": "My posts around risk management and biological hazards often relate to #COVID and #misinformation, as public health and infection control leaders have botched those so badly, however I also see critical importance in integrating system #safety directly into biotech research. Our latest in that area:", "created_at": "2026-04-17 15:36:14", "like_count": 18, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gzqjf5hv2fsfjndxy5m52pbc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpdxyqbrc2n", "author_handle": "safetyinnumbers.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Safety In Numbers", "text": "Congrats to you and your team. Safer biotech is ever-more important as public health and ecological risks mount, while synth bio tools get more powerful and easier to implement.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 16:31:42", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ou6sjyhswn7s3qyfqhw7mbk6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpauqtkms22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ou6sjyhswn7s3qyfqhw7mbk6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpauqtkms22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp6onx7rs2n", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #lebanon #Iraq #saddam\n\nThe matrix - all 2026 news in order on repeat", "created_at": "2026-04-17 14:57:22", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp3fsy3ls2o", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #lebanon #Iraq #saddam\n\nThe matrix - the Lebanon ceasefire. part 2 Iraq", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:59:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qtpndevpxjvnhohng2ocp6iv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2peloos2m", "author_handle": "cjmcg1966.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "CJ McGuinness", "text": "Yet another one of Trump's lawyers has been disbarred. I've lost track of all the people who have lost their livelihoods #MichaelCohen, reputations #Giuliani, freedom #Weisselberg #Navarro and all the innocents who lost their lives #COVID #Wars as he's continued to fail upward and forward.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:45:49", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mr2aslzqif7dvyzikaxd2egw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2w3ahhs2c", "author_handle": "crickettehkm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "📎Hope", "text": "There are many more waiting to fall…", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:49:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qtpndevpxjvnhohng2ocp6iv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2peloos2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qtpndevpxjvnhohng2ocp6iv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2peloos2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qtpndevpxjvnhohng2ocp6iv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp34aqufk2m", "author_handle": "cjmcg1966.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "CJ McGuinness", "text": "If and when it's finally his turn, his fall will make the loudest thud. I'm so ready to turn the page on this shameful chapter in our history!", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:53:02", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mr2aslzqif7dvyzikaxd2egw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2w3ahhs2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qtpndevpxjvnhohng2ocp6iv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2peloos2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp2mjx7hn2k", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Study links long COVID in kids to worse grades, attention, and social life\n->CIDRAP | More on \"Long COVID children learning impacts\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:44:14", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:b4dllhzy5alkopsvcwdjrrxq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjp26esht22h", "author_handle": "anappatricia.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ana Patrícia", "text": "Quem usa o SUS não vota em golpista né. \n#Pratodosverem #Covid #STF #Lula2026 #SemRachadinhas", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:36:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ipi5juc6m5utwq3bqtzds7ub/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjoyphogis2w", "author_handle": "gwenfauchois.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Gwen Fauchois", "text": "J’ajoute que ça faisait du bien aussi une rencontre qui n’obligeait pas à arbitrer entre son intérêt et prise de risque! #covid \nMerci aux organisateures, aux participants et @associationarra.bsky.social & @maskblocparis.bsky.social", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:10:05", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjoydijhw227", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #labanon\n\nThe matrix - Docking in the Lebanon ceasefire. part 1", "created_at": "2026-04-17 13:04:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5jmxj5uhdbwmu76u2j2e4kog/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjouv63yot23", "author_handle": "transcript-verlag.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "transcript Verlag", "text": "Wie verhandeln literarische Texte psychische Krisen? Analysen aus der deutschsprachigen Gegenwartsliteratur. \n\nhttps://www.transcript-verlag.de/978-3-8376-7410-1/\n\n#Narrativ #Krise #Covid #Pandemie #Literatur #Germanistik #Psychologie #Literaturwissenschaft", "created_at": "2026-04-17 12:01:41", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjotdvfim22v", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "#Covid\n\nSchätzung Infektionsinzidenzen für Zürich aufgrund Kalibrierung der Abwasserprävalenzen Werdhölzli, Daten bis 12. April 2026:\n\nInzidenz ~50.\n \nCa. jede 2'000. jaune s’occupe d’un·e patient·e qui se repose dans un lit d’hôpital.\n\n📰 Lire des articles sur la COVID-19 :\n\nstillcoviding.ca/fr/tag/covid...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 01:52:43", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:kp2ouhsjdapbxoh2ahpnby2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnsu7uvcc2q", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:kp2ouhsjdapbxoh2ahpnby2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnsu7uvcc2q"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nAs for this: \"...seasonal vaccination uptake for both COVID & flu shots has dropped\" -\n\nThis points to where public health messaging began to go awry: equating #COVID to #Flu to minimize COVID, & assuring the public that COVID would soon become endemic/seasonal, & \"just like flu\" -", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvkfc2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n...always undermined the real severity of flu. \n\nIllnesses for which we have a vaccine are generally serious enough, such that building immunity with vaccination is preferable to the risks associated with natural infection.\n\nBut vaccination is only one layer of mitigation.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvmds2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nThe public needs to hear from #PublicHealth that they should - \n▶️ wear an #N95 mask;\n▶️ run a portable #HEPA ( #Filtration);\n▶️ open a window, or upgrade their HVAC system ( #Ventilation);\n▶️ & monitor #IAQ with a #CO2 tracker.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvkfc2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvpbk2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nBecause now \"COVID-19 & the flu are here with us all the time\", while our respective immune systems probably aren't what they used to be.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvmds2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tpyboxw5rlrzsrfgfge3r7jx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjonxh2u5c2s", "author_handle": "growstuf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Timmy Floyd", "text": "I have just been diagnosed with Psoriatic arthritis. An immune system issue. It took 6 years of reoccurring crippling leg joint issues that the I finally found a rheumatologist that pointed to an overactive immune response. Polyviral exposer to covid,ect , all started with the covid timeline.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 09:57:43", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvpbk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpaj3iuok2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "So sorry to hear that, Timmy ❤️‍🩹", "created_at": "2026-04-17 15:29:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:tpyboxw5rlrzsrfgfge3r7jx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjonxh2u5c2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n▶️ And that while acute #COVID may only feel like a \"bad cold\" for some, the real damage unpacks in the weeks/months/years later. \n\nTherefore, while we should get vaccinated, we should not #VaxAndRelax.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvgic2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nBecause while vaccination prevents severe disease & death (surely gift enough) - it does not prevent infection or transmission, & only slightly reduces the risk of #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nAs for this: \"...seasonal vaccination uptake for both COVID & flu shots has dropped\" -\n\nThis points to where public health messaging began to go awry: equating #COVID to #Flu to minimize COVID, & assuring the public that COVID would soon become endemic/seasonal, & \"just like flu\" -", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvgic2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvkfc2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n...always undermined the real severity of flu. \n\nIllnesses for which we have a vaccine are generally serious enough, such that building immunity with vaccination is preferable to the risks associated with natural infection.\n\nBut vaccination is only one layer of mitigation.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvmds2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nThe public needs to hear from #PublicHealth that they should - \n▶️ wear an #N95 mask;\n▶️ run a portable #HEPA ( #Filtration);\n▶️ open a window, or upgrade their HVAC system ( #Ventilation);\n▶️ & monitor #IAQ with a #CO2 tracker.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvkfc2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvpbk2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nBecause now \"COVID-19 & the flu are here with us all the time\", while our respective immune systems probably aren't what they used to be.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvmds2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvams2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nSo how about, instead, informing telling everyone that -\n\n▶️ The pandemic is not over;\n▶️ #Reinfections are best avoided;\n▶️ There's no cure for #LongCOVID;\n▶️ #LongCOVID, immune dysregulation & long term organ harm from #COVID are preventable;", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n▶️ And that while acute #COVID may only feel like a \"bad cold\" for some, the real damage unpacks in the weeks/months/years later. \n\nTherefore, while we should get vaccinated, we should not #VaxAndRelax.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvams2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvams2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvgic2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nThe public needs to hear from #PublicHealth that they should - \n▶️ wear an #N95 mask;\n▶️ run a portable #HEPA ( #Filtration);\n▶️ open a window, or upgrade their HVAC system ( #Ventilation);\n▶️ & monitor #IAQ with a #CO2 tracker.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvkfc2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvams2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nThis concerning outcome demonstrates just how effective #PublicHealth messaging can be: tell the public that #COVID is now just like \"any other respiratory illness\", & they will take you at your word - \n\nwww.cbc.ca/news/health/...", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 35, "reply_count": 3, "repost_count": 14, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:z6qgjkfnycpqyzfrpqmmmvw2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjo2jc3vw22l", "author_handle": "dirkelee.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "😲", "created_at": "2026-04-17 04:09:45", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvams2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nSo how about, instead, informing telling everyone that -\n\n▶️ The pandemic is not over;\n▶️ #Reinfections are best avoided;\n▶️ There's no cure for #LongCOVID;\n▶️ #LongCOVID, immune dysregulation & long term organ harm from #COVID are preventable;", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n▶️ And that while acute #COVID may only feel like a \"bad cold\" for some, the real damage unpacks in the weeks/months/years later. \n\nTherefore, while we should get vaccinated, we should not #VaxAndRelax.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvams2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvgic2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nBecause while vaccination prevents severe disease & death (surely gift enough) - it does not prevent infection or transmission, & only slightly reduces the risk of #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvejs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nAs for this: \"...seasonal vaccination uptake for both COVID & flu shots has dropped\" -\n\nThis points to where public health messaging began to go awry: equating #COVID to #Flu to minimize COVID, & assuring the public that COVID would soon become endemic/seasonal, & \"just like flu\" -", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvgic2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvkfc2k", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n...always undermined the real severity of flu. \n\nIllnesses for which we have a vaccine are generally serious enough, such that building immunity with vaccination is preferable to the risks associated with natural infection.\n\nBut vaccination is only one layer of mitigation.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:58:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptdvigs2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjo3ucjd222b", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "COVID is a vascular disease that looks like a respiratory virus in the acute period. COVID is around all year, while influenza levels drop to zero and are nearly there now, in the US Midwest.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 04:33:49", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnptd5bzk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnpkmpom22i", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "#covid\n\ndt", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:53:42", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:k5qqvpgufiz2jqbboo7ksuek/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnnoi4pfk2s", "author_handle": "ibeahussy.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Actually @chrislhayes.bsky.social, Trump’s handling of #COVID WAS a “disaster” for all those who needlessly died because of his refusal 2 take the necessary precautions 2 protect Americans. Just as the current economic crisis is a DISASTER 4 the millions who live on the edge of solvency. #inners", "created_at": "2026-04-17 00:20:01", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qvwss3k5siuriesmcyhygs3d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnkvczp222t", "author_handle": "rastasack.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rasta", "text": "\"My aunt, the doctor, told me a new joke.\"\n#Covid #AI #Plagues", "created_at": "2026-04-16 23:30:11", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lxhifpvgpy2bidzqja6d6wce/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnfvy4jxd22", "author_handle": "segar.com", "author_display_name": "Adrian Segar", "text": "Despite what some have been saying, I do not hate in-person meetings. When they're safe, I design, facilitate, and attend them.\n\nwww.conferencesthatwork.com/index.php/ev...\n\n#events #COVID #MeetingSafely #ventilation #eventprofs #assnchat", "created_at": "2026-04-16 22:01:52", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjnfq3zkhk2i", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Loop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #russia #sars\n\nMatrix - Pandemic, How to prevent an outbreak (Netflix)", "created_at": "2026-04-16 21:58:04", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7tzegbrjsirkcomp4otyv33p/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjn664ywvk2q", "author_handle": "hollowoak.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Chris Womack", "text": "Real quick before the site goes tits up again: new Threat Model: #Covid newsletter is out from @violetblue.bsky.social, and yes, Jay \"Great Barrington Declaration\" Bhattacharya is still an evil asshole. Read/share/support: www.patreon.com/posts/155754...\n#LongCovid #MedSky #PublicHealth", "created_at": "2026-04-16 19:42:25", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7tzegbrjsirkcomp4otyv33p/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjn64xh6ts2q", "author_handle": "hollowoak.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Chris Womack", "text": "Real quick before the site goes tits up again: new Threat Model: #Covid newsletter is out from @violetblue.bsky.social, and yes, Jay \"Great Barrington Declaration\" Bhattacharya is still an evil asshole. Read/share/support: www.patreon.com/posts/155754...\n#LongCovid #MedSky #PublicHealth", "created_at": "2026-04-16 19:41:46", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjn3vnw3wx25", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "Only 6 symptoms, conditions appear unique to long COVID, suggesting overlap with other post-viral infections\n->CIDRAP | More on \"Long COVID post-viral symptom overlap\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Infection #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-16 19:04:57", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjn3pjspdc2d", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "New data from the Canadian Institute for Health Information shows hospitalization rates for vaccine-preventable respiratory diseases more than doubled in 2024 compared to pre-pandemic levels.\n\nCOVID alone contributed to more than 40 per cent.\n\nwww.cbc.ca/news/health/...\n\n#Covid #CovidIsNotOver", "created_at": "2026-04-16 18:58:48", "like_count": 25, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 11, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmxx32lqs2t", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "#Covid\n\nSentinella detections (for all viruses) are missing for the 2nd week. I hope they didn't drop reporting these data, they are the best independent proxy to compare to wastewater prevalences", "created_at": "2026-04-16 17:52:22", "like_count": 16, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjow76jvps2v", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "Update: Should be back next week.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 12:25:11", "like_count": 11, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmxx32lqs2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmxx32lqs2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mk3nff42ek2g", "author_handle": "dominiksteiger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dominik Steiger", "text": "They're back. With three zero values, no less.\n\nIf no detections are reported later, 4 weeks with zero detections will be a first since these data are reported (since October 2020).", "created_at": "2026-04-22 13:52:17", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjow76jvps2v", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmxx32lqs2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:nh2mbbots6ndgdicuaum3omf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjndh7nc4c2w", "author_handle": "un1v3rse.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thomas Schoerghofer", "text": "No data, no viruses", "created_at": "2026-04-16 21:17:24", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmxx32lqs2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:pzpsfmrtxzmdmugqq2hsjxqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmxx32lqs2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmwkvc2ic2u", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "#Medsky🧪 #IDsky #publichealth Linking cohort symptoms to #COVID effects on #astrocytes . This research underscores the vital role of astrocytes in the neuropathological landscape of #NeuroCOVID By demonstrating how infection compromises their homeostatic functions,", "created_at": "2026-04-16 17:27:20", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmwkvcdbk2u", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "the findings identify promising therapeutic targets for treating the neurological complications associated with COVID\n\nwww.news-medical.net/whitepaper/2...", "created_at": "2026-04-16 17:27:20", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmwkvc2ic2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmwkvc2ic2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmwhph2fk2g", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Aus der Analyse der OECD zu den Langzeitkosten von #LongCOVID:\nLong COVID habe außerdem einen starken Einfluss auf den Bildungs- und Arbeitsbereich. Die oft lang anhaltenden Symptome führten dazu, dass der Bildungsstand von vielen Kindern abnehme.\n\nwww.forschung-und-wissen.de/nachrichten/...\n\n#COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-16 17:25:06", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3oxo7fwlc6tr3t6vaerc623e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmuk7rgyc22", "author_handle": "dmcwriter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dawn Colclasure Wilson", "text": "Watch This Space by Dawn Colclasure is a collection of poetry recording events that took place from 2020-2023. With poems about the worldwide pandemic and civil unrest at home, this book is a testament to overcoming struggles and banding together for survival. #COVID \nwww.amazon.com/dp/B0D3B2S89...", "created_at": "2026-04-16 16:48:27", "like_count": 58, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 44, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qlen44slfh76dcpkpuvexnbo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjptvaboic2h", "author_handle": "ghostlyverse.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "LindaAnn LoSchiavo", "text": "Very nice to see this, Dawn!!", "created_at": "2026-04-17 21:16:29", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:3oxo7fwlc6tr3t6vaerc623e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmuk7rgyc22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:3oxo7fwlc6tr3t6vaerc623e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmuk7rgyc22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3oxo7fwlc6tr3t6vaerc623e/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjqh77zmp22r", "author_handle": "dmcwriter.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dawn Colclasure Wilson", "text": "Thank you! ‘underutilised’ in the early stages of Covid vaccine rollout \n\nbuff.ly/nk8NzZG \n\n#covid #vaccination #vaccines #covidvaccination #covidinquiry #module4 #pharmacy", "created_at": "2026-04-16 15:06:31", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:saskmpevgpx3xdrviwi2ncvn/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjmmxksdwk25", "author_handle": "maskblocwr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mask Bloc Waterloo Region", "text": "Yes, vaccines are very good at reducing hospitalization risk and more should be done to promote them.\n\nHospitals also need to prevent spread of airborne disease; for example, by mandating respirator mask use. "author_display_name": "Rowsby", "text": "Went to Urgent Care this morning because of a lung infection trying to kill me. No sleep, just jumbled dreams of churning damp earth & the screams of angry ancestors.\n\nWore a shirt the color of what I was spitting up.\n\nOddly, the medical furniture already was color coordinated.\n\n#covid #lungbutter", "created_at": "2026-04-16 00:10:20", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 3, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:sz3fr4vqpvocqymbds2ikybo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl6ihmw7k2p", "author_handle": "hamburgerjack.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jack★", "text": "😱 I hope you feel better soon and can dream well!!", "created_at": "2026-04-16 00:42:53", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qq6xuks3gqdlh3xzt6zq3p2r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl4o4flak2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qq6xuks3gqdlh3xzt6zq3p2r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl4o4flak2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lsfd4vwlggjjzd3ztnyti65i/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl5ifvgnk2i", "author_handle": "sweetgrandmajan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grandma Janet", "text": "Oh noo, take care of yourself and get well soon. 🤗", "created_at": "2026-04-16 00:24:59", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qq6xuks3gqdlh3xzt6zq3p2r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl4o4flak2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qq6xuks3gqdlh3xzt6zq3p2r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl4o4flak2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qq6xuks3gqdlh3xzt6zq3p2r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl6675g2c2r", "author_handle": "rowsby.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rowsby", "text": "Thanks! An hour after the first dose, I could tell that I was gonna survive… 👍🏼", "created_at": "2026-04-16 00:35:55", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:fkbfuq3rwljnv6eskrlgai73/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl5nvs7qk2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qq6xuks3gqdlh3xzt6zq3p2r/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjl4o4flak2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hzri77mb2gumga27wv7gf3fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkyp4ok7s27", "author_handle": "tundrataoist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🧿✨MJ, TundraTaoist✨🧿 aka 🏹 Damsel of DPS 🏹 🌷She/Her🌷 ❄️Alaska❄️ ❌👑", "text": "And EXACTLY like the friction kicked up about #masking during #COVID, the actual reason folks \"needed\" to \"see you pretty smile\" is absolutely baked in #Bias #Prejudice #Racism #Sexism #PrettyPrivilege #Classism. Insisting on physical performance/appearance is ‪#Hierarchical #Leveling behavior.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 22:59:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hzri77mb2gumga27wv7gf3fm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkz3ll7x22u", "author_handle": "tundrataoist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🧿✨MJ, TundraTaoist✨🧿 aka 🏹 Damsel of DPS 🏹 🌷She/Her🌷 ❄️Alaska❄️ ❌👑", "text": "It has fuck all to do with #NonVerbal #Communication. "🧵15 avril #LongCovidAwarenessDay\n\nPendant que le débat politique se focalise sur la “chasse aux arrêts maladie”, un angle mort persiste :\n👉 le rôle du #Covid et du #CovidLong\n\nEt surtout… l’absence totale de #prévention ⤵️", "created_at": "2026-04-15 16:18:50", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:kuy3jrhvgfcnw6gdwudltrki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkznqzr4s2h", "author_handle": "sabinameir.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "petrameier", "text": "On a à peine des informations sur covid long. Je pense si souvent que j'ai le covid long,mais s'il y a tant des symptômes différents,et on a plus des médecins pour en parler...", "created_at": "2026-04-15 23:16:24", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7gls2k", "author_handle": "apresj20.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#ApresJ20 - Association Covid Long France", "text": "Depuis 6 ans, un fait est documenté scientifiquement :\n👉 plus on attrape le Covid, plus le risque de développer un Covid Long augmente.\n\nChaque réinfection = une prise de risque supplémentaire.\n\nCe n’est pas anodin. Ce n’est pas un “rhume”.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 16:18:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7hl22k", "author_handle": "apresj20.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#ApresJ20 - Association Covid Long France", "text": "📢Comme nous l’alertions déjà :\n\n« Chaque réinfection augmente le risque de Covid long et de séquelles invalidantes. »\n\n👉 Une réalité encore largement ignorée dans les politiques publiques.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 16:18:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7gls2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7ikc2k", "author_handle": "apresj20.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#ApresJ20 - Association Covid Long France", "text": "Le Covid Long, c’est :\n➡️ une maladie multi-systémique\n➡️ souvent invalidante\n➡️ pouvant mener au handicap\n\nFatigue extrême, troubles cognitifs, POTS, atteintes cardio, neuro, immunitaires…\n\n👉 Et donc, incapacité à travailler pour beaucoup.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 16:18:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7hl22k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7jjk2k", "author_handle": "apresj20.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#ApresJ20 - Association Covid Long France", "text": "📊Conséquence directe :\n👉 des arrêts maladie, parfois longs, parfois définitifs\n\nMais au lieu d’interroger les causes…\n➡️ on culpabilise les malades\n\nSans jamais nommer l’éléphant dans la pièce : le Covid.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 16:18:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7ikc2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7vak2k", "author_handle": "apresj20.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#ApresJ20 - Association Covid Long France", "text": "📢 Septembre 2025, nous alertions déjà :\n\n« Il est profondément incohérent de laisser circuler un virus aux conséquences graves tout en blâmant les malades pour leurs absences. »\n\nRien n’a changé depuis.\n\n📉Pourtant, les chiffres s’accumulent.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 16:18:50", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7jjk2k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:h2xzbe6rzb5xowkpjqpg33sh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjltlt43ms2e", "author_handle": "dika6074.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Et par les médecins eux-mêmes !", "created_at": "2026-04-16 07:14:31", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccw7hl22k", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hj7yy2ga4d26yke4ugp7c7er/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkccrturk2k"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:q7crgxg544ghebzw4thghmri/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjkbkzyb622f", "author_handle": "omarlittle1.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Media Ecosystem ", "text": "My Take: These folks deserve all the smoke they get. Spencer", "text": "1/\n\"All of this is to say that I have felt what mass casualty incidents (MCIs) feel like. It dawned on me today that the #COVID pandemic is just another #MCI, but in very slow motion\":\n\n@molesen.bsky.social \nVia @gayfabfourfan.bsky.social \n\nicemsg.org/2026/04/13/p...", "created_at": "2026-04-15 00:57:34", "like_count": 9, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrlmc26", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\n\"There is a huge difference though. In traditional MCIs, the adrenaline can push one through because there is light at the end of the tunnel & it can be done in hours, days, or weeks.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 00:57:34", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotq2cik26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotq2cik26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrnks26", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\n...The pandemic is different. It’s been 6 years without a break. In other MCIs, people generally are grateful to have people generally are grateful to have people trying to help them.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 00:57:34", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrlmc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotq2cik26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrpjc26", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n...There is some of that with the pandemic, but just as many sending threats of harm & death. I never expected that would be the case. \n\nAll of the misinformation & lies being spread by people who are trying to make a buck off of this makes things worse\".", "created_at": "2026-04-15 00:57:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrnks26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotq2cik26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrqik26", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\n\"I think that those of us who can see where the pandemic is heading are facing these kinds of emotional responses as well. The acute illness early in the pandemic was bad.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 00:57:34", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrpjc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotq2cik26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjiotqrsh226", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n...That’s just the tip of the iceberg of suffering and death. Most of that still lies ahead & most people don’t seem to understand it or choose to ignore facing that reality\".", "created_at": "2026-04-15 00:57:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "This!\nI do not know how parents will cope when it becomes apparent what they have done to their children.\nI look at the huge growth of anti-vax parents and wonder why their energy couldn't have gone into anti-Covid if they REALLY didn't want to damage their children.\nI am sad and tired.", "created_at": "2026-04-15 01:04:07", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhurohujc2f", "root_uri": Patreon supports this significant journalistic undertaking!\n\nMore work by Violet, ie the #CovidSafetyHandbook:\n\nwww.patreon.com/violetblue/shop\n\n𝟹/𝟹", "created_at": "2026-04-14 17:11:11", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhurqaxo22f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:5pds6fax4nwcysq5nqsxiqn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhurohujc2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nAnecdotally, since I developed #LongCOVID after a #COVID infection in March 2020, I've noticed a difference in my sleep: at its worst, I was only getting 3 hours sleep a night, my consciousness would not shut down.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:23:33", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n57yc2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\nIt's much better now, although for years (& still sometimes now), my nocturnal heart rate can speed up enough to wake me, sometimes I wake with a start to take a breath, & many of my angina-like symptoms happen at night.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:23:33", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n5bws2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\nBut the part that bothers me the most, is losing access to my dreams. Probably permanently. My dreams seem to happen in another country of my mind, without me. They leave only traces, an evanescent sense of. And are gone.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:23:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n57yc2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n5cw22t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\nThe benefit of this: I am out of reach of nightmares. But I miss the other dreams. I've always dreamt vividly, sometimes I'd write down the more powerful dreams, pick over them, find things. Some dreams I remembered for years. But no more.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:23:34", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n5bws2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n5euk2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nStrangely enough, in place of dreams, I've developed #Hypnagogia - \n\nmagazine.hms.harvard.edu/articles/beh...", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:23:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n5cw22t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4nvdhs2t", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nOn either end of rest, I occasionally see the most mesmerizing imagery, snippets of animation of such a high standard that it would have taken an animator a very long time to imagine & produce. \n\nBut here they are in my mind, in isolation, preverbal, impossible to record, arresting.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:23:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n5euk2t", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhs4n4y6c2t"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:jj3szqwfglmbzrzuj7m6rhhz/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhromu4zc2p", "author_handle": "thewhn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "World Health Network", "text": "Your voice helps raise awareness, inform research, and push for real change.\n\nSurvey link: docs.google.com/forms/d/1wed...\n\n#LongCOVID #PublicHealth #COVID #COVID19 #LongCOVIDAwareness", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:15:44", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 6, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhqeir6q22j", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "SARS-CoV-2 directly infects the inner ear and causes hearing dysfunction\n\nwww.cell.com/cell-reports...\n\n#medsky\n#COVID\n#LongCOVID\n#SARSCoV2", "created_at": "2026-04-14 15:52:22", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 4, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhryee5lc2j", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "A #SARSCoV2 infection can lead to cellular damage and loss of function in the inner ear. The virus directly infects the spiral ganglion neurons (SGNs) and induces their apoptosis.\n\n#medsky\n\n#LongCOVID", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:21:28", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhqeir6q22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhqeir6q22j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d57eial5goacffcqzpbcw33v/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhrmebayc2g", "author_handle": "supercuriousphd.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SupercuriousPhD", "text": "I had mild-to-moderate imbalance when going up or down stairs for ~3 months after recovering from a milder case of Covid-19 (fever, exhaustion) which lasted about 5 d. I was ok after that- Glad to see the confirmation of my personal experience!", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:14:26", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": l'enegrgia ha previsto che la domanda di #petrolio diminuirà di 80mila barili al giorno (bpd) quest'anno #covid #guerra #iran #medio-oriente", "created_at": "2026-04-14 12:18:27", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:67nlpu5j2wlfzmrd26644l47/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhdwiphy22s", "author_handle": "useyourbrain.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "PlsUseYourBrain", "text": "\"Acute neurological symptoms, particularly CNS symptoms, like delirium and brain fog, are significantly associated with long-term cognitive decline in COVID-19 survivors. "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "For many, boosters are timed specifically for early winter to provide maximum protection when respiratory viruses typically surge and put pressure on health systems.\nWhile recommended for most people, annual or even more frequent boosters (e.g., every 6 months)", "created_at": "2026-04-14 05:39:16", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgo4kjprs2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgo4kdfn22l"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgo4kjspk2l", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "are strongly advised for high-risk groups \n-Adults aged 65 and older\n-Individuals with weakened immune systems\n-People with chronic medical conditions like🫀 or 🫁 disease\n-Those who are pregnant \nwww.nhs.uk/vaccinations...: \n\npmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC... \n\nwww.gavi.org/vaccineswork....", "created_at": "2026-04-14 05:39:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgo4kjrqc2l", "root_uri": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "core neurological issues such as fatigue and \"brain fog\" frequently persist or even worsen between the one-year and two-year marks.\nTwo years post #COVID survivors with acute neurological symptoms face a trajectory\ndefined by a persistent high prevalence of cognitive impairment", "created_at": "2026-04-14 04:40:35", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgktlgaak2l", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "(up to 19% in previously hospitalized cases), a significant risk for new-onset conditions like insomnia & epilepsy & a strong correlation between these deficits and long-term disability or loss of employment.\n@nature.com \nwww.nature.com/articles/s41...\n\nwww.mdpi.com/2076-3425/15...", "created_at": elevated 2 years after infection compared to matched controls \n-Prevalence: ~ \n19.1%of survivors who were hospitalized &", "created_at": "2026-04-14 04:40:35", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgktm2bts2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgktlg6c22l"} {"uri": survivors exhibit objective cognitive impairment at the 2-year mark .\n-Worsening Symptoms: Some studies found that cognitive symptoms (specifically memory & attention deficits) were more severe at 2–3 years than at 6 or 12 months post-hospitalisation", "created_at": "2026-04-14 04:40:35", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": cognitive deficits at 2 years are strongly associated with occupational changes, including reduced working hours or inability to return to work.\nSurvivors who experienced acute neurological manifestations", "created_at": "2026-04-14 04:40:35", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgktnb6xk2l", #Body #LongCovid", "created_at": "2026-04-14 03:15:56", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2v2fa4i42pyc75i6trtdtshu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgepmtwss2m", "author_handle": "jmzed.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "JMZ", "text": "third night of barely any sleep due to a cough that is sometimes dry, sometimes wet\nmy youngest has been coughing & snotty for over a week now,\nmy eldest seems to have had it for just two days,\nmy wife seems to have to sleep for a whole day every 2 days!\n\n#Covid #Coronavirus", "created_at": "2026-04-14 02:51:06", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjsoejzm7at4syhrvzgizrev/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgewypfek2p", "author_handle": "ainekeenan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Áine Keenan ", "text": "😖💔", "created_at": "2026-04-14 02:55:05", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:2v2fa4i42pyc75i6trtdtshu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgepmtwss2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:2v2fa4i42pyc75i6trtdtshu/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgepmtwss2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gn2kse6la67tbradtrbysmbq/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjgcri3lm22a", "author_handle": "dja2.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "A2 Farmer", "text": "This is what happens when health policy decisions are made to maximize for economic outcomes. \n\n#Sweden was the poster child country for “let er rip” #Covid policy. Now their average lifespan has decreased by SEVEN years.\n\n#MasksWork #YOLOKills", "created_at": "2026-04-14 02:16:12", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg4e4obyq2t", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "I’ve put my detective hat on to seek out the NBN plans offering the best value in April 2026 — these 3 came out on top https://cstu.io/471d85 #oneplus #techie #covid", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:21:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Et on arrive au #covid.\nLe 25 mars 2020, une vidéo postée sur le compte YouTube de l'IHU de Marseille fait un buzz énorme.\nUn chercheur, déjà très médiatisé, annonce la \"FIN DE PARTIE\" pour le #coronavirus.\n39/", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:00:35", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35kozwc26", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Il se réfère à une étude chinoise qui démontrerait que la chloroquine était le remède ultime face au nouveau virus et que le problème était donc réglé.\n\nLe titre de la vidéo a été changé par la suite, de manière un peu moins sensationnaliste.\n40/", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:00:35", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35nzebc26", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Vérification faite, l'étude chinoise en question n'était qu'une simple lettre envoyée par des médecins chinois à une revue. Il n'y aura jamais d'article publié en bonne et due forme.\nEt les Chinois étaient très, très loin de tout miser sur la chloroquine (et de proclamer la \"fin de partie\").\n\n41/", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:00:35", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35kozwc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35t6s7k26", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Alors vous allez me dire que Raoult parle d'hydroxychloroquine et pas de chloroquine.\nEt bien non. Au début, c'est la chloroquine.\n\nLisez ça.\n\nEt un jour \"La chloroquine disparaît comme par enchantement\"\n\n...\n42/", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:00:35", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35nzebc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35unnac26", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Une maladie infectieuse aux conséquences graves.\nUne annonce sensationnaliste d'un remède très simple, avec peu d'effets secondaires, hyper efficace. Un remède qui va éradiquer le mal. Un remède venu de Chine.\nUn emballement médiatique sans recul.\n...\nÇa vous rappelle quelque chose ?\n\n43/", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:00:35", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35t6s7k26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg367runk26", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Perso, j'ai fait le parallèle dès que je me suis penché sur cette histoire de malaria et de tisane.\n\nAvec dans les 2 cas, cette logique du \"ça marche\", donc vu que ça marche, il ne faut pas emm... les gens avec des histoires de vérification des faits ou de méthodologie.\n\n44/", "created_at": "2026-04-14 00:00:35", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35unnac26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:iv4frwyw2oudz7shpx4cyhmy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhqqgyruc25", "author_handle": "benjoux.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Petite imprecision dans ce blog post: la lettre BioScience Trends n'est pas à propos d'études in vitro, mais à porpos de résultats préliminaires d'études cliniques (sur humains).\n\nEtudes, qui finalement ne donneront rien.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 15:59:03", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35nzebc26", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhr6ifz3c2f", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Il y a confusion. \nLà je cite Raoult (qui n'est pas très clair mais semble se référer à une première recherche).", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:06:50", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:iv4frwyw2oudz7shpx4cyhmy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhqqgyruc25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjg35jabtc26"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhr6mfi6k2f", "author_handle": "grompf3.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Grompf", "text": "Et c'est ce à quoi je me réfère plus pas.\nD'abord une rechercher in vitro.\nPuis la fameuse étude évoquée par Raoult dans sa vidéo et jamais publiée.", "created_at": "2026-04-14 16:06:50", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:w477bdrwbpo2u4ra3aq33pki/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjhr6ifz3c2f", "root_uri": The pandemic likely made things worse.\n\nwww.nationalgeographic.com/science/arti...\n\n#News #WorldNews #Science #Research #Health #PublicHealth #Medical #MedSky #COVID #COVID19 #Coronavirus #Pandemic #Virus #Superbugs #Antibiotics #AntibioticResistance", "created_at": "2026-04-13 20:27:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ma5n7cq5oubn424zpxipovbg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfok3nks22r", "author_handle": "marushka-t.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marushka-T", "text": "#COVID #pandemic #notflu #disability #chronicillness #maskup #cleantheair", "created_at": "2026-04-13 20:14:36", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncxx6kk24", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "*** Ontario Virus & Variant Update | Apr 13 ***\n\nHospitalizations due to COVID have gone down from 153 to 123 in the last update. Influenza hospitalizations decreased from 59 to 47 and RSV decreased from 110 to 85. 🧵1/\n\n#Ontario #Virus #Variant #COVID #RSV #Influenza #Hospital", "created_at": "2026-04-13 19:52:23", "like_count": 41, "reply_count": 3, "repost_count": 14, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncyl4as24", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "Looking at age groups, those age 75+ had the highest rates of hospitalization due to COVID but decreased since last update. Second place is age 0-4 and their levels are currently increasing while age 65-74 has the third highest rate and also decreased since last update. 2/", "created_at": "2026-04-13 19:52:23", "like_count": 16, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncxx6kk24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncxx6kk24"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncz3btc24", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "The youngest age group 0-4 currently have a hospitalization rate due to COVID that are 17x higher than age 5-17, 17x higher than age 18-49, and 2.8x higher than adults 50-64. 3/", "created_at": "2026-04-13 19:52:23", "like_count": 24, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 14, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncyl4as24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncxx6kk24"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncz3csk24", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "Variant trackers have noticed an interesting pattern with the BA.3.2 \"Cicada\" family where the highest proportion of sequences reported have been in children and seems to hold true for all countries reporting age with their COVID sequences. 4/", "created_at": "2026-04-13 19:52:23", "like_count": 18, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncz3btc24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncxx6kk24"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncz3drs24", "author_handle": "jeffgilchrist.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jeff Gilchrist", "text": "What about Ontario? In PHO's latest April report, this also seems to hold true ( www.publichealthontario.ca/-/media/docu... ). 5/", "created_at": "2026-04-13 19:52:23", "like_count": 12, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncz3csk24", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mxrjf4cqkfxfmdzmfydbcxxg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjfncxx6kk24"} {"uri":
