Spencer", "text": "Another reminder why a passive \"wait and see\" approach with #COVID, is ill conceived - \n\n bsky.app/profile/elho...", "created_at": "2026-04-13 15:28:13", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:saskmpevgpx3xdrviwi2ncvn/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjf6cwsusc2t", "author_handle": "maskblocwr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mask Bloc Waterloo Region", "text": "\"A large study ... found that #COVID infection, irrespective of disease severity, raises long-term heart risks in people with #hypertension. Hospitalized patients showed 65% higher rates of major cardiac events and 2.5x mortality, years after their infection.\"\n\nwww.nature.com/articles/s41...", "created_at": "2026-04-13 15:23:52", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:saskmpevgpx3xdrviwi2ncvn/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjf6aqh5522t", "author_handle": "maskblocwr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mask Bloc Waterloo Region", "text": "\"A survey of 2,340 people across Austria, Germany, and Switzerland found that roughly 40% reported significant loss of smell or taste, a striking prevalence that researchers have connected to #COVID infections in the region.\"\n\nlink.springer.com/article/10.1...", "created_at": "2026-04-13 15:22:37", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:saskmpevgpx3xdrviwi2ncvn/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjf5yjl2mc2t", "author_handle": "maskblocwr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mask Bloc Waterloo Region", "text": "www.cell.com/cell-reports... #SARS-Cov-2 #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-13 15:18:03", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dmqffqnazvesjtj3yco2hbvo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjf3cwjw5k2u", "author_handle": "bestsurvivor.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Ofherb 🟦🌈🕎🌻🎶🐈", "text": "Don't get Covid. Both in vitro & in vivo studies demonstrate that this viral mitochondriopathy occurs with many CoVs", "created_at": "2026-04-13 07:49:44", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ifaz5i5ttcqu6zpt5owztxet/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjehcz5u622d", "author_handle": "peashen.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Heather Peacock 🇵🇸", "text": "So what is the genetic or environmental profile thst shows some people get long covid and others do not. Is there a common external feature that might help us identify and support those who are susceptible?", "created_at": "2026-04-13 08:32:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewxfs2k2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewxfs2k2x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjewpng5q22l", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "Research indicates that susceptibility to LC is a complex interplay of genetic, immunological & environmental factors, rather than a single profile. Survivors of #COVID infection often report chronic symptoms such as fatigue, low tolerance to exercise, neurocognitive dysfunction,", "created_at": "2026-04-13 07:49:44", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewvya2c2x", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "along with expression of markers which correlate with mitochondrial dysfunction. Multiple critical mitochondrial pathways are disrupted, including mitochondrial ATP synthesis, mitochondrial dynamics, mitochondrial apoptosis signalling and mitochondrial-mediated oxygen sensing.", "created_at": "2026-04-13 07:49:44", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewxfp4s2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewvxxb22x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewxfs2k2x", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TRAstonDrs", "text": "These impairments contribute to some key clinical features, such as DAD and profound hypoxaemia in some patients with #COVID. Persistent mitochondrial dysfunction may also contribute to ‘ #longCOVID’. Both in vitro & in vivo studies demonstrate that this viral mitochondriopathy occurs with many CoVs", "created_at": "2026-04-13 07:49:44", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewxfr3c2x", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjeewvxxb22x"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pbn5mmuxb722ybcvs6vbln43/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdyutexqk24", "author_handle": "camillezazyx.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Camille", "text": "Não é novidade,mas sempre é bom repetir que a #COVID não é uma \"gripezinha\".\n\nO SARS-CoV-2 provoca uma doença sistêmica cruel,que depois de algumas tantas infecções,adoece gravemente seu portador ou até mesmo o mata sem avisar - sem dó e nem pena!\n\nA Covid veio para ficar,tome a vacina!", "created_at": "2026-04-13 04:13:54", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gk4zi3g4ugnstua3eja72jrr/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdxgyksb22p", "author_handle": "the-moonshadow.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Roslyn Reid", "text": "And people seem all too happy to forget the sight of those refrigerated trucks. 🤬 #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-13 03:48:09", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:afxc6locdkxx3dxqgiczqbi6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdw57t2zc2p", "author_handle": "b2o6n4.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Woke Not Broke 🇺🇸🏳️‍🌈", "text": "COVID-19 is linked to new diabetes cases—but long-term problems could be more severe\n\nwww.nationalgeographic.com/science/arti...\n\n#News #WorldNews #Science #Research #Health #PublicHealth #Medical #MedSky #Diabetes #COVID #COVID19 #Coronavirus #Body #Organs #Pancreas #Virus", "created_at": "2026-04-13 03:24:51", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:afxc6locdkxx3dxqgiczqbi6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdv3ycwp22j", "author_handle": "b2o6n4.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Woke Not Broke 🇺🇸🏳️‍🌈", "text": "How COVID-19 harms the heart\n\nwww.nationalgeographic.com/science/arti...\n\n#News #WorldNews #Science #Research #Health #PublicHealth #Medical #MedSky #Heart #HeartHealth #COVID #COVID19 #Coronavirus #Body #Organs", "created_at": "2026-04-13 03:06:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:yp42wbf536uiihzlxgtviolc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdnsqezec2a", "author_handle": "longcovidcan-co.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Long COVID Canada - In French and English!\n\nbsky.app/profile/quee...", "created_at": "2026-04-23 01:08:04", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:kp2ouhsjdapbxoh2ahpnby2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjia42juok2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:kp2ouhsjdapbxoh2ahpnby2k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdmmlpz7k2b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjdcmplxbc2y", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Lloop #feedback #math #tennis #uk #Iran #israel #russia \n\nWhy does social media turn people stupid?", "created_at": "2026-04-12 21:35:55", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjd45gkkgq2w", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - Dr Glen Barry BigEarthData.ai", "text": "California missed 11,000 COVID deaths early in pandemic, Stanford and UCSF researchers find\n->MSN News | More on \"California COVID death undercount research\" at BigEarthData.ai | #Covid #Pandemic", "created_at": "2026-04-12 19:39:37", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcz5tum7k2r", "author_handle": "halcionandon.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anna - Please boost pinned tweet.🙏", "text": "So incredibly wrecked.\n\nMust escape to #Covid conscious place soon.\n\nI’ve had it 4 times in 20 months because nobody is masking here & constant #abuse #neglect #coercivecontrol\n\nLosing ability to fight off infections. Dr says this will kill me & it will if I don’t get out.\n\nIs anyone out there?", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:46:11", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zhox7mzzskgfnemlcdcdf2w7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcy23uo4c2f", "author_handle": "innkeeperez.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "@InnkeeperEZ", "text": "Make a problem, talk shit, blame others, haphazardly repair problem they made in first place. Is all these fucqers do.\n#Hormuz #Israel #Venezuela #Tariffs #NorthKorea #China #Shutdowns #FamilySeparations #NATO #Covid #Taliban #Iran #USPS #PuertoRico #AffordableCareAct \nAnd, “that one” raped kids.", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:26:11", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zpzp52eh4lmzyxpcilifckt6/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxnf7vvs2n", "author_handle": "cathy007.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Cathy Fella🌻🍁🐕💉👩🏻‍⚕️😷💙💛", "text": "#Canada\n#Covid & #Variants \n#RSV\n#Flu\n\nhealth-infobase.canada.ca/wastewater/v...", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:19:06", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7pzmcec6abkmylluzivvs3po/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxdfyo7k2p", "author_handle": "ratherearnest.com", "author_display_name": "Earnest Painter", "text": "Six years ago. A lifetime. Lockdown. \n\nA museum—I think it was @readingmuseum.bsky.social in England—encouraged people to make displays in their homes of things they had around the house. They gave ideas and suggestions. \n\n#covid #pandemic #lockdown", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:13:32", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:zptb3zf5ccyybyrkhxgqiizy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxfrsh7k2y", "author_handle": "cococoyote.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "coco coyote", "text": "beautiful!", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:14:49", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7pzmcec6abkmylluzivvs3po/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxdfyo7k2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7pzmcec6abkmylluzivvs3po/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxdfyo7k2p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7pzmcec6abkmylluzivvs3po/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxfubcnk2p", "author_handle": "ratherearnest.com", "author_display_name": "Earnest Painter", "text": "It was over a year after restrictions were lifted before I could get used to getting up from my desk without a mask on. I had worked through lockdown as an essential employee.", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:14:52", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:7pzmcec6abkmylluzivvs3po/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxdfyo7k2p", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:7pzmcec6abkmylluzivvs3po/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcxdfyo7k2p"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:oc64fm5ry4c5655hoqiiqr7l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcwojqhub23", "author_handle": "anubis2814.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anubis2814", "text": "Mind you, this was prior to #enshittification and most things worked a lot longer and better and #COVID hadn't wiped out a generation of workers with experience. Perhaps in another universe where these hadn't happened they were much more logical and likely. (5/6)", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:01:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:oc64fm5ry4c5655hoqiiqr7l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcwojthos27", "author_handle": "anubis2814.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anubis2814", "text": "To be fair, any hero universe would have to be a lot more socialistic, as it would require the government to act as insurance against hero damage because like we are seeing with climate change, its not a profitable option, so no insurance company would touch it. (6/6)", "created_at": "2026-04-12 18:01:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:oc64fm5ry4c5655hoqiiqr7l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcwojqhub23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:oc64fm5ry4c5655hoqiiqr7l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjcwojqhub23"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vfutoefeybg5z6jqimi7oxl5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjctl4n53s2g", "author_handle": "pkiefer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Philipp Kiefer", "text": "Seit #covid haben alle Fahrräder 🤷‍♂️\n\nDer faule deutsche Michel hat es dann aber schnel wieder im Keller verstauben lassen nachdem man endlich wieder brettern durfte 🤷‍♂️🤷‍♂️🤷‍♂️\n\nPrivilegien - so geil 💪💪💪", "created_at": "2026-04-12 17:06:14", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mo6pmkd3cvtig3h4yn4z46i7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjch4tdbrs2g", "author_handle": "katinthestars.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Kavi Kat 🌬️", "text": "I was injured by a speeding boxtruck 💥🚛 in 2023. I have had #Covid 4x and just barely survived the flu. 😷 \n\nIn less than 3 years I've gone from working overtime as a boss to barely getting around the house. \n\nI also just found out I have the gene 🧬 for AS like my family members. ♿️", "created_at": "2026-04-12 13:21:59", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjbpomizfs2a", "author_handle": "leanhealth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. med. Hank Schiffers", "text": "In 18 reichen Ländern ist Krankenhausversorgung heute schwerer zugänglich, dauert es Aufnahme bis Entlassung länger & ist von schlechterer Qualität\n\nDas ist der Zustand nach & mit #Covid, Folge der Weigerung Arbeitskleidung & Ausrüstung der neuen Gegebenheit anzupassen\n#MaskeAuf", "created_at": "2026-04-12 06:23:59", "like_count": 29, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 6, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xwjp5xzfvdvccnf77pitdhc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjbponqg5k2a", "author_handle": "leanhealth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dr. med. Can work. Up to $1200/2wks. \n\nRent or live your place. On DSP. Livable for both.\n \nWhy nobody interested? \n#Covid safe?\n\nNot intensive, can wipe own butt. \n\n#SignalBoost #MutualAidAustralia #HelpSky #DisabilityMA \n💕💸 \n#MADBoost #MutualAid \n💸❤️", "created_at": "2026-04-11 19:54:53", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:fetucioydvu5e7ujri3hz4m3/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjpk7iabuk2w", "author_handle": "seamstress22.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Number 22", "text": "Australia! I hope someone responds. I’m surprised at your neighbors.", "created_at": "2026-04-17 18:23:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjamjrz64s2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjamjrz64s2f"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mjqraffsrs2j", "author_handle": "halcionandon.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anna - Please boost pinned tweet.🙏", "text": "Nobody interested even though some people are starving here. I’ve asked before.\nBeen screaming for years & now it’s so bad I‘m literally going to die if I don’t escape. Ask my doctor.\n\nOnly one neighbour cared but moved away. He’s worse than Hawley, imo.", "created_at": "2026-04-10 19:22:02", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wylg23ut4cz6g6berbqq6srd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5unspeu225", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:wylg23ut4cz6g6berbqq6srd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5unspeu225"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wylg23ut4cz6g6berbqq6srd/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5um44lfc25", "author_handle": "jediyoda.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Yep figured as Eric Schmitt is a #covid #RINO \n\nbsky.app/profile/jedi...", "created_at": "2026-04-10 17:41:22", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5uj5kyzs2o", "author_handle": "halcionandon.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anna - Please boost pinned tweet.🙏", "text": "Can people with a big following please retweet my pinned tweet? Please help. 🥺🙏\n #SignalBoost #MutualAid #HelpSky #FundSky #UrgentNeed #HelpFolksLive2026\n#MutualAidAustralia\n#DisabilityMA\n💕💸", "created_at": "2026-04-10 17:39:42", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2ldddqzgrab5by6r255zwszf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5rexrrdsm2", "author_handle": "phillycodehound.indieweb.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Seth of the Fediverse ⁂", "text": "So far today... no fever. Just a mild headache. Hopefully that's done soon! #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-10 16:43:42", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "If my trusted & reasonable friend said, Hey did you know so-and-so damages your immune system and awakens dormant cancer cells, I think I’d go Wow etc., & then Google it later to confirm or not. Instead my friends seem to leave their bodies & apparently never again consider what I said. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-10 16:31:48", "like_count": 71, "reply_count": 4, "repost_count": 16, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptrn22j", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "I get it—it’s frightening and overwhelming. But there’s a way to stop it: Wear a good mask wherever you can get or spread COVID—particularly in airports, on airplanes, and in healthcare settings.", "created_at": "2026-04-10 16:31:48", "like_count": 34, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tgxfmcqlm2lw65r5dlsveuao/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5rp4fhqk23", "author_handle": "mikevlasic.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Mike Vlasic", "text": "My personal rule is to always wear a respirator mask in all public buildings.\nAvoiding mass gatherings such as at sports/music events also helps.\nWe haven't been sick with anything in 6 years and counting.", "created_at": "2026-04-10 16:49:21", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptrn22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj6255yjv22b", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "Us too. Isn’t it amazing? I wish I’d “discovered” masks earlier.", "created_at": "2026-04-10 19:20:25", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:tgxfmcqlm2lw65r5dlsveuao/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5rp4fhqk23", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eqj3d7isy55vl4gwhct5ytzf/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj6s3hdr6223", "author_handle": "writerartisteh.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Writer/Artist#StopFemicide 🇨🇦📚🧑🏻‍🎨🇵🇸", "text": "I wear one even outside—all times of the year. I just can’t afford covid. In BC, boosters will apparently be available by invite end of April.", "created_at": "2026-04-11 02:28:55", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj6255yjv22b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gjxoqid4cccweu6zq6bobnxb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5stre3622a", "author_handle": "morepeas.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "I’ve told this to people *undergoing cancer treatment* as well as those who have just completed it. No change in behavior. I think if the message isn’t backed up by their medical team—and it definitely isn’t—then it’s (understandably) discounted as hyperbole and unscientific", "created_at": "2026-04-10 17:09:52", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptrn22j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5qpptbz22j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj6b3doyts2z", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "The failure of the medical establishment to adapt to the clear and obvious problem of airborne transmission is a very large and serious contributor to COVID denialism. the Covid-19 vaccine cut hospitalizations and emergency room visits for healthy adults by half last winter.”\n\n#covid\n#covid19\n#ddrm\nnewrepublic.com/maz/post/208...", "created_at": "2026-04-10 A Yale study found they signal more severe long COVID, with higher rates of tremors, dizziness, and financial hardship. #COVID #LongCOVID", "created_at": "2026-04-10 13:22:16", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5fsagopr2e", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "NASA used a 12-year-old GoPro to capture a sight called the ‘greatest gift’ by Artemis II pilot — and it used one extreme setting to get the shot https://cstu.io/ee45d9 #computerscience #it #covid", "created_at": "2026-04-10 13:16:21", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ybkylyl2nkqvhxj4emcvwhbs/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5eprtfns2e", "author_handle": "mk8.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Luatha", "text": "#covid", "created_at": "2026-04-10 12:57:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5rvuhwzkodw5c7nqfukybmps/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5eoo4kek2o", "author_handle": "bbottone.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bengiamino Bottone", "text": "#HollywoodCiak 1922 #Tenet #ChristopherNolan #JohnDavidWashington #RobertPattinson #ElizabethDebicki #KennethBranagh #AaronTaylorJohnson #MichaelCaine #thriller #time #CIA #Kyiv #oligarch #India #Tallinn #Amalfi #Oslo #airport #cancer #family #art #covid \nhollywoodciak.blogspot.com/2020/09/film...", "created_at": "2026-04-10 12:56:28", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lc6hdhnjkgccd6ysi7e23pll/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5dnk2tab2p", "author_handle": "bigearthdata.ai", "author_display_name": "Climate, Ecology, War & More - #vaccinematters This study examined short-term mortality risk (within 4 weeks) following #COVID infection among people with disabilities in 🇰🇷 using nationwide data from 2020-2021 \n🔑 Findings\n- Mortality Risk: COVID infection was associated with an 11-fold increase", "created_at": "2026-04-10 03:25:56", "like_count": 14, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": mortality risk among people with disabilities compared to uninfected controls.\n-Disability Type Matters: Individuals with internal organ disorders had the highest mortality risk (14.11-fold increase), followed by physical disabilities, sensory impairments, and mental disabilities", "created_at": "2026-04-10 03:25:56", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": years and older showed substantially higher mortality risks, though relative risks were pronounced across all age groups .\n-Timing Effects: The highest mortality risk occurred in Q4 2020 (43.29-fold "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj5ggc3xk22c", "author_handle": "kvetcherforever.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SmooshyAndJayne", "text": "By inciting violence and because he was a national security threat due to his ties to Putin? Or didn't you know about those? www.theguardian.com/us-news/2017...", "created_at": "2026-04-10 13:27:38", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wiwrsngqvsr5tcyqrprt7eqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj42lncs2k2f", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3atraods2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3yg7a4xs2y", "author_handle": "kvetcherforever.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SmooshyAndJayne", "text": "Oh, please. Look at Schumer. Even now there are Democrats like Fetterman who are trying to placate Trump. What's different now from Trump's first go-around is that people are turning out in the millions to protest.\n\nprospect.org/2025/11/10/m...", "created_at": "2026-04-09 23:44:19", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wiwrsngqvsr5tcyqrprt7eqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3ch7copc2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3atraods2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wiwrsngqvsr5tcyqrprt7eqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj42sfrxy22f", "author_handle": "richpr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Richard", "text": "I’m not a big fan of Schumer, but he voted to convict Trump in both of his impeachment trials. \n\nFetterman is a clear outlier, and that’s because of brain damage from his stroke.\n\nSTOP BLAMING DEMOCRATS!\n\nwww.scientificamerican.com/article/can-...", "created_at": "2026-04-10 00:26:57", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3yg7a4xs2y", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3atraods2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3ybfykvs2y", "author_handle": "kvetcherforever.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "SmooshyAndJayne", "text": "She impeached him because the first time she was protecting Biden and the second time she had to. If she'd impeached him earlier for EVERYTHING the GOP would have had a hard time defending the indefensible, and maybe that would have gotten voters' attention. www.mcsweeneys.net/articles/feb...", "created_at": "2026-04-09 23:41:42", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:wiwrsngqvsr5tcyqrprt7eqm/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3ch7copc2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:hjshxq2b3fcfrzyuqkxkbfau/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3atraods2r"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj374pdf6c2j", "author_handle": "valkphotos.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "ValK.", "text": "Et c'est ballot car, après plusieurs semaines de baisse, le #Covid amorce une remontada dans les eaux-usées de pas mal d'endroits: \nz8po.github.io/covid-wasted... \nBref, sortez, aérez, purifiez l'air, portez des masques en intérieur ET VACCINEZ-VOUS ! (Oui, vous, là!)\n#AutodéfenseSanitaire 😷", "created_at": "2026-04-09 16:11:36", "like_count": 20, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 9, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj37g2jahc2j", "author_handle": "valkphotos.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "ValK.", "text": "Super important car ce n'est pas assez répété : il est possible de se faire vacciner 2 fois / an (au bout de 4 mois la protection, qui n'est déjà pas à 100%, baisse de manière significative) et TOUT LE MONDE peut se faire vacciner et c'est remboursé pour tous les assuré-es:\nbsky.app/profile/them...", "created_at": "2026-04-09 16:16:50", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj374pdf6c2j", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:onnpm5l6iwxtoshuzp6ztf2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj374pdf6c2j"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:6x3htlwki5qo4n2uqxkfxith/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj3cl7vaps2p", "author_handle": "lenimois.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lenimois", "text": "Ha mince j'apprends ça le jour d'entrée à l'hôpital. Bon après j'ai pu apporter le purificateur d'air, je vais pourvoir garder le masque et laisser ouvert la fenêtre", "created_at": "2026-04-09 17:13:25", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, Spencer", "text": "5/\nSo if we indeed have a strong El Niño this year, along with associated wildfires (as has been predicted) - what's the bet that 2026 will be the year that suddenly all the mitigations that should have been implemented to prevent #AirborneViruses will finally be trotted out,", "created_at": "2026-04-09 15:19:39", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj347pmr5k25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj347ozxlk25"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj347qsfas25", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. It was not even a 'super' sized one, but you will remember what that year’s fire season was like...", "created_at": "2026-04-09 15:19:39", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj347qsbds25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj347ozxlk25"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj347rezwk25", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "Now speak up for those workers daily exposed to an injurious #AirborneVirus, without any #NPIs in place to protect them -\n\n#COVID\n#LongCOVID\n#WestrayLaw", "created_at": "2026-04-09 14:14:20", "like_count": 21, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:3wpbo72ejmigvo4f7ecilyfc/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj2yjvzb3c2x", "author_handle": "porschejunkie.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Rob Nelson", "text": "Keith, perhaps our conversation might influence one or two Moms to get their kids the shots needed to avoid stuff like MEASLES, FFS. #Science #COVID #Vax", "created_at": "2026-04-09 14:13:44", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ebnpvh2qn74h56bqgsus4fur/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj2y76k77c2q", "author_handle": "christyceeck.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "My IRL friends call me Chris", "text": "“The secretary has already taken steps to…remove the availability of the vaccine from children…so if you’re putting out an MMWR that the vaccine is effective at preventing hospitalizations & medical care visits…that message is not line with the direction you’ve been taking with the removal…\"\n\n#Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-09 14:07:46", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:gsbmjjmgl5lwpbvrnncobi4l/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj2wgufdv22g", "author_handle": "suzannereisman.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Suzanne Reisman", "text": "This is a great 5 minute dramedy about chronic illness, loneliness, time travel, and friendship. I'm delighted to have been a PA on the covid cautious set that truly accommodated a variety of disabilities! #longcovid #covid #chronicillness #pots #DisabilityAwareness\n\nyoutu.be/Ei_Lc0rRD7M?...", "created_at": "2026-04-09 13:36:14", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj2u4nnqgs23", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #napoleon #Lloop #feedback #math #uk #Iran #israel #iran #ww3\n\ngoogle removed 40% of all search results - Instructions: #06/14 Thank You NHS\n\nCannon Street station was keen to promote its thanks to the tireless workers of the NHS during the Covid days.\n \n#withmycamera #streetphotography #photosbyrjt #outdoors #canoncamera #signs #instructions #covid #nhs #cannonstreetstation", "created_at": "2026-04-09 06:00:06", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:masyhuiqcqjq4qmd7a2tnfke/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj24qde6oc2e", "author_handle": "finstumpf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#AlphabetChallenge\n#WeekNforNonsense\nDay 4 \n2020 #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-09 05:56:18", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ysg7hp6kgncoryoll2fz2pgk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizz3o2ywk2h", "author_handle": "thebossross.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "TheBossRoss 🧶", "text": "Ich mag Clara Loesel sehr. Ihr Insta Post & alle Antworten sind hier ein Beispiel.\n\nClara sagt, sie & so viele ihrer Freunde seien ständig krank. Es sei belastend. Woher das nur kommt? Die Antworten genauso. Jede(r) permanent krank, über Monate, alle ratlos. An #Covid denkt niemand. Das ist absurd.", "created_at": "2026-04-09 04:51:01", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:42x2ra3bskulvlnjoo2l5lin/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj2apjgkjs24", "author_handle": "abertrotzdem.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lele Schirmeister", "text": "Covid wurde als Ursache von Beschwerden und Erkrankungen von Politik und Ärzteschaft Tabu erklärt. \nWenn du sagst, dass etwas eine Folge von Covid sein könnte, es wäre schließlich eine Multisystemerkrankung, halten dich Leute für einen Spinner. \nBrainwashing works.", "created_at": "2026-04-09 07:07:22", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ysg7hp6kgncoryoll2fz2pgk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizz3o2ywk2h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ysg7hp6kgncoryoll2fz2pgk/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizz3o2ywk2h"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pbn5mmuxb722ybcvs6vbln43/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizug2otlk2r", "author_handle": "camillezazyx.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Camille", "text": "#Covid\n\"Estranho.Na última semana de coleta de amostras de esgoto nos EUA: BA.3.2 presente na metade das amostras.\n\nMas,no mesmo período,estava em apenas 1% das sequências de pacientes.\n\nTalvez isso seja bom; talvez seja tão leve que não estejam testando.\n\nOu talvez não estejam testando crianças.\"", "created_at": "2026-04-09 03:27:20", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bxad2tvmdvyu475djudf2rc5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizsvhlrmk2b", "author_handle": "covidactionnz.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Aotearoa Covid Action", "text": "Cicada variant BA.3.2 #cicada #covid #maskup", "created_at": "2026-04-09 03:00:11", "like_count": 5, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tqfinptcgxemv7e5pqhbrygx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizsqemvnc2v", "author_handle": "michaelmgirard.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Michael Girard, CA, PAA-NCGR", "text": "Between Long #COVID, #ClimateChange, and the Israel- U.S. war against #Iran, things are going to be terrible economically for the rest of my life.", "created_at": "2026-04-09 02:57:18", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizpm76kqc2h", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nMy first symptom of a #COVID infection in March 2020 was a floater in my right eye - \n\nVia @a-dobbie11.bsky.social \n\nwww.cidrap.umn.edu/covid-19/eye...", "created_at": "2026-04-09 02:01:18", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizpm7vf7c2h", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nI remember that we were driving home with warm loaves of sourdough bread on the backseat, & I was laughing at a joke, while trying to brush what I thought was a cobweb from my eye. \n\nSix years later, the floater is still there & I have #LongCOVID.", "created_at": "2026-04-09 02:01:18", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizpm76kqc2h", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizpm76kqc2h"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mfix643oaw7gziqyqq2ejjib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miznxpzsjoa2", "author_handle": "cremevax.infosec.exchange.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "cremevax👩🏻‍💻🏳️‍🌈​🇨🇦🇺🇦", "text": "Hi, these are the weekly #washingtonstate #kingcounty (that is, #seattle and environs) #COVID #COVID19 #wastewater toots.\n\nA quick reminder that this King County respiratory disease data comes from Washington State, not the federal government.\n\nThe West […] \n\n[Original post on infosec.exchange]", "created_at": "2026-04-09 01:32:02", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizi5xqfhk2b", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "New research predicts impact of lower productivity and workers quitting because of long-term illness after Covid-19\n\n#covid #infoskeet\n\npaywall ...", "created_at": "2026-04-08 23:48:07", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizg6mgcr22d", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "Hey look, it’s that most exotic of things: someone wearing a mask on a plane! Please consider doing the same the next time you travel. Your organs & immune system will thank you later. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-08 23:12:38", "like_count": 36, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizewnl2ss2c", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "1/\nLast year my partner was diagnosed with stage-3 colon cancer, & my father was diagnosed with breast cancer, uncommon in men. \n\n#COVID may soon prove to be the 8th oncogenic virus -", "created_at": "2026-04-08 22:50:17", "like_count": 13, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 5, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizewnlnek2c", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\n\"Oncogenic viruses are responsible for approximately 15–20% of human cancers worldwide\":\n\npmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC....", "created_at": "2026-04-08 22:50:17", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizewnl2ss2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mizewnl2ss2c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:twmthruimmq4lj6i4sxxprkt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mize4qodsc2s", "author_handle": "lohyb.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bruno Lohy-Havard🍀", "text": "Pour cause de COVID ?!?\n#COVID c'est un nouveau #drone ukrainien ?\n#Russe #Ukraine", "created_at": "2026-04-08 22:35:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ee2zz2ej5m6wu2vsqqfonxvh/app.bsky.feed.post/3miz7opk7j22k", "author_handle": "thesocialsage.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Social Sage", "text": "'Has the Wi-Fi industry been solving the wrong problem?' A team of former Bell Labs and Nokia engineers wants to make your router 10x better thanks to a unique chip https://cstu.io/75aa46 #startup #engineer #covid", "created_at": "2026-04-08 21:16:21", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:sd34v34z37o3l6kekxymsq26/app.bsky.feed.post/3miz6jjedtk2a", "author_handle": "kurtrexcooper.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "KurtRexCooper", "text": "Covid booster this afternoon.\n\nI have so many vaccine shots I will be declared a religious icon because my skin has so many holes in it.\n\n😂 \n\n#Vaccines #Health #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-08 20:55:33", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:afxc6locdkxx3dxqgiczqbi6/app.bsky.feed.post/3miz5uzqoa22v", "author_handle": "b2o6n4.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Woke Not Broke 🇺🇸🏳️‍🌈", "text": "Sleuths Uncovers Evidence to Suggest Djokovic’s COVID Diagnosis Was BS\n\nwww.thedailybeast.com/bbc-uncovers...\n\n#News #WorldNews #Sports #Tennis #Athletes #COVID #Health #PublicHealth #NovakDjokovic #Morons #Idiots", "created_at": "2026-04-08 20:44:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:k6okbmarfdefql4d5q2ak6vk/app.bsky.feed.post/3miz3zgoyws2g", "author_handle": "mcboingboing.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "mcboingboing", "text": "This article about the deaths of 6 young(ish) US actors is a tour de force. Dangles 💫celebrity news💫, then hits w/evidence about #Covid and #LongCovid, and finally explains the common defense/denial mechanisms happening in readers' brains. bsky.app/profile/gayf...", "created_at": "2026-04-08 20:10:48", "like_count": 6, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3miyzvn7xtc2n", "author_handle": "halcionandon.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anna - Please boost pinned tweet.🙏", "text": "Improvements stopped since worsening on Saturday. Nearly 4 weeks so far. Constant need to sleep.\nOn-off fever. Sweating. Sore lymph nodes in armpits. Sore heavy lungs. Sore throat won’t stop.\nDr said keep going but no improvement. Appts & paperwork don’t stop. #Covid #LongCovid", "created_at": "2026-04-08 19:32:52", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bf2bzroubvpxfs2llj5hyt6d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mj4kcunflc22", "author_handle": "halcionandon.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Anna - Please boost pinned tweet.🙏", "text": "Still no improvement.\n\nIf someone cared about me here it might help.\n\nIm immunocompromised but nobody masks. 4th Covid infection in 20 months.\nRoom mouldy. Spencer", "text": "2/\nWhile @ipaccanada.bsky.social & @cmadocs.bsky.social continue to cling to #DropletDogma, dismiss #COVID as a big nothing-burger, & call anyone who'd prefer to avoid it, \"anxious\". \n\nBut a decade from now, everyone will say that they thought wearing #N95s & avoiding #Reinfections was a good idea.", "created_at": "2026-04-08 16:34:26", "like_count": 8, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3miyrri566k2y", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Iran ceasefire, Tudors, Ayatollahs", "created_at": "2026-04-08 15:42:11", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:my7d7simtuvzfztwqfo6wtii/app.bsky.feed.post/3miygldqtmc2f", "author_handle": "healthday.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "HealthDay", "text": "Folks with long #COVID face a higher risk for serious heart problems — even younger adults who were never sick enough to be hospitalized, new research suggests.\nwww.healthday.com/health-news/...", "created_at": "2026-04-08 13:47:07", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vmd2oqboco524fhpqdu7pnbn/app.bsky.feed.post/3miyfrriysc2t", "author_handle": "asls.org.uk", "author_display_name": "Association for Scottish Literature", "text": "The boy is ten and today it is his birthday.\nBehind him on the lawn\nhis mother and his little sister\nunfurl a rainbow crayoned big and bright\non a roll of old wallpaper…\n\n—Liz Lochhead, “The Spaces Between” – Glasgow, April 2020\nin A HANDSEL (Birlinn, 2023)\n#poem #covid\nbirlinn.co.uk/product/a-ha...", "created_at": "2026-04-08 13:32:54", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3miyenlbuc22o", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Lloop #feedback #math #tennis #uk #Iran #israel #uk #iran #ww3 \n\nMatrix Now - the phased news of 2026 so far", "created_at": "2026-04-08 13:12:53", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:etll2v7fc5b3aiet6pza6cpn/app.bsky.feed.post/3miy7q4oi2s2m", "author_handle": "lzvolk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lzvolk", "text": "Not surprising; good to see a study/report on this.\nMotto: We only know what we test for. Association pour la Réduction des Risques Aéroportés", "text": "#Vaccin\n#VaccinationCovid \n#Covid \n#CovidIsNotOver \n#Belgique \n#Bruxelles \n🔽🔽🔽", "created_at": "2026-04-08 11:37:29", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ejmygam5327vsk5sot3ug5dj/app.bsky.feed.post/3miy34of6rc23", "author_handle": "hanfdampf.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "🐋 Hanfdampf", "text": "mehrere Bekannte Mitte 40 und jünger sind in den letzten 3 Jahren verstorben \n(Herzinfarkt und Schlaganfälle) \nvor 14 Tagen ist wieder ein Bekannter (40) ins Koma gefallen \ndazu sind mehrere jüngere Menschen krank geworden \n(Blutdruck, Krebs) \nmein Sohn (20) kennt mehrere Menschen mit Long #Covid", "created_at": "2026-04-08 10:22:05", "like_count": 34, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 13, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:5rvuhwzkodw5c7nqfukybmps/app.bsky.feed.post/3miy2mir6w22e", "author_handle": "bbottone.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Bengiamino Bottone", "text": "#HollywoodCiak 1922 #Tenet #ChristopherNolan #JohnDavidWashington #RobertPattinson #ElizabethDebicki #KennethBranagh #AaronTaylorJohnson #MichaelCaine #thriller #time #CIA #Kyiv #oligarch #India #Tallinn #Amalfi #Oslo #airport #cancer #family #art #covid \nhollywoodciak.blogspot.com/2020/09/film...", "created_at": "2026-04-08 10:13:00", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:7sersfkhaznx4e4a2ttyc65d/app.bsky.feed.post/3mixwu2yj722q", "author_handle": "toveharris.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tove Harris", "text": "Prominente Menschen, die wie viele Mio. andere Menschen an COVID-19 verstorben sind. \n\nAuch heute passiert das natürlich noch. That, to my mind, is the “well-being […]", "created_at": "2026-04-08 07:37:38", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:cfockgsxbxvvhhiq4eden2bo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mixrytbcpgv2", "author_handle": "antiaall3s.chaos.social.ap.brid.gy", "author_display_name": "Anti. 🐘", "text": "The zine is available for instance here and probably everywhere else you like to get your zines (as the say for podcasts):\n\nhttps://sheerspite.ca/product/pandemic-care-without-states-12-prefigurative-practices-in-supplying-well-being-from-below-digital/", "created_at": "2026-04-08 07:38:53", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:cfockgsxbxvvhhiq4eden2bo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mixrwizk4lv2", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:cfockgsxbxvvhhiq4eden2bo/app.bsky.feed.post/3mixrwizk4lv2"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2u33nna55cyvmnj4yzmyoor4/app.bsky.feed.post/3mixmidben72q", "author_handle": "photosbyrjt.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Photos by Richard J Thomas", "text": "Signs - Instructions: #05/14 Remember Covid?\n\nAh yes! A doctor breaks down what makes BA.3.2 different. It is descended from the #omicron variant. #Covid-19\nkatiecouric.com/health/new-c...\n:Cat-N", "created_at": "2026-04-08 05:38:22", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wl7dm2fgf6jsnsmri4mm6nuw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mixjkgp6ic26", "author_handle": "mainstreetmn.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "ICYMI \n\n#MN08 #RepPeteStauber #LongCovid.\n\nGotta ask if the #MAGA-controlled House will now consider taking action on #HRes1136: Supporting the goals and ideals of “Long #COVID Awareness Month” \n\nProbably too much to ask for hearings on #MN04 #RepIlhanOmar's #HR9907 Long COVID Research Moonshot Act", "created_at": "2026-04-08 05:08:04", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:tfaezkecxsu3t7cfzr5abfhs/app.bsky.feed.post/3mix6evc4js2m", "author_handle": "jerrytimber.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Jerry Timber", "text": "Remember when “closing the schools” for #COVID was a horrible disservice to the children? \nNow, forcing #AI on them is simply an inevitability.\n\nIt sucks here.", "created_at": "2026-04-08 01:47:38", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:agdj6zjpovzc6j3p63vjcxrb/app.bsky.feed.post/3mix4yuvedk2a", "author_handle": "dfprovine.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "dfprovine", "text": "What I can't figure is the people thinking #Trump is going to come up with some way out of the mess he made in #Iran. In recent years, by normalizing genocide, and making it okay to spread dangerous viruses. And by letting a convicted felon who committed sedition run for president again. \n\nLooking away from and allowing atrocities and injustices to occur opens the door to further ones. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-07 18:03:15", "like_count": 38, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 8, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwej3sha22c", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "bsky.app/profile/gayf...", "created_at": "2026-04-07 18:04:44", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwegi6q6k2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwegi6q6k2c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rwg35fe2kui4nlruxtnirr47/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwfwofonk2w", "author_handle": "adriancjr.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Adrian Constantin", "text": "bsky.app/profile/adri...", "created_at": "2026-04-07 18:30:12", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwegi6q6k2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwegi6q6k2c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miweex5o7s2z", "author_handle": "bellinissima.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "bellinissima", "text": "if You are abled bodied enough and financially capable - You need to be masking\n\neverywhere.\n\n#collectiveliberation means ALL of us\n\nincluding #Disabled, #immunocompromised, #chronicallyill people.\n\npropaganda made many think it’s okay to think of disabled lives as discardable. \n\n#covid", "created_at": "2026-04-07 18:02:23", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwevupmss2z", "author_handle": "bellinissima.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "bellinissima", "text": "if you are in these streets protesting along with your mask with a proper seal bc #asymptomaticcovid, covered up tattoos, etc.\n\nif you bring your phone - secure it beforehand\n\nactivistchecklist.org/protest/\n\nPrepare for a Protest\n#surveillance\n#covid\n#donttakepicturesofpeoplesfaces", "created_at": "2026-04-07 18:11:52", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miweex5o7s2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miweex5o7s2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:rjh44pr4oqbp6nnpmkfphkhs/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwd2m3wyft2", "author_handle": "fediverse.stefanbohacek.online", "author_display_name": "Stefan Bohacek", "text": "\"Living in a reality where so many have moved on, it’s an honor to give a voice to those who have felt left behind.\"\n\nhttps://thesicktimes.org/2026/04/07/two-long-covid-short-films-premiere-at-the-easterseals-disability-film-challenge/\n\n#news #entertainment #movies #ShortFilm #LongCovid #covid […]", "created_at": "2026-04-07 17:38:46", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwclkvjys2z", "author_handle": "bellinissima.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "bellinissima", "text": "sometimes I see replies to posts like\n\nso are you in the streets doing abcd\n\nand its from people who havent done anything\n\nfor those who want to start (bc #covid is a thing people keep pretending isn’t real and not all if us can be in these streets bc we don’t want to die):\n\n🧵civic engagement", "created_at": "2026-04-07 17:30:18", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwcrb2q6k2z", "author_handle": "bellinissima.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "bellinissima", "text": "act.uscpr.org/a/stop-genoc...\n\nThis is the email I use.\n\nI typically add and subtract, and there is a pretty chill character limit? You can write A LOT.\n\nMain advice that a streamer provided: make sure You tell them something actionable, veto a bill, pass legislation, etc. #email #genocide", "created_at": "2026-04-07 17:33:30", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwclkvjys2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwclkvjys2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwcwdnsa22z", "author_handle": "bellinissima.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "bellinissima", "text": "#5calls\n\n5calls.org\n\nstressing out over what to say for the people who prefer calling to crafting emails - (do both if You can)?\n\n5calls had call scripts.\n\nfrom experience usually You get a vm but I have heard an anime gasp when I said genocide to whoever answered lizzy fletcher’s phone.", "created_at": "2026-04-07 17:36:20", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwcrb2q6k2z", "root_uri": "author_display_name": "bellinissima", "text": "donate and or volunteer at a #foodpantry #communityfridge near You.\n\nIf You have not expired food that You won’t use don’t horde resources.\n\nWhatever action or money You pour into Your local community has a bigger impact than a donation to a national org with a ton of overhead", "created_at": "2026-04-07 17:39:52", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:vj2swvt2vemtu5qqn4yh6mkd/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwcwdnsa22z", "root_uri": HHS is keeping mum while it renews the committee's charter, as legally required.\n\nMy story for @medscape.com \n\n#CDC #IDsky #healthlaw #healthpolicy #publichealth #pediatrics #vaccines #measles #COVID #politics #RFK", "created_at": "2026-04-07 17:04:35", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mj7zob5e3h5xoa73b2m7vnge/app.bsky.feed.post/3miw7zyo5sh2i", "author_handle": "aafanational.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "AAFA National", "text": "The COVID-19 #vaccine is proven to help prevent severe illness from #COVID. It reduces the chances of hospitalization and death. For people who are unsure if they want to get vaccinated, AAFA developed a new decision aid (the first of its kind) to help you make this decision with your doctor. \n#NPHW", "created_at": "2026-04-07 16:44:41", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mj7zob5e3h5xoa73b2m7vnge/app.bsky.feed.post/3miwaoqquic2m", etc.—has been allowed to run rampant for years now. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-07 16:27:06", "like_count": 57, "reply_count": 4, "repost_count": 16, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": Almost all of us have brain damage, some more than others. At a global, population level that's going to have unknown and unforeseen consequences, despite most people wanting to deny it.", "created_at": "2026-04-08 06:04:42", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miw72hmlgc2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miw72hmlgc2c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ztvxledew74v3zmjgx7lv74j/app.bsky.feed.post/3miw4yso2hs27", "author_handle": "thinkronicity.ispost.ing", "author_display_name": "Thinkronicity ™", "text": "Canada's Housing affordability Issue\nLow interest rates after the #COVID crisis caused ~20% maintained higher cost of the average home. Yes the real estate market made a lot of money over this time, and boomers got even wealthier, while every other generation funded it, just to have a home.\n#Canpoli", "created_at": "2026-04-07 15:50:20", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:56wwhpdhpmk44untnrq4w5wl/app.bsky.feed.post/3miw4rn2tll2d", "author_handle": "alliemccormackk.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Allie McCormack", "text": "NEVER FORGET!\nTrump on #COVID:\n\"It affects virtually nobody\" Trump said at an Ohio rally on 9/21/20, the day before the U.S. hit 200,000 deaths\n\"Like a miracle, it will disappear\"\n\"They have the sniffles\"\n\"The risk to American people remains very low\"\n#VietnamVetsAgainstTrump", "created_at": "2026-04-07 15:46:19", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:b7tjp4yaqcy2crro6sumg5zy/app.bsky.feed.post/3miw4n7mwzc2p", "author_handle": "nandanainthegarden.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Nandana", "text": "Well! Guess we raised a big enough stink about #FREE #COVID shots!!\nOr this is a bribe from the #UCP #DanielleSmith for the upcoming election. overlaps, large-scale Mendelian randomization studies (2024) have found no direct genetic causality, suggesting that the clinical 🔗 may be driven by environmental triggers & systemic inflammation rather than shared genetic risk factors \nwww.frontiersin.org/journals/neu...", "created_at": "2026-04-07 06:13:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": communication among astrocytes, microglia & excitatory neurons underscores the profound impact of COVID on neural circuitry. These results provide important insights into the mechanisms driving the neurodegenerative consequences of #COVID ,", "created_at": "2026-04-07 06:13:13", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wvmvjmwdooynkpxdwlghnvq6/app.bsky.feed.post/3miv4qpoerk24", "author_handle": "castltrastondrs.bsky.social", Significantly upregulated in both conditions .scRNA-seq reveals a marked increase in CHI3L1-expressing astrocytes in COVID samples,", "created_at": "2026-04-07 06:13:13", "like_count": 0, differentially expressed genes (DEGs) shared by both diseases.\n-🔑 regulatory genes identified include MX1, IFI27, C1QC, C1QA,", "created_at": "2026-04-07 06:13:13", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, to microglial activation and \"cytokine storms\"\n\nlink.springer.com/article/10.1... \n\nwww.sciencedirect.com/science/arti... \n\nlink.springer.com/article/10.1....\n\nThe primary pathways linking 2 "at://did:plc:szc7xq5qv7wg2abye6tlvet2/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuneoay6k2k", "author_handle": "virussucks.com", "author_display_name": "VirusSucks.com", "text": "Neurourology and Urodynamics\nVolume 43, Issue 6 pp. 1458-1463\n\nDoes COVID-19 cause or worsen LUT dysfunction, what are the mechanisms and possible treatments? \n\nVik Khullar, Berni Lemmon, Omer Acar, Paul Abrams, Bahareh Vahabi\n\nonlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.... \n\n#medsky\n#covid\n#longcovid", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:38:02", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226", "author_handle": "ebonstorm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thaddeus Howze", "text": "When Terrye began #chemo, it was not under ideal of circumstances.\n\nAfter surgeries, a bout of #pneumonia before the #COVID #pandemic, which made us cautious about going out and we sat home for five years, except when absolutely necessary, she battled pneumonia again, 4 years ago and nearly died.", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:36:36", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunkk274226", "author_handle": "ebonstorm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thaddeus Howze", "text": "Chemo is madness: The drugs are designed to target fast dividing cells, which is why you also lose your hair, affect your gut lining and bone marrow. Other symptoms include: \n\n– Bone deep fatigue\n– Nausea & Vomiting\n– A weakened immune system\n\nThis opens a person to a variety of diseases.", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:41:19", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuns5yiuc25", "author_handle": "ebonstorm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thaddeus Howze", "text": "Chemo devastates your immune response through a condition called neutropenia (the abnormal low count of neutrophils) useful for fighting bacterial and fungal infections. \n\nBacteria are everywhere and there are embedded fungi and viruses which can waken when your immune system is weakened. \n\n#CMV", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:45:32", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunkk274226", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunvt5rgc25", "author_handle": "ebonstorm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thaddeus Howze", "text": "If the immune system is suppressed (like during #chemo), #CMV can reactivate and cause real damage such as: \n\n– CMV #pneumonia: breathing problems\n– CMV #retinitis: vision loss (leads to blindness, if untreated)\n– #Gastrointestinal infection: pain, diarrhea, bleeding\n– #Hepatitis: liver inflammation", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:47:34", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuns5yiuc25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuode6ihk25", "author_handle": "ebonstorm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thaddeus Howze", "text": "When I tell you this is an epic juggling act: \n\n– Extreme weight loss (100 pounds now)\n– Still battling cancer and its symptoms (fluid buildup, lungs)\n– Keeping a transplant kidney alive during chemotherapy\n– No appetite, #nausea, #vomiting\n\n#MuscleAches #pain #CMV #anemia #HairLoss #DentalIssues", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:55:12", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunvt5rgc25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuosnirvc25", "author_handle": "ebonstorm.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Thaddeus Howze", "text": "Food is a mission-critical challenge and the last couple of days, Terrye said: Her appetite is non-existent and food tastes like ashes. \n\nI also know — #protein drinks are not cutting it. Sigh.\n\nWe will also be going into Kaiser for #ultrasound and draining fluid from her lungs tomorrow.", "created_at": "2026-04-07 02:03:41", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuode6ihk25", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:dbecyogjcysv4vcdzzbdbl5i/app.bsky.feed.post/3miunc6yk6226"} {"uri": "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "Every Health Issue You or Someone You Know Has Had Since 2020 is Because We All Had to Stay Home Six Years Ago. Obviously. #COVID", "created_at": "2026-04-06 22:04:40", "like_count": 35, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 3, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuftyy6pk2a", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "Unless one lived in China, it isn't even true that we had to stay home six years ago. The only time I stayed in my house during the-stay-at-home-suggestion was when I chose to. People are ridiculous.", "created_at": "2026-04-06 23:23:24", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miufz7bgyc2b", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "I usually put quotes around “lockdown”—because like you say, other than in China, there were no true lockdowns.", "created_at": "2026-04-06 23:26:18", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuftyy6pk2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miugmglg3k2l", "author_handle": "scarletp1792.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scarletp", "text": "We had significant, lengthy ’lockdowns’ of varying restrictions & I was grateful for it\nTBF I did not have(eg)3 kids at home with 1 device trying to work & manage remote learning \nBut we did have a tremendous amount of community spirit*-when we got covid cases to 0 it was an achievement & inspiring", "created_at": "2026-04-06 23:37:06", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miufz7bgyc2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3miujbkfqgc2a", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "Restrictions are not lock downs, though. My sister lives in Canada and their restrictions were tighter than ours for awhile. People act as if they were in solitary confinement when no one ever was unless they lived in China or were literally in prison.", "created_at": "2026-04-07 00:24:39", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miugmglg3k2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3miujbkralk2a", "author_handle": "andreastudiescovid.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Andrea Is Sick of Long Covid", "text": "People in my state were driving to neighboring states to go to bars, get haircuts, and get their nails done. The bars in my state opened outdoors after two months. They just moved all the tables and DJ systems into the parking lots and carried on as usual.", "created_at": "2026-04-07 00:24:39", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:awiisug3zscp65axn5begyn2/app.bsky.feed.post/3miujbkfqgc2a", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miugr4x7ms2l", "author_handle": "scarletp1792.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scarletp", "text": "*excludes divisive Murdoch interference \n\nWhat people forget is the scary UNKOWN at the time\nWe had Prof Brett Sutton using tested Public Health precautionary principles etc\n\nWe were lucky\n\n-from grateful Melbourne, Victorian resident", "created_at": "2026-04-06 23:39:40", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miugmglg3k2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:devi6cxausrragzvgzsr46lg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mium7wlbnk2o", "author_handle": "mini-katze.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "and we in WA were lucky to have escaped Delta and earlier variants, thanks to closed borders", "created_at": "2026-04-07 01:17:27", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miugr4x7ms2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuhf4jof22l", "author_handle": "scarletp1792.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Scarletp", "text": "Posted for posterity, no malice\nFrom ABC article 2 Aug 2020\n\nDo you know what?\nAt some points, we all* worked together and it fkn worked-we got our cases to 0\n\nAnd don’t talk to me about social impacts on kids- I work in a school - I see all the sick kids\n\n*breathe*🧘‍♀️\nThat is all \n🙏", "created_at": "2026-04-06 23:50:59", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:67fvron4r6v2nrpxwzldcf6o/app.bsky.feed.post/3miugr4x7ms2l", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:a5q5ol4jz5h3dhpvzaqmr24b/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubjne34c2d", "author_handle": "commamonger.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "commamonger 😷 (analogue writing assistant)", "text": "Obviously.", "created_at": "2026-04-06 22:06:01", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuc2fbo7s2b", "author_handle": "gayfabfourfan.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "#9 Dream", "text": "It’s obvious!", "created_at": "2026-04-06 22:15:24", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:a5q5ol4jz5h3dhpvzaqmr24b/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubjne34c2d", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:xzkjqutbqk5m2h2jofbzodib/app.bsky.feed.post/3miubhaqez22b"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ndwll4ummlopvo3mvlrbzgn6/app.bsky.feed.post/3miuawnwdcc2g", "author_handle": "skepticalraptor.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Skeptical Raptor", "text": "CDC survey reveals vaccination rates for healthcare workers in the 2024-2025 season, showing 76.3% received #flu and 40.2% for #COVID #vaccines. 🤧🥴☹ #art #artist #cartoon #covid", "created_at": "2026-04-06 13:23:16", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ghstv3yqbpaljlvadn6nmbr7/app.bsky.feed.post/3mitd24ucn225", "author_handle": "mtl-science.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "#nature #climate #environment #fakehistory #music #genetic #science #covid #history #reich #empire #power #information #lenin #britain #lizzie #starmer #knowledge #us #davinci #napoleon #Lloop #feedback #math #tennis #uk #Iran #israel\nWhy are the USA allowing Iranian ships and oil through Hormuz?", "created_at": "2026-04-06 13:00:49", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:exsv7aselabdpdgphlonghph/app.bsky.feed.post/3mit6aolfn22f", "author_handle": "justis4u.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "@Justis4u", "text": "@mrsbettybowers.bsky.social\n@bibugona.bsky.social\n@tuker-carlson.bsky.social\nIt happened in #UK before when the #Zionist government put a #DNR (Do NOt Resuscitate)notice on elderly patients during #Covid & now the #USA #Zionist private #healthcare is copying this #Zionist tactic", "created_at": "2026-04-06 11:34:40", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d7tfrbl44t5t6vvjxio2jy72/app.bsky.feed.post/3misrcopzwc2e", "author_handle": "hausarztpapa.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Haus.Arzt.Papa", "text": "Wenn ich mir das so ansehe: Wir wissen, dass #Covid häufig (10-15%) Langzeitfolgen mit sich bringt. Wir sehen, dass Kinder häufig erkranken und nach einem Anstieg der Infektrate bei Kind/Jug. die Infektrate bei Erwachsenen scheinbar ansteigt.\n\n¿Sollten wir nicht unsere Kinder konsequenter Impfen?", "created_at": "2026-04-06 07:43:06", "like_count": 7, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:pi55id2cji6vxanophoubkhq/app.bsky.feed.post/3misvj7let22n", "author_handle": "messalinadl.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "Ja! Ist mir schleierhaft, wieso das nicht überall empfohlen wird.
