Spencer", "text": "7/\nThe only aspect poorly understood about #COVID is WHY it is still being ignored by most governments, when we have 480,000+ published studies about COVID that attest to it not being just like \"any other respiratory illness\":\n\nwww.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/research/cor...", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhk6kfk2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "8/\nIn sum, it's not a lack of data or medical understanding that stalled our response to this #OngoingPandemic - but a profound & egregious lack of political will.", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwgn22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwgn22g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "2/\nNo, not really. \n\nHerewith 21,000+ published studies on #LongCOVID: reasons to avoid #COVID, & to prevent, count, & properly fund research for treatment & a cure for Long COVID - \n\nwww.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/research/cor...", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjw5ts2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "3/\nAnd in the 7th year of this #OngoingPandemic, what are governments doing?\n\n▶️ Stigmatizing & silencing those living with Long COVID;\n\n▶️ Closing Long COVID clinics;\n\n▶️ Still claiming to be \"following the science\" while co-opting/hijacking #PublicHealth for political self-interest;", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwark2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "4/\n▶️ Still ignoring #AirborneTransmission;\n\n▶️ Still pushing a vaccine-only public health strategy, instead of a vaccine-plus strategy; \n\n▶️ Still pushing a you-do-you public health strategy (public health has always been a collective effort, for the greater good: assessing your own risk...", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjw5ts2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwdpc2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "5/\n...for Ebola, for example, would be a bad idea); \n\n▶️ Still pushing a vax-and-relax public health strategy when vaccination (gift enough to prevent severe illness & death) does not prevent infection & only slightly reduces the risk of #LongCOVID;", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwark2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwfns2g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "6/\n▶️ Still pushing the idea that \"endemic\" means learning to live with an injurious virus without doing anything about it: just ask anyone living in an endemic malaria area how easy that is, & how safe too;", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 4, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwdpc2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwgn22g", "author_handle": "taniaspencer.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Tania J. Spencer", "text": "7/\nThe only aspect poorly understood about #COVID is WHY it is still being ignored by most governments, when we have 480,000+ published studies about COVID that attest to it not being just like \"any other respiratory illness\":\n\nwww.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/research/cor...", "created_at": "2026-04-05 18:02:38", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 4, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjwfns2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:d6wes5izgxd3i6t2xojhr6fi/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirdhjkrlk2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:lxhifpvgpy2bidzqja6d6wce/app.bsky.feed.post/3mirbg5bydc2t", "author_handle": "segar.com", "author_display_name": "Adrian Segar", "text": "Turns out job losses in February were far worse than previously reported.
